definition: Being-Reason is a higher faculty or state of understanding that three-brained beings have the possibility to acquire and perfect. It manifests through reflection, associative thought, and the revival of memories, often linked to sensory impressions and 'being-experiencing'. It is an internal capacity that can attain 'benefits for ordinary being-existence' and is distinct from factors dependent solely on surrounding beings or external conditions.
role: A perfectible, internal faculty of understanding and consciousness that enables deep reflection and the attainment of higher benefits.

key_quotes.text: these three-brained beings who interest you, arising on the planet Earth, had the same possibilities of perfecting the functions needed to acquire being-Reason as have all other forms of tetartocosmoses throughout the whole Universe.

there were gradually revived in me—as a result of the manifestations of my being-Reason and due to the effect of various associations aroused by the visual impressions of the environment of that region—all the scenes and the whole series of associative thoughts evoking a certain being-experiencing of mine that occurred during my last stay there when I visited contemporary Egypt...

If not even one of the benefits for ordinary being-existence formerly attained by the Reason of the beings of the continent of Atlantis has come down by inheritance to contemporary beings of your planet...

these data, indispensable for every being, are beginning to function in you just at the time when all those factors are being crystallized and formed in you which do not depend upon a being's own Reason but solely upon surrounding beings, external conditions, and the most great common-cosmic Iraniranumange.

definition: Being-ableness refers to the inherent capacity, potential, or possibility within a being to achieve certain states, manifest specific powers, or engage in processes of self-perfection. It is exemplified by the 'possibilities given you of consciously coating this Higher Sacred', the ability of a donkey to manifest power 'incomparably better' than a man for its present existence, and the potential of three-brained beings to 'consciously to perfect the "germ of Reason"'. For man, it encompasses the 'possibilities for acquiring exactly similar data to those of the Actualizer of all that exists in the Universe' and the capacity to 'be a man' through conscious work on oneself.
role: The inherent capacity, potential, or capability of a being.

key_quotes.text: Apart from the possibilities given you of consciously coating this Higher Sacred in your presence, your donkey has the same value for the common-cosmic process, and consequently for our Common Creator, as yourself, since each of you is predestined for some definite purpose, and all these different purposes, taken together, constitute the meaning of everything existing.

Great Nature herself transforms this surplus of cosmic substance in the donkey's presence—without, of course, the donkey being aware of it—into the power and strength of certain of its organs for its present existence alone, thus enabling it to manifest that power incomparably better than you.

And these manifestations of the different powers of beings of diverse forms constitute in their totality the exterior conditions that alone make it possible for three-brained beings like yourself consciously to perfect the "germ of Reason" placed in their presence to the required gradation of pure Objective Reason.

And yet man should indeed be the acme of creation, since he is formed with and has in himself all the possibilities for acquiring exactly similar data to those of the Actualizer of all that exists in the Universe.

To have the right to the name of man, one must be one. And to be a man, one must first of all, with an indefatigable persistence and an unquenchable impulse of desire issuing from all the separate independent parts constituting one's entire common presence, that is to say, with a desire issuing simultaneously from thought, feeling, and organic instinct, work on an all-round knowledge of oneself, while struggling unceasingly with one's subjective weaknesses, and afterward, taking one's stand upon the results thus obtained by one's consciousness alone regarding the defects in one's established subjectivity as well as the means for the possibility of combating them, strive for their eradication without mercy toward oneself.

definition:
Being-bodies refer to the distinct compositional parts or vehicles that constitute a being. The text describes three types: 
1.  **Planetary body:** A lower being-body formed of microcosmoses, which are crystallizations transformed by the planet itself. It gradually decomposes after the 'first sacred rascooarno' into its primordial substances on that planet.
2.  **Kesdjan body:** A second lower being-body, formed of radiations from other concentrations of tritocosmoses and the sun. It rises to a corresponding sphere and also gradually decomposes after the 'second process of the sacred rascooarno', with its crystallizations returning to their primordial arisings.
3.  **Highest being-body:** Formed of crystallizations received directly from the 'sacred Theomertmalogos'. This body can 'never decompose' and must exist in the solar system until it is perfected to a required degree of Reason, making it an 'irankipaekh' formation of sacred substances that can exist independently and resist 'painful influences'.
The passages also mention a 'coarse body' or 'physical body' and a 'fine and invisible body' called the 'soul' in the context of ancient teachings.
role: The distinct material or subtle vehicles that comprise a being.

key_quotes.text: In the 'dualistic,' or 'idealistic,' teaching it was said that within the coarse body of the being-man there is a fine and invisible body, which is the 'soul.'
This 'fine body' of man is immortal, that is to say, it is never destroyed.
Now let me tell you about the two lower being-bodies, namely, the planetary body and the kesdjan body.

After the first sacred rascooarno, the planetary body of a being which is formed of microcosmoses, that is, of crystallizations transformed by the planet itself, gradually decomposes according to a certain second-order cosmic law called 'retarnotoltoor,' and disintegrates on that planet into the primordial substances from which it arose.

The second being-body, the kesdjan body, being formed of radiations of other concentrations of tritocosmoses and of the sun itself of the given solar system, rises to the corresponding sphere I was speaking about, and after the second process of the sacred rascooarno also gradually decomposes, and the crystallizations of which it consists return in various ways to the sphere of their own primordial arisings.

But the highest being-body, formed of crystallizations received directly from the sacred Theomertmalogos within the limits of the solar system where the being has arisen and existed, can never decompose And this highest part must exist in the given solar system until perfected to the required degree of Reason—just that Reason which makes such cosmic formations 'irankipaekh,' that is, formations of the most most sacred substances already mentioned, which can exist independently of kesdjanian arisings and not be subject to what are called 'painful influences' from any external cosmic factors whatever.
The first striving to have in one's ordinary being-existence everything satisfying and really necessary for the planetary body.

definition: Being-confrontative associations are specific internal processes that 'usually proceed in three-brained beings as a result of every kind of new perception'. These associations are critical because 'from which alone data can crystallize in them for their own individuality'. The text indicates that these associations have 'almost ceased to arise' in contemporary three-brained beings, leading to a lack of genuine perception and understanding. They are vital for conscious associations and the 'intensity of transformation of every kind of 'being-energy' in the presence of beings', and their disappearance is linked to an instinctive need to receive new shocks that is also absent.
role: Internal processes arising from new perceptions, crucial for the crystallization of data for individuality and the transformation of being-energy.

key_quotes.text: In the last three centuries the very process of their existence has become such that in the presence of most of them there have almost ceased to arise during their daily existence any of those 'being-confrontative associations' which usually proceed in three-brained beings as a result of every kind of new perception, and from which alone data can crystallize in them for their own individuality.

all the associations of unavoidably perceived shocks began to flow during their waking state only from various 'already automatized series of former imprints' made up of 'impressions experienced long ago' and endlessly repeated, there disappeared in them even the instinctive need to receive all sorts of new shocks—vital for three-brained beings—which issue either from their inner, separately spiritualized being-parts or from corresponding perceptions coming from without for conscious associations, namely, for those being-associations upon which depends the intensity of transformation of every kind of 'being-energy' in the presence of beings.

Well then, when your favorites, leading their daily lives in this manner, go to these present-day theaters and watch the senseless manipulations of the actors, and receive shocks one after another from reminiscences of previously perceived images, no less senseless and absurd, there willy-nilly appear in them during this waking state of theirs more or less tolerable being-associations, so that when they get home and go to bed they sleep much better than usual.

definition: Being-dimtzoneero is explicitly defined as 'being-duty'. It refers to a personal, deeply held obligation or commitment, specifically exemplified by Beelzebub's 'being-duty toward the 'essence-word' I had given myself'. This essence-word was a commitment to remain among Earth's beings to understand the causes of their unique psyche, which compelled him despite his need for rest.
role: A personal being-duty or deeply held obligation/commitment.

key_quotes.text: I could of course have gone home to the planet Mars for this purpose, but there arose before me my own individual 'being-dimtzoneero,' that is, my being-duty toward the 'essence-word' I had given myself.

And the 'essence-word' I had given myself at the beginning of my sixth descent was to exist among your favorites until I had finally made clear to my Reason all the causes of the gradual formation in their common presence of that exceptionally strange being-psyche.

And as I had not yet fulfilled this 'essence-word' I had given myself, not having had time to learn all the details needed for a full elucidation of the problem, I considered a return to the planet Mars premature.

definition:
Being-duty signifies an obligation or responsibility inherent in a being's existence. It is presented in several forms: 
1.  **Societal/Practical:** The 'first 'being-duty'' for some communities is 'carrying out from time to time the process of 'reciprocal destruction''. 
2.  **Role-based:** A general expectation or obligation to fulfill one's role, as when someone is told to 'know your duty' or is accused of 'breach of duty'. 
3.  **Genuine/Higher:** A profound responsibility, as implied by the chapter title 'Becoming aware of genuine being-duty'. This can involve past beings laboring and suffering for the welfare of future generations. 
4.  **Cosmic/Existential:** The fundamental responsibility to become a 'good servant of our Common Endless Creator' and to 'pay honorably for your arising and existence' through one's general functioning.
role: An inherent obligation or responsibility of a being, varying from societal roles to cosmic purpose.

key_quotes.text: CHAPTER 7 Becoming aware of genuine being-duty

The beings of this community are now the benefactors of the other beings of your planet, offering them, as they say, 'philanthropic aid,' especially as regards their first 'being-duty,' namely, that of carrying out from time to time the process of 'reciprocal destruction.'
'Hey, you! Don't you know your duty? Don't you see what's going on over there?'
your whole presence, of which they are a part, will not be capable of becoming a good servant of our Common Endless Creator, and will thus be unable to pay honorably for your arising and existence.

It seems that in the past certain beings must have labored hard and suffered very much for all this, and endured a great deal that perhaps they could have spared themselves They labored and suffered solely that we might have these advantages today and use them for our welfare. And all this, consciously or unconsciously, they did for

definition: Being-egoplastikoori are internal crystallizations or efforts within a being. They are described as 'being-efforts for the transubstantiation in themselves of all the data for obtaining Objective Reason'. These crystallizations are 'required for your future being-associations' and for 'future logical confrontation'. They also contribute to the 'proper elaboration of the sacred substances 'abrustdonis' and 'helkdonis'. Furthermore, a significant portion of 'egoplastikoori' that arise in the 'Reason' of contemporary beings, from which their 'world outlook' is formed, are derived from 'truths' invented by others.
role: Internal crystallizations or efforts that facilitate the acquisition of Objective Reason, shape a being's world outlook, and aid in the elaboration of sacred substances.

key_quotes.text: The quality of their own 'being-egoplastikoori,' that is, their being-efforts for the transubstantiation in themselves of all the data for obtaining Objective Reason

I decided, under the pretext of gratifying your interest, to tell you everything about them in such a way that the 'egoplastikoori' required for your future being-associations would be crystallized in you without any admixture of doubt.

I decided to do this so that many differently essenced egoplastikoori should be crystallized in corresponding localizations of your common presence for the needs of your future logical confrontation, and also that, through active mentation, there should proceed more intensively in you the proper elaboration of the sacred substances 'abrustdonis' and 'helkdonis,' required for coating and perfecting both your higher being-parts.

Hence it is that almost half of what are called the 'egoplastikoori' arising in the Reason of the contemporary beings of that ill-fated planet—from which, in general, what is called a 'world outlook' is formed in beings—are crystallized just from the 'truths' invented by those bored fishermen and their descendants.

definition: Being-existence refers to the state or process of a being's life, comprising its duration, purpose, and quality. There are 'two 'kinds,' or two 'principles,'' of its duration. For three-brained beings, following the 'fulasmtamnian' principle, the 'fundamental meaning and aim of their existence is to serve as the vehicle for the transmutation of cosmic substances necessary for the 'common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process'.' Their existence is meant to continue 'until there was coated in them, and completely perfected in Reason, what is called the 'kesdjan body''. For one-brained and two-brained beings, the aim is transmutation for their specific solar system or planet. It also refers to the 'ordinary being-existence' which includes striving for 'everything satisfying and really necessary for the planetary body', and a being's duty 'to pay as quickly as possible for one's arising and individuality'. The 'quality of being-existence' of those in a being's surroundings can influence them.
role: The state, process, duration, and purpose of a being's life.

key_quotes.text: Throughout the Universe there exist two 'kinds,' or two 'principles,' of duration of being-existence.

The first principle of being-existence, called 'fulasmtamnian,' is proper to all three-brained beings arising on any planet of our Great Universe And the fundamental meaning and aim of their existence is to serve as the vehicle for the transmutation of cosmic substances necessary for the 'common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process.'

The second principle of being-existence is the one to which all one-brained and two-brained beings are subject, wherever they may arise And the meaning and aim of the existence of these beings also consists in the transmutation through them of cosmic substances, which are required, in their case, not for purposes of common-cosmic character, but for that solar system alone, or even for that planet alone within which or upon which these one-brained and two-brained beings arise.

In any event, to make clearer the strangeness of the psyche of those three-brained beings who have taken your fancy, you must know that, in the beginning, after the organ kundabuffer with all its properties had been removed from their presence, the duration of their existence conformed to the 'fulasmtamnian' principle, that is to say, they were obliged to exist until there was coated in them, and completely perfected in Reason, what is called the 'kesdjan
The first striving to have in one's ordinary being-existence everything satisfying and really necessary for the planetary body.

The fourth the striving, from the beginning of one's existence, to pay as quickly as possible for one's arising and individuality, in order afterward to be free to lighten as much as possible the sorrow of our Common Father.
The quality of being-existence of the beings in the immediate surroundings,

definition: The provided passages do not give enough context to describe what "Being-faculty" represents. While related concepts such as a "particular psychic property" are mentioned (Page 511), the specific term "Being-faculty" is not defined or elaborated upon.
role: Insufficient context.

definition: Being-hanbledzoin is a specific cosmic substance, explicitly described as the 'blood' of a being's 'kesdjan body.' Its primary function is to nourish and perfect this kesdjan body, similar to how regular blood serves the planetary body. The substances comprising Being-hanbledzoin are derived from the transformation of elements from other planets and the sun itself. It also plays a crucial role in the general organization of a man, connecting the feeling-organization with the thought or consciousness. This substance arises from 'intentionally made being-efforts.' Changes in its 'density and tempo' can affect thinking's ability to influence feeling. Beings, including Beelzebub and those of the Tikliamishian civilization, have historically used their hanbledzoin to induce special psychic states, such as the hypnotic state, though its expenditure was noted to be harmful to one's being-existence.
role: A cosmic substance vital for the kesdjan body, connecting mental and emotional functions, and used for psychic states.

key_quotes.text: But later, as the being-impulse called 'love of kind' frequently arose in my common presence, I had to produce this state in a great many three-brained beings there not only for my personal aims but for their benefit as well, and since this proved to be very harmful for my being-existence, I invented another means by which I obtained the same effect without the expenditure of my own 'hanbledzoin. '

'Hanbledzoin' is nothing else than the 'blood' of the 'kesdjan body' of the being, and just as the sum total of cosmic substances called 'blood' serves for the nourishment and renewal of the planetary body of the being, so in the same way 'hanbledzoin' serves for nourishing and perfecting the kesdjan body.

But the substances designed for serving the kesdjan body of the being, which in their totality are called 'hanbledzoin,' are obtained from the transformation of elements of other planets and of the sun itself of that system where this three-brained being has the place of his arising and existence.

Just as the separate independent parts of a "hackney carnage" are connected, namely, the carriage to the horse by the shafts and the horse to the coachman by the reins, so also are the separate parts of the general organization of a man connected with each other: the body is connected to the feeling-organization by the blood, and the feeling-organization with that of the thought or consciousness by what is called "hanbledzoïn," namely, by that substance which arises in the common presence of a man from all intentionally made being-efforts.

The same thing proceeds in the general organization of the ordinary man whenever from some impression or other the "density and tempo of the hanbledzoïn" change in him so that his thinking loses all possibility of affecting his feeling-organization.
...they soon found out and understood how to obtain it with the help of what is called 'being-hanbledzoin,'

definition: Being-impulsakri is a quality of beings that is intrinsically linked to the purity of their brains. It is subject to a special commandment from the All-Embracing Endlessness, which states, 'Always guard against such perceptions as may soil the purity of your brains.' This implies that the nature or state of one's Being-impulsakri can be compromised or 'soiled' by certain perceptions, and thus needs to be protected.
role: A quality or attribute of a being, related to the purity of their brains and affected by perceptions.

key_quotes.text: Concerning the quality of the 'being-impulsakri,' there is one special commandment, among the direct commandments of our All-Embracing Endlessness, which is strictly observed by all normal three-brained beings of our Great Universe, and is expressed in the words 'Always guard against such perceptions as may soil the purity of your brains.'

definition: A Being-impulse is an inherent drive, tendency, or internal prompting that arises within a being's presence, influencing their inner and outer manifestations. Examples include specific impulses like 'self-love,' 'pride,' 'vanity,' and 'self-calming,' which can become habitual and require conscious effort to overcome. The 'being-impulse called 'self-remorse' (remorse of conscience)' is described as leading to the suppression of the 'denying principle' of 'self-calming' and gradually stopping 'self-criticism,' resulting in inner disharmony and a loss of sincerity. Certain 'naloo-ossnian impulses' are also mentioned, representing a spectrum of negative tendencies such as depravity, the urge to destroy, and the striving to be what one is not; these impulses cause 'painfully retributive consequences' for individuals and can spread their influence to surrounding beings.
role: An inherent drive or tendency that shapes a being's inner and outer manifestations, sometimes negative or habitual.

key_quotes.text: The inclination to free oneself from the necessity of making the being-efforts required by Nature,

...to be able to overcome those impulses which had become habitual in the functioning of his common presence from the many heterogeneous associations arising in him from all sorts of accidental shocks, coming from outside and also engendered within, namely, the impulses called 'self-love,' 'pride,' 'vanity,' and so on.

And when, after incredible what are called 'organic' and 'psychic' efforts, he had attained this, he began, without mercy for these being-impulses that had become inherent in his presence, to think and recall just which being-impulses had arisen in him on just what occasions in the course of his past existence, and how he had, consciously or unconsciously, reacted to them.

If he frees himself of all imagination about himself and of all self-calming—impulses which have become inherent in contemporary people—he will recognize that his whole life is nothing but a blind reacting to these attractions and repulsions.

Consequently, the causes for the manifestation of this being-impulse of 'remorse of conscience' arose more and more frequently in their presence And the sensations thus induced, which are similar to those ensuing from 'being-partkdolgduty,' infallibly led to the suppression and enslavement of the 'denying principle' inherent in the common presence of three-brained beings, called 'self-calming' And then, during all the inner and outer manifestations of their common presence, which were set in motion by the natural stimuli of one or another of their independent spiritualized localizations, each time this disagreeable sensation of 'self-remorse' arose, they began—at first deliberately, on the initiative of their ruminating parts, and later by force of habit—to stifle and gradually stop all 'self-criticism.'

definition: Being-impulses are inherent drives or tendencies that originate within a being. These include a 'spectrum of naloo-ossnian impulses' composed of seven distinct negative layers, such as depravity, self-satisfaction from misleading others, an urge to destroy, an inclination to avoid necessary being-efforts, a tendency to conceal physical defects, enjoying what is not personally deserved, and the striving to be what one is not. These 'naloo-ossnian impulses' result in 'painfully retributive consequences' for the individuals who possess them and can radiate to engender similar tendencies in others. Other examples of being-impulses that become habitual in a being's presence include 'self-love,' 'pride,' and 'vanity,' which require significant effort to overcome. 'Self-calming impulses' are also noted as inherent in contemporary people, leading their lives to be a 'blind reacting to these attractions and repulsions.' Beings consciously or unconsciously react to these impulses, which in turn provoke reactions in their independently spiritualized parts (body, feelings, thoughts).
role: Inherent drives or tendencies, sometimes negative or habitual, that shape a being's reactions, experiences, and influence on others.

key_quotes.text: And if these different aspects of the entire 'spectrum of naloo-ossnian impulses' were described according to the notions of your favorites and expressed in their language, they might be defined as follows: 1 Every kind of depravity, conscious as well as unconscious, 2 The feeling of self-satisfaction from leading others astray, 3 The irresistible urge to destroy the existence of other breathing creatures, 4 The inclination to free oneself from the necessity of making the being-efforts required by Nature, 5 The tendency to make use of every kind of artifice to conceal what in the opinion of others are one's physical defects, 6 Serene enjoyment in the use of what is not personally deserved, 7 The striving to be not what one is

This 'something' which, together with these 'naloo-ossnian' impulses, arises in the presences of specific individuals not only is the cause of 'painfully retributive consequences' for these individuals themselves but also has the particularity that, whenever one of these 'imperious tendencies' ceases to act in their presences, the radiation proper to one or another aspect of the manifestation of this 'something' has a greater effect on surrounding beings, and becomes a factor for engendering the same in them.

First of all, he decided to attain without delay the 'potency' that would give him the force and the possibility to be absolutely sincere with himself, that is, to be able to overcome those impulses which had become habitual in the functioning of his common presence from the many heterogeneous associations arising in him from all sorts of accidental shocks, coming from outside and also engendered within, namely, the impulses called 'self-love,' 'pride,' 'vanity,' and so on.

And when, after incredible what are called 'organic' and 'psychic' efforts, he had attained this, he began, without mercy for these being-impulses that had become inherent in his presence, to think and recall just which being-impulses had arisen in him on just what occasions in the course of his past existence, and how he had, consciously or unconsciously, reacted to them.

If he frees himself of all imagination about himself and of all self-calming—impulses which have become inherent in contemporary people—he will recognize that his whole life is nothing but a blind reacting to these attractions and repulsions.

definition: Being-joy is described as an impulse of joy that arises within a being's common presence. Beelzebub expresses it as a profound gladness concerning Hassein's crisis and sincere weeping, which he admits is 'at first glance is not logical.' He believes that Hassein's awareness or sensation of this being-joy, despite its seemingly illogical nature, will be 'very useful and in fact indispensable' for him later in his responsible existence.
role: A profound and sometimes seemingly illogical impulse of joy connected to significant internal development or transformation.

key_quotes.text: First of all I shall begin by expressing in words the impulse of joy concerning you which is now arising within my common presence I personally am very, very glad about this crisis which has occurred and is still continuing in you.

I am glad chiefly because the sincere weeping that I saw being manifested at just this period of your existence when, according to the laws of the great Heropass, you are on the threshold of the being of a responsible being—that is, at just the age when all the data necessary for those functionings that constitute the individuality of a three-brained being during his responsible existence are being crystallized, and when they acquire a harmonious 'tempo' in the common functioning—gives me the assurance that the relative aware-ness or even merely the 'sensation' that you may have of this being-joy of mine, which at first glance is not logical, will be very useful and in fact indispensable for you later, as for all three-brained beings who have reached responsible age I shall therefore first of all explain it to you.

The plural form is explicitly used only in the specific phrase "logicnestarian localizations," which are points within a being where impressions are intentionally fixed in offspring to make them conform to abnormal surrounding conditions.
role: Insufficient context for the general term; specific "logicnestarian localizations" are points for fixing impressions.

key_quotes.text: ...they intentionally try by every available means to fix in their 'logicnestarian localizations' as many impressions as possible derived exclusively from the artificial perceptions due to the results of their abnormal existence—and this maleficent ac-

definition: Being-manifestations are the observable expressions, actions, or appearances of beings, encompassing both their inner and outer aspects. These manifestations can be 'incongruous' and are often linked to the 'infinitely unhappy fate' of beings. They can also represent how a being's inner and outer conduct becomes 'progressively less and less becoming to three-brained beings.' Relationships are sometimes formed based on 'artificial outer manifestations' like 'amiability,' which stand in contrast to a being's true inner feelings. Furthermore, external forces can influence these manifestations, as seen when the 'vietroooretznel' caused an abrupt change in the 'data for being-notions' about Beelzebub's personality, transforming people's perceptions of him.
role: The observable expressions, actions, or appearances of a being, reflecting their inner state or external influences.

key_quotes.text: ...you should ever happen to exist among them and witness these incongruous being-manifestations, you will be unable, in spite of knowing their cause, to keep from 'laughing' inwardly.

But toward the end of our sixth visit there, when certain of them were formed with the kind of inner presence now possessed by the representatives of almost all branches of that art of theirs, and when these newly arisen 'types,' taking
...all their inner and outer manifestations in the ordinary process of their being-existence began to be progressively less and less becoming to three-brained beings.

The manifestations of the aforementioned vietroooretznel in relation to my person began, on the very next morning, to have their action, in the sense that all the data for being-notions about my personality, which had previously been firmly fixed in the presences of beings who knew me, changed abruptly for no other reason than this objectively maleficent 'official presentation' of mine to their highest 'power-possessing being '

definition: The provided passages do not give enough context to describe what "Being-mentation" represents, as the specific compound term "Being-mentation" is not explicitly used. The passages discuss "mentation" in general, describing it as a process in every creature, especially man, that flows according to the 'law of associations.' It is said to have two kinds: 'mentation by thought' (expressed by words) and 'mentation by form' (proper to animals and man, determined by environment, and evoking sensation and picturing). The 'mentation of your favorites' is described as 'strange' and lacking 'reflection,' leading to false convictions.
role: Insufficient context for the specific term.

definition: A Being-notion refers to the 'data' or conceptions about a personality, which are 'firmly fixed in the presences of beings' who hold them. These notions encompass perceptions regarding someone's 'personal significance, as well as about all my qualities and merits.' Being-notions can be 'changed abruptly' or 'transformed' due to external events or influences, sometimes leading to the invention and attribution of 'fantastic being-qualities' to an individual.
role: An internal mental construct or conception held by beings about others' personalities and attributes.

key_quotes.text: ...all the data for being-notions about my personality, which had previously been firmly fixed in the presences of beings who knew me, changed abruptly for no other reason than this objectively maleficent 'official presentation' of mine to their highest 'power-possessing being '

Their notions about my personal significance, as well as about all my qualities and merits, were suddenly transformed for their individuality, for all of them I suddenly became 'important,' 'wise,' 'extraordinary,' 'interesting,' and so on and so forth, that is, the possessor of all kinds of fantastic being-qualities of their own invention.

definition: Being-obligolnian Strivings are five specific strivings that beings (particularly terrestrial three-centered beings) transubstantiate within themselves. This process is undertaken to acquire the divine function of genuine Conscience. The five strivings are: (1) to possess all satisfying and truly necessary elements for the planetary body in one's ordinary being-existence, (2) to have a constant and unflagging instinctive need for self-perfection in the sense of Being, (3) to consciously strive for ever-increasing knowledge of the laws of world-creation and world-maintenance, (4) to pay as quickly as possible for one's arising and individuality from the beginning of existence, in order to then be free to lighten the sorrow of the Common Father, and (5) to always assist the most rapid perfecting of other beings (both similar and different forms) up to the degree of self-individuality (sacred 'Mart-fotai'). When beings consciously worked upon themselves according to these strivings, they achieved objective attainments perceptible to others.
role: Five specific strivings or impulses for self-perfection and objective service, essential for developing genuine Conscience.

key_quotes.text: All the beings of that planet then began to work in order to have in their consciousness this divine function of genuine Conscience, and for this purpose, as everywhere in the Universe, they transubstantiated in themselves what are called the 'being-obligolnian strivings' of which there are five, namely.

The first striving to have in one's ordinary being-existence everything satisfying and really necessary for the planetary body. The second striving to have a constant and unflagging instinctive need to perfect oneself in the sense of Being. The third the conscious striving to know ever more and more about the laws of world-creation and world-maintenance. The fourth the striving, from the beginning of one's existence, to pay as quickly as possible for one's arising and individuality, in order afterward to be free to lighten as much as possible the sorrow of our Common Father. And the fifth the striving always to assist the most rapid perfecting of other beings, both those similar to oneself and those of other forms, up to the degree of the sacred 'Mart-fotai,' that is, up to the degree of self-individuality

definition: Being-oskolnikoo is a sincere, almost genuine being-impulse, which is equated with 'appreciation' and 'gratitude.' It was manifested by beings towards Beelzebub, specifically by those he saved and almost everyone else who had contact with him or heard of him, with the exception of professional physicians.
role: A being-impulse of sincere appreciation and gratitude.

key_quotes.text: they began to manifest toward me their most sincere, almost genuine being-impulse of 'oskolnikoo' or, as they say, 'appreciation' and 'gratitude.'

Nor was it only those I saved and their closest relatives who showed this 'being-oskolnikoo' or 'gratitude' toward me, but almost everyone who was in contact with me or heard of me in one way or another, with the sole exception of those professionals who were their physicians.

definition: Being-parkhitrogool is an internal state or sensation, explicitly described as 'irrepressible inner laughter.' This sensation is what one would experience if they were to witness the astonishment of certain beings upon their sudden realization that their sun, which they believe to be a source of heat and light, is in reality almost always freezing cold.
role: An irrepressible internal sensation of laughter or amusement.

key_quotes.text: if you should chance to be among the beings of that planet, you would be unable to contain your 'being-parkhitrogool,' or what they call 'irrepressible inner laughter,' at their astonishment if they should suddenly sense clearly, and understand beyond all doubt, that not only does nothing like 'light,' 'heat,' and so on come to their planet from their sun, but that this supposed 'source of heat and light' is itself almost always freezing cold, like the hairless dog of our highly esteemed Mullah Nasr Eddin.

definition: Being-partkdolgduty is an indispensable factor for every three-brained being. In the past, the results of being-partkdolgduty contributed to the duration of beings' existence; however, when these results were no longer obtained, the length of their existence became extremely variable and dependent on accidental exterior factors. Its intensive actualization requires specific psychic factors and is linked to the ability to instinctively sense 'Objective Reason.'
role: An indispensable factor or activity for three-brained beings, related to the duration of existence and sensing Objective Reason.

key_quotes.text: And so, my boy, when the results of partkdolgduty were no longer obtained in the presence of your favorites, and the duration of their existence began to depend exclusively on the results of the mentioned seven accidental exterior factors, then thanks to all this the length of their existence, especially among contemporary beings, became extremely variable.

psychic factors for the power to intensively actualize being-partkdolgduty indispensable to every three-brained being— had until now been so blind that he was unable even instinctively to sense that Uni-Being and unshakable reality beneath an exterior coated in conformity with the common-cosmic Trogoautoegocrat and surrounding conditions—a reality sacred for every breathing creature, which bears the name of 'Objective Reason. '

Instead, the text consistently refers to 'power-possessing beings' or 'power-possessors,' which are individuals (such as chiefs, directors, advisors, hereditary figures, or those who have accidentally risen to power) who hold positions of authority and significance. These individuals, by virtue of their position, have the possibility to take action or exert influence, but 'being-power' itself is not explained as a separate quality or force.
role: Not enough context is provided to define its role as a distinct entity. The term primarily appears as part of 'power-possessing beings' or 'power-possessors,' referring to individuals with authority.

namely, 'power-possessing beings,' 'learned beings of new formation,' and 'professional physicians. '

The only terrestrial beings there who have the possibility of being satisfied to repletion are those called 'important power-possessors'

definition: The provided passages do not explicitly define or describe 'Being-rumination' as a distinct concept or entity. However, one passage mentions 'ruminating parts' of beings. These 'ruminating parts' are described as initiating the deliberate act of stifling and gradually stopping all 'self-criticism,' which later became a force of habit.
role: Not enough context is provided to define its role as a distinct entity. The term 'ruminating parts' suggests a cognitive or internal processing aspect of beings, which can initiate actions like stifling self-criticism.

key_quotes.text: And then, during all the inner and outer manifestations of their common presence, which were set in motion by the natural stimuli of one or another of their independent spiritualized localizations, each time this disagreeable sensation of 'self-remorse' arose, they began—at first deliberately, on the initiative of their ruminating parts, and later by force of habit—to stifle and gradually stop all 'self-criticism.'

definition: Being-sarpitimnian is a profound sensation experienced by Beelzebub. The revival of this sensation intensely associates with memories and induces sad and distressing reflections within him. It is further described as a sensation that, at an earlier point in his existence, 'engendered in my common presence a feeling of 'revolt' on account of the 'lack of foresight' of various kinds on the part of our Most High, Most Saintly Cosmic Individuals,' ultimately leading to objective misfortunes on Earth and throughout the Great Universe.
role: A profound and distressing sensation that can engender feelings of revolt due to perceived cosmic oversights.

key_quotes.text: Just now, while I was telling you about that evening spent in a restaurant in Montmartre among the contemporary three-brained beings breeding on the planet Earth, the 'being-sarpitimnian sensation' I experienced at that time has involuntarily been revived in me, and at this moment the memory of everything I experienced is so intensely and repeatedly associated in all three spiritualized parts of my common presence that it compels me to digress from the theme I began, in order to share with you the sad and distressing reflections induced in me by my solitude in those dreadful surroundings in Montmartre after my young Persian cicerone had left me.

The fact is that for the second time in the whole of my existence, the process took place in my being of this same 'being-sarpitimnian' sensation, which once before had engendered in my common presence a feeling of 'revolt' on account of the 'lack of foresight' of various kinds on the part of our Most High, Most Saintly Cosmic Individuals, whereby all these objective misfortunes arose, and will perhaps go on arising on the planet Earth and even in all our Great Universe.

definition: Being-shame is an impulse, or the data required to engender such an impulse, which has completely atrophied in contemporary beings, contributing to their mechanical Reason. It is identified as 'instinctive shame,' a being-impulse that forms the fundamental basis of what are called 'morals' and 'objective morality.'
role: An impulse related to morals and objective morality, the data for which has atrophied in contemporary beings.

key_quotes.text: that the Reason of your contemporary favorites has become mechanical, and that the data for engendering the impulse of 'being-shame' have completely atrophied in them.

And it is thanks to the Romans that, as a result of successive changes in the presence of contemporary three-brained beings, those factors are never crystallized which in other three-brained beings engender the impulse called 'instinctive shame,' that is, the being-impulse that is the basis of what are called 'morals' and 'objective morality.'

definition: The provided passages do not explicitly define or describe 'Being-sounds' as a distinct concept or entity. However, the text refers to 'sounds' in various contexts: as 'sounds required for verbal intercourse' that beings have a 'being-ableness' to reproduce (though this ability has atrophied), as 'two different sounds or letters' (theta and delta) used by ancient Greeks, as the subject of a 'theory of sound' and 'vibrations of sound' studied by contemporary scientists, and as 'sounds of their melodies' that can have strange effects and engender impulses in beings. The passages treat 'sounds' as acoustic phenomena that beings perceive or produce, rather than defining 'being-sounds' as a specific compound entity.
role: Not enough context is provided to define its role as a distinct entity. The passages refer to general acoustic 'sounds' and their influence on beings, and the ability of beings to reproduce them for communication.

key_quotes.text: Here I must tell you about something very strange concerning the gradual atrophy in the presence of all the terrestrial three-brained beings there of this 'being-ableness' to reproduce the sounds required for verbal intercourse.

A very good illustration of what I have just said is afforded by the sensation of the 'taste' and the capacity to pronounce two different sounds or letters known and used there by almost all the contemporary beings breeding on all parts of the surface of your planet, and passed down to them by the ancient Greeks from times long past.
their celebrated 'theory of sound,' which arose comparatively recently and is 'seriously' studied and supposedly known by contemporary 'learned physicists' and 'learned musicians.'

definition: The provided passages do not explicitly define "Being-welfare" as a specific concept or entity. However, the term "welfare" is discussed in the context of three-brained beings on Earth striving to organize their existence, often exclusively for their own personal welfare. This exclusive regard for personal welfare is described as leading to negative psychic properties such as cunning, contempt, and hate, and hindering their potential to become particles of the Reasonable Whole. The text also mentions a desired state where beings' inner and outer "being-existence" proceeds as it does on other planets, implying a more harmonious state of being or welfare.
role: The passages do not give enough context for a clear role of "Being-welfare" as a distinct entity. It appears to refer generally to the well-being or prosperity of a being's existence.

key_quotes.text: have always striven to organize their welfare during the process of their ordinary existence exclusively for them themselves.

It is this exclusive regard for their own personal welfare that has gradually crystallized in their psyche the quite peculiar and unprecedented properties I cited such as 'cunning,' 'contempt,' 'hate,' 'servility,' 'lying,' 'flattery,' and so on, which, on the one hand, are factors for outer manifestations unbecoming to three-brained beings, and on the other are causes of the gradual destruction of all those inner possibilities, placed in them by Great Nature, of becoming particles of the whole of the Reasonable Whole.

Well then, my boy, when the results of the very saintly labors of the Essence-Loving Ashiata Shiemash had begun to blend with the processes of both their inner and outer being-existence, and when thanks to this the data for the divine impulse of Conscience, surviving in their 'subconscious,' shared more and more in the functioning of their 'waking consciousness,' then their being-existence, both personal and in their relations with others, began to proceed on this planet almost as it does on the other planets of our Great Universe on which three-brained beings exist.

definition: Belcultassi is an individual, identified as the "bearer of the future Sacred Individual." He became convinced that his external manifestations did not align with his inner perceptions and impulses, and that something in his common presence was not proceeding correctly according to sane being-logic. To verify this, he sought to understand if others sensed and cognized things in the same way. He initiated meetings with friends and acquaintances to share observations and findings. Subsequently, Belcultassi became the head of a society named the "Society of Akhldanns," leading and guiding its members in their activities.
role: A specific individual, the "bearer of the future Sacred Individual" and the founder and head of the "Society of Akhldanns."

key_quotes.text: And it was then that this bearer of the future Sacred Individual, Belcultassi, having in this way recalled all his former perceptions, experiencings, and manifestations, clearly realized that his external manifestations did not correspond at all either to his perceptions or to the definite impulses formed in him.
These conscious observations and impartial verifications at last convinced Belcultassi that in his common presence something was proceeding not as it should proceed according to sane being-logic.

Thanks to his inquiries, Belcultassi gradually succeeded in evoking sincerity in his friends and acquaintances, and as a result he learned that they all sensed and saw everything in themselves the same way that he did.
Shortly afterward, again on the initiative of Belcultassi, they began to meet together from time to time to share their observations and findings.
From the day of the founding of this society, Belcultassi himself stood at its head, and the activities of its members were carried out under his general guidance.

role: A sensation that increases in the psyche of beings under specific planetary conditions.

definition: Bobbinkandelnost is a "cosmic actualization" that is lawfully crystallized in the "localizations" or "brains" of beings, particularly three-brained beings, from the moment of conception up to the age of responsible beings. It provides very definite possibilities for actualizing the processes of association and experience, and is crucial for the duration of a being's existence. The text compares a bobbinkandelnost to a spring in a mechanical watch; just as a watch spring runs down, the contents of a bobbinkandelnost can be used up. When the contents of a bobbinkandelnost crystallized in a specific brain are exhausted, that brain immediately ceases to function. Three-brained beings possess three independent bobbinkandelnosts, each named for a different center: the bobbinkandelnost of the thinking center, the bobbinkandelnost of the feeling center, and the bobbinkandelnost of the moving center. Premature exhaustion of a bobbinkandelnost, such as that of the thinking center due to excessive reading and thought-only associations, can lead to a "premature partial death."
role: A cosmic actualization in the brains of beings that determines their capacity for association, experience, and the duration of their existence, akin to a spring that can be exhausted.

key_quotes.text: crystallized in their brains, from the moment of conception up to the age of responsible beings, these 'bobbinkandelnosts,' with very definite possibilities for actualizing the processes of association.

The 'bobbinkandelnosts' in the brains of beings who exist only according to the principle of itoklanotz correspond to the springs in mechanical watches of different systems Just as the duration of the movement of mechanical watches depends upon the springs they contain, so the duration of the existence of beings depends exclusively on the bobbinkandelnosts formed in their brains at the time of their arising and during the process of their further formation.

And so, owing to all I have just said, no matter how your favorites exist, and no matter what measures they adopt, and even if they were to put themselves, as they say, 'in a glass case,' as soon as the contents of the bobbinkandelnost crystallized in one or another of their brains is used up, that brain immediately ceases to function.
The difference between mechanical watches and your contemporary favorites is that in watches there is only one spring, whereas your favorites have three of these independent bobbinkandelnosts.

And these bobbinkandelnosts in all three independent 'localizations' of three-brained beings in general have the following names: the first the bobbinkandelnost of the thinking center, the second the bobbinkandelnost of the feeling center, and the third the bobbinkandelnost of the moving center.

As a result of reading superfluously and associating only by thoughts, the contents of the bobbinkandelnost of the thinking center of those three-brained beings are exhausted before the contents of the bobbinkandelnosts of their other being-centers.

definition: Bobbinkandelnosts are multiple "cosmic actualizations" lawfully crystallized in the "localizations" or "brains" of beings, particularly three-brained beings, from the moment of conception up to the age of responsible beings. They provide very definite possibilities for actualizing the processes of association and experience, and are crucial for determining the duration of a being's existence. The text compares bobbinkandelnosts to springs in mechanical watches; just as watch springs run down, the contents of bobbinkandelnosts can be used up. When the contents of one or more bobbinkandelnosts are exhausted, the associated brains cease to function. Three-brained beings possess three independent bobbinkandelnosts, one each for their thinking, feeling, and moving centers. If beings experience possibilities of action only through one or two of their brains, the contents of those bobbinkandelnosts can be prematurely exhausted, causing the other bobbinkandelnosts to be used up as well, even if they were not directly involved, leading to a shorter existence. Beings who exist in conformity with the law of associations can prevent their bobbinkandelnosts from being used up, allowing them to exist much longer.
role: Multiple cosmic actualizations in the brains of beings that collectively determine their capacity for association, experience, and the duration of their existence.

key_quotes.text: crystallized in their brains, from the moment of conception up to the age of responsible beings, these 'bobbinkandelnosts,' with very definite possibilities for actualizing the processes of association.

The 'bobbinkandelnosts' in the brains of beings who exist only according to the principle of itoklanotz correspond to the springs in mechanical watches of different systems Just as the duration of the movement of mechanical watches depends upon the springs they contain, so the duration of the existence of beings depends exclusively on the bobbinkandelnosts formed in their brains at the time of their arising and during the process of their further formation.
The difference between mechanical watches and your contemporary favorites is that in watches there is only one spring, whereas your favorites have three of these independent bobbinkandelnosts.

And these bobbinkandelnosts in all three independent 'localizations' of three-brained beings in general have the following names: the first the bobbinkandelnost of the thinking center, the second the bobbinkandelnost of the feeling center, and the third the bobbinkandelnost of the moving center.

...the contents of one or two of their bobbinkandelnosts are prematurely exhausted, whereupon, just like mechanical watches in which the 'spring' has run down or the force of the 'regulator' has weakened, they cease to act.

You will then clearly understand that in the case of certain of your favorites, even of recent times, who somehow find out and correctly assimilate in their Reason certain details concerning the 'law of associations' proceeding in the separate brains of beings, as well as the reciprocal action of these independent associations, and who exist more or less in conformity with this law, the bobbinkandelnosts formed in their separate being-brains are not used up, and they thus acquire the possibility of existing much longer than the other three-brained beings on that planet.

definition: Boolmarshano is an ancient term used on the continent of Atlantis, described as what terrestrial contemporary beings now call a "book." One specific boolmarshano, titled "The Affirming and Denying Influences on Man," was created by Makary Kronbernkzion, who engraved cosmic truths and a scientific thesis onto marble. This work was approved by the Society of Akhldanns and placed in cathedrals. Copies were made, some out of "chirniano" tusks, and these copies, sometimes existing in halves, contained inscriptions and signs that could be deciphered. The ideas recorded on this boolmarshano concern the formation of beings and consist of three independent universal forces.
role: An ancient type of book or scientific text, specifically a work by Makary Kronbernkzion, containing cosmic truths and scientific theses about universal forces.

key_quotes.text: to engrave on marble a 'boolmarshano' entitled 'The Affirming and Denying Influences on Man.'
A 'boolmarshano' on the continent of Atlantis was what terrestrial contemporary beings have replaced by what they call a 'book.'

When the original of that boolmarshano was completed, and approved with sincere admiration by the other learned members of the Society of Akhldanns, it was placed in the center of the 'main cathedral' of the beings belonging to that society.

I took them to a city in the country now called 'Turkestan,'... and began deciphering the inscriptions and signs engraved on the boolmarshano, setting forth the scientific thesis by Makary Kronbernkzion under the title of 'The Affirming and Denying Influences on Man.'

If the ideas recorded on this boolmarshano were put into ordinary language, they could be expressed as follows: 'It is evident that we men, like all units existing in the Universe, are formed and always consist of the same three independent forces, by means of which the process of reciprocal maintenance of everything existing is actualized, that is, the following three universal forces.

definition: Caironana is a former name for a specific geographical district on Earth. It was previously called 'Avazlin' and is today referred to as the 'outskirts of Cairo.' This district was a site where grand artifacts, including a new observatory and other buildings for the welfare of being-existence, were being constructed by the beings of that region.
role: An ancient name for a specific geographical district on Earth, now known as the outskirts of Cairo.

key_quotes.text: The district where the work was being carried on—both for this new 'observatory,' as they called it, and for other buildings designed for the welfare of their being-existence —was then named 'Avazlin'; a few years later it came to be called 'Caironana,' and today it is referred to simply as the 'outskirts of Cairo.'

definition: Cathodnatius is a "force" mentioned in the context of an experiment. When this force is increased, the elements composing the presence of "red copper" begin to transform, specifically to "involve toward the quality of the substances that compose the ordinary presence of planets." The manipulation of this force involves turning various switches on and off in a specific sequence.
role: A force that causes transformation or "involvement" of elements, specifically red copper, towards planetary substances.

key_quotes.text: increasing the force called "cathodnatius," and you will see that the elements composing the presence of the "red copper" begin to involve toward the quality of the substances that compose the ordinary presence of planets.'

definition: Chai-Yoo was a three-brained being from China who became a scientist of 'new formation' upon reaching responsible age. He was responsible for making the knowledge and practical application of the seven-toned scale of sound generally accessible. Selected as a candidate for 'first degree initiate', he received help from genuine initiated beings to learn about true past events, including the construction details of the great apparatus lav-mertz-nokh. Later, for the sake of being regarded as a 'scientist' by others, he 'wiseacred' a new theory based on this information, described as having a 'fully developed inherency to wiseacre'.
role: A three-brained being from China; a scientist and 'first degree initiate' candidate

key_quotes.text: there arose in this same China a three-brained being by the name of Chai-Yoo, who on reaching responsible age also became a scientist of new formation

Thanks to this Chai-Yoo the knowledge and practical application of the seven-toned scale of sound became generally accessible and, passing from generation to generation, automatically reached your contemporary favorites.
In the early years of his responsible existence this Chai-Yoo was selected, on account of certain of his corresponding subjective merits, as a candidate for what is called 'first degree initiate'
he became worthy to be informed, among other things, about the great apparatus lav-mertz-nokh, in all the details of its construction.

this Chai-Yoo, who was one of the first 'ideal specimens of a scientist of new formation' there, that is, a being with a 'fully developed in-herency to wiseacre,' not only wiseacred a new theory of his own on the basis of the information he had learned

This principle arises when mentation becomes "completely automatized," functioning "without any participation of their 'localization of feeling' or...their 'feeling center.'" This automatized mentation leads beings to invent numerous "almost meaningless words" for things and ideas.
role: A principle of automatized mentation lacking feeling

definition: Chaltandr is described as a rare plant found on Earth. A material is specially woven from its fibers, which retains the plant's natural color. The unique property of the chaltandr plant's color is that it does not alter the vibrations of other nearby sources and is itself completely unaffected by other vibrations. This material is used to create a large 'tent' for experiments on vibrations.

'That is why for my experiments on vibrations arising from sources other than color, I ordered this particular material and had something like a large "tent" made out of it

definition: Choon-Kil-Tess was one of two twin brothers, a 'prince' (meaning 'choon' in Maralpleicie) and a direct descendant of a chief member of a great learned society. He was a great terrestrial learned being who, along with his twin, became a saint. He pursued scientific research, particularly in medicine, and settled in China. With his brother, he created the 'dzendvokh' (the middle part of the alla-attapan experimental apparatus), attained a thorough knowledge of the Law of Heptaparaparshinokh (which formed the basis for the Chinese seven-toned subdivision of the octave), and was among the first to identify 'gaps' in the octave of sound.
role: A terrestrial prince, learned scientist, and saint, co-creator of scientific apparatus and knowledge

key_quotes.text: the grandson of this King Koniutsion... had two results of the male sex, twins, the first of whom was named Choon-Kil-Tess and the second Choon-Tro-Pel In the country of Maralpleicie the word 'choon' meant 'prince. '

These two brothers... became, from the very beginning of their responsible age, almost like the three-brained beings everywhere on the planets of our Great Megalocosmos who choose the same aim, that is, those who pursue scientific research
brothers Choon-Kil-Tess and Choon-Tro-Pel on the 'dzendvokh,' that is to say, the middle part of the incomparable experimental apparatus alla-attapan, which they created.

this 'Chinese seven-toned subdivision of the octave of sound'... was... the result of the thorough knowledge of the Law of Heptaparaparshinokh attained by the great twin brothers, unequaled before or since on the Earth

after these two great terrestrial learned beings, Choon-Kil-Tess and Choon-Tro-Pel, were more or less settled in their new place of permanent existence in that still quite young China, they resumed the intentional fulfillment... of being-partkdolgduty in the professional field chosen for their responsible existence, namely, scientific research in the branch called 'medicine. '
according to the indications of the saints Choon-Kil-Tess and Choon-Tro-Pel... they were the first to call 'gaps '

definition: Choon-Tro-Pel was one of two twin brothers, a 'prince' (meaning 'choon' in Maralpleicie) and a direct descendant of a chief member of a great learned society. He was a great terrestrial learned being who, along with his twin, became a saint. He pursued scientific research, particularly in medicine, and settled in China. With his brother, he created the 'dzendvokh' (the middle part of the alla-attapan experimental apparatus), attained a thorough knowledge of the Law of Heptaparaparshinokh, was among the first to identify 'gaps' in the octave of sound, and investigated opium, the 'white ray,' and 'sound,' discovering the seven independent crystallizations of opium.

after these two great terrestrial learned beings, Choon-Kil-Tess and Choon-Tro-Pel, were more or less settled in their new place of permanent existence in that still quite young China, they resumed the intentional fulfillment... of being-partkdolgduty in the professional field chosen for their responsible existence, namely, scientific research in the branch called 'medicine. Later, however, they confined their investigations only to three, namely to 'opium,' to what is called the 'white ray,' and to 'sound. '

definition: Colhidius refers to a sea that is currently known as the Caspian Sea. Beelzebub and his companions once set off from this sea on rafts called 'selchanakhs' to travel up the river Oxoseria (now called the 'Amu Darya').
role: A geographical feature, specifically a sea.

key_quotes.text: From the Colhidius Sea, now the Caspian, we then set off on 'selchanakhs,' that is, on rafts of a special kind, up the river Oxoseria or, as it is now called, the 'Amu Darya.'

definition: The Common Endless Creator, also referred to as 'our Endlessness,' 'Uni-Being Creator,' 'Creator All-Maintainer,' 'Omnipotent Creator,' 'All-Gracious Endless Creator,' 'All-Embracing Uni-Being Creator,' and 'Common Father Creator Endlessness,' is the supreme divine entity. This Creator was compelled to create the entire world, or 'Megalocosmos,' which currently exists. Initially, this Uni-Being Creator, along with His cherubim and seraphim, had His glorious existence on the Most Great and Most Holy Sun Absolute. The Creator established the 'common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process' and fundamental cosmic laws, such as Heptaparaparshinokh and Triamazikamno, to maintain everything that arises and exists in the Universe, ensuring the 'exchange of substances' or 'reciprocal feeding' and preventing the maleficent effect of the 'Heropass' (flow of Time) on the Sun Absolute. The Creator also frequently appears on a holy planet to soothe the unfortunate 'highest being-bodies' who suffer there.
role: The supreme divine entity responsible for the creation and maintenance of the entire Universe.

key_quotes.text: Our Common Father Creator Endlessness appears there so often only because this holy planet is the place of existence of the most unfortunate of 'highest being-bodies' who obtained their coating on various planets of the whole of our Great Universe.

In view of this, our All-Loving, All-Merciful, and Absolutely Just Creator Endlessness, having no other possibility of helping these unfortunate 'highest being-bodies,' often appears there, so that by these appearances of His, He may soothe them, if only a little, in their terrible yet inevitable state of inexpressible anguish.
our Endlessness was forced to create the whole world which exists at the present time
our Uni-Being Creator with His cherubim and seraphim had the place of His Most Glorious Being.
It was just during this period of the flow of time that there appeared to our Creator All-Maintainer the imperative need to create our now-existing 'Megalocosmos,' that is, our 'world.'

This most great common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process was actualized by our Endless Uni-Being when there already existed the Most Great and Most Holy Sun Absolute, on which our All-Gracious Endless Creator had and still has the chief place of His existence.

definition: The term 'Common-Cosmic' describes a fundamental and universal quality or process within the Universe. It is notably used in the phrase 'common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process,' which is the basis upon which everything in the Universe exists and is maintained. This process was actualized by the Endless Uni-Being to facilitate the 'exchange of substances' or 'reciprocal feeding' of all existing things, thereby counteracting the negative effects of 'Heropass' on the Sun Absolute. This process operates according to two fundamental cosmic laws: the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh and the sacred Triamazikamno. Cosmic substances are also transformed to serve the aims of the 'Most Great Common-Cosmic Trogoautoegocrat.'
role: A descriptor indicating universality and fundamental nature within the cosmos, primarily in relation to a cosmic process or entity.

key_quotes.text: everything in the Universe—all that was intentionally created and all that has automatically arisen—exists and is maintained solely on the basis of the 'common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process.'

This most great common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process was actualized by our Endless Uni-Being when there already existed the Most Great and Most Holy Sun Absolute, on which our All-Gracious Endless Creator had and still has the chief place of His existence.

This most great common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process is actualized, always and in everything, on the basis of the two fundamental cosmic laws, the first of which is called 'the fundamental first-order sacred Heptaparaparshinokh,' and the second 'the fundamental first-order sacred Triamazikamno. '
transformation of cosmic substances needed for serving the aims of the Most Great Common-Cosmic Trogoautoegocrat

The planet Deskaldino is situated on a route from the Holy Planet Purgatory, with a solar system called 'Salzmanino' lying between them, which contains cosmic concentrations for the transformation and radiation of the substance 'zilnotrago.'

definition: A 'dglozidzi' is a type of horse found in the region of Transcaucasia. The term is described as being composed of 'Dzi,' meaning horse, and 'dgloz,' which was the name of an Armenian expert skilled in buying and skinning utterly worthless horses. It is used in an analogy to describe contemporary man.

definition: 'Djartklom' is a process that the 'Omnipresent active element' Okidanokh undergoes in the presence of beings. This process occurs independently of contact with emanations from large cosmic concentrations. The factors for 'djartklom' can be either the conscious actualization of 'being-partkdolgduty' by beings or Great Nature's process of 'kerkoolnooarnian actualization' (obtaining required vibrations by adaptation). When Okidanokh undergoes 'djartklom,' its fundamental parts blend with corresponding perceptions in the being, forming 'being-impulsakri' that are concentrated upon the being's brains. This process liberates the three holy forces of the sacred Triamazikamno, which can then be used by three-brained beings for self-perfecting.
role: A cosmic process involving the Omnipresent Okidanokh

key_quotes.text: Well, my boy, the essential peculiarity of the Omnipresent Okidanokh is that, in this case, it undergoes the process of 'djartklom' in the presence of beings independently of any contact with the emanations of a large cosmic concentration;

In both cases when Okidanokh enters the presence of a being and undergoes the process of 'djartklom,' each of its fundamental parts blends with those perceptions present in the being at the moment which correspond to it according to what are called 'kindred vibrations,' and it is then concentrated upon the corresponding localization, that is, upon the corresponding brain. These blendings are called 'being-impulsakri.'

Three-brained beings have the possibility of personal self-perfecting because of the localization in their common presence of three centers, or three brains, upon which, when the Omnipresent Okidanokh undergoes the process of 'djartklom,' the three holy forces of the sacred Triamazikamno are deposited and acquire the possibility of further, this time independent, actualizations.

definition: Djoolfapal is a city, specifically located on the continent of Asia. It was a significant center for the activities of the Very Saintly Ashiata Shiemash, who founded the Heeshtvori Brotherhood there and guided the organization and activities of similar brotherhoods in other Asian countries and towns from Djoolfapal. Monasteries were present in its environs, and its ordinary inhabitants were the focus of preaching about objective truth and the divine impulse of Conscience.
role: A city in Asia, central to Ashiata Shiemash's work

key_quotes.text: So, my boy, owing to everything I have just told you, scarcely three years passed before all the ordinary beings of the city of Djoolfapal and its environs, and even of many countries of the continent of Asia, not only knew that this divine being-impulse of genuine Conscience existed in them and that it could take part in the functioning of their ordinary 'waking consciousness'...

When the common work of the brotherhood founded in the city of Djoolfapal had finally been established, the Very Saintly Ashiata Shiemash began to send the aforementioned 'great initiates' with appropriate instructions to organize similar brotherhoods in other countries and towns of the continent of Asia, while he himself remained in Djoolfapal, and from there he guided the activities of these helpers of his.
They soon found beings corresponding to this aim among the 'monks' dwelling in places called 'monasteries,' of which there were many at that period in the environs of the city of Djoolfapal.
he founded in the city of Djoolfapal, and which was later called the 'Heeshtvori Brotherhood,' a name signifying 'Only he will be called and become the son of God who acquires in himself Conscience.'

definition: Doostzakos (or 'doostzako') is described as one of the seven aspects of a "whole cosmic result." It possesses a "reciprocally acting 'law-conformableness'" and is a component that acts on the corresponding doostzako of another result in the same way it acts within itself, implying an intrinsic and interactive quality among cosmic results.
role: One of seven intrinsic, interacting aspects of a cosmic result

key_quotes.text: functions in that specific 'doostzako' which is one of the seven aspects of this other whole cosmic result.
This means that the 'doostzako' of any one result acts on the corresponding 'doostzako' of another result exactly in the same way as it
all three of these outwardly different and apparently independent transitory results have exactly the same action on each other as they have within themselves

definition: Dramatizacring is an "exceedingly strange 'illness'" to which certain three-brained beings can acquire a predisposition. This predisposition arises at the moment of their appearance "in God's world" due to the "criminal carelessness" of their midwives, who unconsciously utter "maleficent incantation" words. When a being with this predisposition falls ill with dramatizacring, their "play" (likely their ideas or experiences) is then reproduced by actors as ordered by a "producer" or "director."
role: An exceedingly strange illness or a predisposition to it, acquired at birth

key_quotes.text: Further, it usually happens that if the sick being has an uncle who is a member of one or another of their parliaments... a 'producer'—or, as he is sometimes called, an 'angel'—takes his 'play' and orders 'artists' or 'actors' to 'reproduce' it exactly as it was wiseacred by this being who has fallen ill with the strange illness of 'dramatizacring.'

To get a clear picture of what the 'contemporary artists' do in these theaters during all this 'showing off,' you must first be told about an exceedingly strange 'illness,' known there under the name of 'dramatizacring,' the predisposition to which arises in the presence of certain of your favorites thanks simply to the carelessness of what are called their 'midwives.'
And so, my boy, thanks to this criminal carelessness on the part of the midwife, the unfortunate new being acquires in his presence that predisposition to the strange 'illness' I mentioned.
