definition: Dzedzatshoon is explicitly defined as a "beaten dog." It describes the form and outer manifestations that the planetary body of a physician assumes when their inner "being-wish" to help a sufferer is highly intensified by the smell of "English pounds" (money). This manifestation includes a "boot-licking" expression and a tail pressed tightly between their legs.
role: A "beaten dog"; a form and outer manifestation assumed by certain physicians

key_quotes.text: In other words, if the house to which he is called smells of what are known as 'English pounds,' not only does his inner 'being-wish' to help the sufferer increase to the point of what is called 'ne plus ultra,' but his planetary body at once assumes the form and outer manifestations of a 'dzedzatshoon,' that is, a 'beaten dog.'

definition: Dzendvokh is the name given to the "middle part" of the famous experimental apparatus called "alla-attapan." Its principles of construction were used by a genuine learned being named King-Too-Toz to develop a "theory of the evolution and involution of vibrations." The Dzendvokh appears to consist of strings that produce specific "sound vibrations," which have the property that when a specific colored ray passes through them, it takes on another color corresponding to the vibrations produced by the given string.
role: The middle part of the alla-attapan experimental apparatus, used to study and produce vibrations

key_quotes.text: Among these followers, about a century and a half after the sacred rascooarno of the saintly brothers, was a certain genuine learned being by the name of King-Too-Toz who, on the basis of the principles of construction of the middle part of the apparatus alla-attapan, named 'dzendvokh,' propounded a very detailed theory called the 'theory of the evolution and involution of vibrations'...

This famous experimental apparatus, alla-attapan, consisted of three independent parts. ...The front part was called 'loosochepana,' the middle part 'dzendvokh,' and the last, the rear part, was called 'riank-pokhotartz.'

if any specific colored ray passed through a 'wave of sound vibrations' still resounding at that moment from any corresponding string of the dzendvokh, then, in passing through this wave, it took on another color, corresponding to the vibrations produced by the given string.

definition: Eknokh is a substance that, when constantly introduced into an organism, causes the psyche to deteriorate, with its harmful effect intensifying at certain times of the year. This substance is a component in the formation of all living organisms without exception and is present in everything that contributes to their formation, such as the amniotic fluid of pregnant females, milk, eggs, and caviar. It is suggested that a custom of abstaining from products where Eknokh plays a dominant part, at designated times, could bring real benefit.
role: A substance found in living organisms that can harm the psyche if continuously consumed.

key_quotes.text: although people's psyche does indeed deteriorate from the constant introduction into the organism of the substance 'eknokh,' yet it is only at certain times of the year that this substance has a particularly harmful effect.

if there were to be spread among the followers of the teachings of Jesus Christ the custom of abstaining at certain designated times of the year from the use of products in the formation of which the substance 'eknokh' plays a dominant part, such a custom could conceivably be observed and would bring the people a real benefit.

The substance 'eknokh' participates in the formation of all living organisms without exception, wherever they may exist—on the surface of the Earth, within its depths, in the water, in the atmosphere, and so on. This substance is also present in everything contributing to the formation of these organisms, as for example in the amniotic fluid of every species of pregnant female, and in such products as milk, eggs, caviar, and so on.

definition: Elmooarno is a 'sacred process' referred to on Earth as 'conception.' It occurs between beings of different sexes (two on Earth, three on the planet Modiktheo) who have reached responsible age. This process involves the normal utilization of the 'sacred substance exioëhary' and is essential for the 'continuation of their species,' leading to the arising of new beings, such as a 'son' or a 'new three-brained being.' Historically, astrologers on Earth advised conjugal pairs on the appropriate time and form of this sacred process to achieve desired conceptions.
role: A sacred process for conception and the continuation of species.

key_quotes.text: the sacred process of 'elmooarno' between two terrestrial beings of different sex who had just reached responsible age.

when this sacred substance, continuously and inevitably formed in them, is utilized normally for the continuation of their species by means of the sacred process 'elmooarno,' its removal from their presences must be accomplished exclusively with the opposite sex.

definition: Endlessness is the supreme, omnipotent being, referred to as the 'Uni-Being Creator,' 'All-Embracing Uni-Being Creator,' 'Endless Uni-Being,' and 'All-Gracious Endless Creator.' He resides with cherubim and seraphim on the Most Great and Most Holy Sun Absolute. Endlessness was compelled to create the entire existing world, the 'Megalocosmos,' after discovering that the Sun Absolute was diminishing in volume due to 'Heropass,' the flow of Time. He is celebrated as the 'Long-Patient Creator of all that breathes,' the 'Abundantly Loving Cause of all that exists,' the 'Unique Vanquisher of the merciless Heropass,' 'the Beginning of all ends,' and the one who has 'the end of all things within Thyself.' He established the 'common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process' to ensure the reciprocal maintenance of everything existing and is capable of deep thought.
role: The supreme, omnipotent Uni-Being Creator of the Megalocosmos.

our Omnipotent Creator once ascertained that the Sun Absolute, on which He dwelt with His cherubim and seraphim, was almost imperceptibly, yet steadily, diminishing in volume. ...Thereupon our Endlessness grew deeply thoughtful

This process is further explained as 'giving one's word of honor not to poke one's nose into the affairs of the authorities,' serving as a precaution against future undesirable manifestations of Beelzebub's youth and to prevent similar occurrences in the Reason of other individuals.

definition: An Etherogram is a form of inter-planetary communication that connects almost all planets of the Great Universe, originating from an 'etherogram station'. These communications contain 'text' and 'information' such as 'observations and investigations' about distant planets (e.g., the psyche of beings on Earth). They can be received and reproduced, serving to inform beings about events, behaviors, and 'scientific experiments' occurring elsewhere in the cosmos.
role: A cosmic communication or report system that transmits information between planets.

Whenever he received etherograms from me he reproduced their contents on the common planetary 'toolookhtertzinek,' and in this way all those righteous souls dwelling on the holy planet were kept informed of my observations and investigations of that strange psyche of the beings of the planet Earth.

definition: Exioëharies (plural of Exioëhary) refers to multiple instances of a sacred totality of cosmic substances. These substances are formed in three-brained beings, specifically in males and females. In male beings, the 'holy affirming' or 'positive' force of the sacred Triamazikamno participates in its formation, while in female beings, the 'holy denying' or 'negative' force participates. The blending of exioëhary from two distinct sexes during the sacred 'elmooarno' is necessary for the conception and formation of a new being. This substance is also equated with 'sperm' and its production is the 'automatic justification of the sense and aim of the existence of all beings.' Exioëhary can also be a means for beings to perfect themselves, undergoing transformation into new higher substances that require 'conscious labor' and 'intentional suffering' for the 'coating and perfecting of the higher being-bodies'.
role: Sacred cosmic substances formed in male and female three-brained beings, essential for procreation and self-perfection.

key_quotes.text: As regards the possibility of this abnormal blending of two different kinds of exioëhary for the conception and formation of a new planetary body of a being, it is necessary to give you the following explanation:

the fundamental difference between the sacred exioëhary formed in the presences of beings of opposite sexes, that is, in men and women, consists in this, that in the exioëhary formed in the presences of beings of the male sex, the localized 'holy affirming' or 'positive' force of the sacred Triamazikamno participates, while in the exioëhary formed in beings of the female sex there participates the localized 'holy denying' or 'negative' force of the same sacred law.

the blending of the exioëhary formed in two separate beings of distinct, independent sexes during the process of the sacred 'elmooarno' taking place between them brings about the arising of a new being.

In this fragmentary, yet authentic information, it was very convincingly indicated that by means of the substance 'exioëhary,' or 'sperm,' formed in them, it was possible to perfect oneself, but unfortunately for them they found no indications in these surviving fragments of what had to be done and precisely how it was to be done.

transformed into that definite totality of cosmic substances whose production is the automatic justification of the sense and aim of the existence of all beings in general, and in particular of the contemporary three-brained beings breeding on the planet Earth. And everywhere in the Universe this totality of cosmic substances is called 'exioëhary.'

this totality of cosmic substances named 'exioëhary,' resulting from the evolution of the first being-food in these beings-apparatuses, corresponds in its vibrations to the last stopinder of the being-Heptaparaparshinokh ... in order to complete its transformation into new higher substances and acquire vibrations corresponding to the next higher degree of vivifyingness ... it indispensably requires just that outside help which can be obtained in the presence of three-brained beings only through those factors ... which are manifested in 'being-partkdolgduty', in other words, those factors ... which our Common Father Creator Endlessness consented to designate as the means by which certain tetartocosmoses ... could become helpers in the administration of the enlarging world And as for these factors, which are the sole possible means for the assimilation of the cosmic substances required for the coating and perfecting of the higher being-bodies, today we call them 'conscious labor' and 'intentional suffering. definition: Fal-feh-foof is a word in Martian speech that means 'dwelling'. It is used by the chief of the three-brained beings on the planet Mars, the 'toof-nef-tef', when inviting Beelzebub to his house.
role: A Martian word meaning 'dwelling' or 'house'.

key_quotes.text: In Martian speech, my boy, fal-feh-foof means a 'dwelling. '
I would come myself to your house but, as you know, the size of my planetary body does not permit this, and hence I must beg you not to refuse to come to my "fal-feh-foof."

definition: The First Being-Food is the ordinary food and drink consumed by three-brained beings, including those on Earth. It is one part of a threefold being-food, providing substances necessary primarily for the maintenance of their coarse planetary body. Unlike higher being-foods, contemporary beings on Earth primarily know about it, and its consumption has become a vice. Earth beings often consume it after it has been preserved, frozen, or essencified, which severs its connection to Great Nature and causes it to lose essential 'active elements' required for normal existence. The function of its transformation in beings can become disharmonious.
role: Ordinary food and drink consumed by three-brained beings.

key_quotes.text: enter the three-brained beings for further transformation as their 'first being-food,' namely, their ordinary 'food' and 'drink. '

At the present time, your favorites only know about the first being-food, and they know about that simply because, in the first place, willy-nilly, they cannot help knowing about it, and, secondly, their use of it has already become a vice for them...

...this 'first being-food' is composed almost exclusively of substances necessary for the maintenance of the existence of their coarse planetary body, which is a denying source, and that this 'first being-food' can provide almost nothing for the higher parts of their presence.

At the present time, the beings of this group almost never consume for their first being-food any edible product which still retains all those 'active elements' put into it by Great Nature herself, and which are indispensable requisites for the normal existence of all beings, but they 'preserve,' 'freeze,' and 'essencify' beforehand all these products of theirs and only use them when most of the 'active elements' required for normal existence have already been volatilized out of them.

This duration was prolonged until their 'kesdjan body' was completely formed within them and perfected to the necessary level of Reason. This initial state of existence later changed due to abnormal conditions on the planet.
role: The original, prolonged duration of human existence.

key_quotes.text: ...I said that, at the beginning, the duration of existence of these favorites of yours was 'fulasmtamnian,' that is to say, it was prolonged until their 'kesdjan body' was completely coated in them and perfected up to the required gradation of Reason...

definition: The 'Grand Duke' is an expression that acquired a definite meaning in monarchic Russia, referring to a titled personage (like a count, baron, or duke) that members of the Russian ruling class frequently adopted as a persona when visiting the 'capital of the world' (Paris), primarily for swaggering. Their visits to all the dubious places in 'foreign Paris' were so common that professional guides called this circuit the 'Grand Duke's tour.'
role: A titled personage, frequently adopted as a persona by members of the Russian ruling class when abroad, especially for swaggering.

key_quotes.text: this odd expression had acquired a definite meaning there during the time when the now defunct 'monarchic Russia' still flourished.

In that period, it seemed, the beings belonging to the ruling class of the now dead Russia were very fond of the 'capital of the world' and often went there, and almost every one of them, just to swagger, passed himself off as a titled personage such as a 'count,' a 'baron,' or a 'duke,' but most frequently as a 'grand duke '
And, since all of them unfailingly made the rounds of all the dubious places of 'foreign Paris,' this tour was called by the professional guides the 'Grand Duke's tour.'

definition: The 'gynekokhrostinis' are sacred places or institutions reserved exclusively for beings of the female sex. Women were obliged to stay there during certain periods, which contemporary beings call 'menstruation.' During their time in the gynekokhrostinis, women were required to remain in a state of complete passivity, consciously trying not to think about anything and directing their thoughts towards wishing for the well-being of their present or future children. This was done so that the substance issuing through their emanations would serve as the passive part of the sacred law known as the 'Holy Trinity,' for its 'further vivifyingness.' These institutions are contrasted with 'agoorokhrostinis' for males.
role: A sacred place or institution where female beings were obliged to remain during menstruation to achieve a state of passivity and focused well-wishing, serving a cosmic law.

key_quotes.text: In the sacred 'gynekokhrostinis,' reserved for the beings of the female sex, every woman was obliged to remain during certain periods that contemporary beings call 'menstruation. '

Moreover, the women, acknowledging themselves as passive beings, had to be passive during the whole time of their stay there, so that the substance issuing through their emanations should serve as the passive part of that same sacred law for its further vivifyingness.
Hence they passed the whole time in these gynekokhrostinis in a state of complete passivity, trying consciously not to think about anything.

definition: Based on the passages, 'Hamohnadir' appears to be an alternative spelling or a typographical error for 'Hamolinadir,' referring to the same individual. This learned Assyrian three-brained being from Babylon acquired his knowledge in Egypt at the 'School for Materializing Thought.' He was characterized by a stable 'I' and manifested qualities such as 'consciousness of self,' 'impartiality,' 'sincerity,' 'sensitivity,' and 'resourcefulness.' He was deeply agitated and perplexed by contradictory theories concerning the 'beyond.' He was among learned beings tasked to report on various topics and, in his speech on 'the instability of human Reason,' he criticized it, including his own, with great emotion, shouting and even sobbing.
role: A learned Assyrian three-brained being (also referred to as Hamolinadir), known for his stable self, intellectual struggles, and emotional criticism of human Reason.

key_quotes.text: During these meetings between this terrestrial three-brained being, Hamolinadir, and myself, almost the same relations were established as in general prevail between three-brained beings who often meet one another. 'This Hamohnadir' was one of those learned beings in whose common presence the factors for the impulses of a three-brained being, which had passed to him by heredity, were not entirely atrophied, and moreover, it turned out that during his preparatory age the responsible beings around him had prepared him to be more or less normally responsible.

Although this learned Hamolinadir was descended from the race of beings called 'Assyrian,' and his arising and preparation for becoming a responsible being had taken place in that very city of Babylon, his knowledge had been acquired in Egypt, in the highest school of all those existing on the Earth at that time, called the 'School for Materializing Thought.'

My friend Hamolinadir was also very wrought up about this burning question. He was agitated and perplexed by the fact that the numerous theories on this subject, the new as well as the old, were all, in spite of their entirely contradictory proofs, equally plausible and convincing.

definition: Hamolinadir is a learned Assyrian three-brained being from Babylon, whose knowledge was acquired in Egypt at the 'School for Materializing Thought.' When Beelzebub met him, he had attained maximum stability in intelligently directing his 'automatic psychic functioning,' displaying clear being-manifestations such as 'consciousness of self,' 'impartiality,' 'sincerity,' 'sensitivity,' and 'resourcefulness.' He was deeply agitated and perplexed by the fact that numerous contradictory theories regarding the 'beyond' were equally plausible. He reported on the 'instability of human Reason,' explaining its structure and criticizing its fickleness, even his own Reason, with escalating emotion, shouting and sobbing. He was brought to Babylon under compulsion from Egypt and was prepared to be normally responsible.
role: A learned Assyrian three-brained being, deeply concerned with the instability of human Reason and the nature of the 'beyond,' who demonstrated a high degree of being-manifestations.

key_quotes.text: Among the learned beings whom I often met for the sake of my aim was a certain Hamolinadir, who had been brought there under compulsion from Egypt.

definition: Hanbledzoin is a cosmic substance that constitutes the 'blood' of a being's 'kesdjan body.' It functions to nourish and perfect the kesdjan body, similar to how ordinary blood serves the planetary body. The substances composing hanbledzoin are derived from the transformation of elements from other planets and the sun itself within the system where a three-brained being originates and exists. It is linked to what contemporary civilization almost understood as 'animal magnetism.' Beelzebub utilized his own hanbledzoin to induce a 'hypnotic state' in beings, but found that its expenditure was harmful to his own being-existence, leading him to devise an alternative method. This substance possesses two special properties: a separated part forms a 'threadlike connection' to its principal concentration, and any reintroduced part blends uniformly throughout the original concentration. Its infusion ('vallikrin' process) into a planetary body requires a prior connection with the kesdjan body for proper functioning.
role: A cosmic substance, the 'blood' of the kesdjan body, essential for its nourishment and perfection, capable of inducing special psychic states, and possessing unique properties for connection and blending.

key_quotes.text: Now, my boy, I find it necessary for the given case and also perhaps for my further explanations to inform you in more detail about the cosmic substance called 'being-hanbledzoin.'

'Hanbledzoin' is nothing else than the 'blood' of the 'kesdjan body' of the being, and just as the sum total of cosmic substances called 'blood' serves for the nourishment and renewal of the planetary body of the being, so in the same way 'hanbledzoin' serves for nourishing and perfecting the kesdjan body.

But the substances designed for serving the kesdjan body of the being, which in their totality are called 'hanbledzoin,' are obtained from the transformation of elements of other planets and of the sun itself of that system where this three-brained being has the place of his arising and existence.

To bring them into this state, I had recourse at first to the same means used by the beings of the Tikliamishian civilization for this purpose, that is to say, I acted upon them with my own 'hanbledzoin.'

But later, as the being-impulse called 'love of kind' frequently arose in my common presence, I had to produce this state in a great many three-brained beings there not only for my personal aims but for their benefit as well, and since this proved to be very harmful for my being-existence, I invented another means by which I obtained the same effect without the expenditure of my own 'hanbledzoin. '

In order to understand the essence of this preparation for the sacred process of the 'sacrament of almtznoshinoo,' you need to know about two special properties of the 'being-hanbledzoin,' that is, the 'blood' of the kesdjan body.

definition: Hanbledzoïn is an alternative spelling of 'Hanbledzoin' (with a diacritical mark), referring to the same cosmic substance. It is defined as the 'blood' of a being's 'kesdjan body,' crucial for its nourishment and perfection. This substance is formed from transformed elements of other planets and the sun of the system where a three-brained being originates. It was used by Beelzebub and others to induce special psychic states, such as the 'hypnotic state,' although its use was harmful to Beelzebub's being-existence. It possesses two specific properties: a separated part maintains a 'threadlike connection' to its main concentration, and any reintroduced part blends uniformly. Its infusion into a planetary body, as part of the 'vallikrin' process, requires a prior established connection with the kesdjan body for the desired effect.
role: A cosmic substance (also spelled Hanbledzoin), described as the 'blood' of the kesdjan body, vital for its nourishment and perfection, with the capacity to influence psychic states and possessing distinct physical properties.

key_quotes.text: the infusion of their own hanbledzoïn into his body
But because a connection with his kesdjan body had not been established beforehand, their hanbledzoïn did not accomplish what was expected but only accumulated chaotically over his planetary body

definition: The 'harakhrakhrookhry' is the name given on the planet Saturn to the sole chief of all the three-centered beings existing on that planet. This role is equivalent to a 'king' on Earth and other planets, though Earth is noted for having multiple 'kings' for separate groups. Beelzebub met the harakhrakhrookhry on Saturn and was invited to stay in his 'harkhookhry,' meaning his palace. This particular harakhrakhrookhry was among the beings who had undergone the sacred process of 'vznooshlitzval' regarding Beelzebub, which instilled an impulse of 'trusting another as oneself.' He also had a learned subject named Harharkh who invented a special apparatus.
role: The sole chief or 'king' of all three-centered beings on the planet Saturn, who exhibited trust in Beelzebub and hosted him.

key_quotes.text: On the planet Saturn 'harakhrakhrookhry' is the name given to the sole chief of all the other beings on that planet.

one of the beings who had undergone the sacred action of 'vznooshlitzval' in regard to my person was what is called there the 'harakhrakhrookhry' of all the three-centered beings arising and existing on that planet.

on the day after my arrival I had occasion to have a meeting with the harakhrakhrookhry himself In the course of our exchange of subjective opinions he invited me to stay in his own 'harkhookhry,' that is, his palace, for the whole of my sojourn on his planet.

The venerable harakhrakhrookhry of the planet Saturn mentioned that one of his learned subjects by the name of Harharkh, in order to study certain previously unexplained properties of that cosmic substance, had recently devised an exceedingly interesting apparatus, the chief demonstrating part of which he called 'hrakhartzakha.'

definition: Gornahoor Harharkh is a three-centered being from the planet Saturn, described as one of the foremost scientists among the ordinary three-centered beings of that planet. He became Beelzebub's essence-friend. Harharkh devised an exceedingly interesting apparatus called 'hrakhartzakha' to study the properties of the cosmic substance Omnipresent Okidanokh, inventing special materials for its construction. His workshop, referred to as an enormous 'khrkh,' also contained other large apparatuses, including 'life-chakhans' (or 'khrikhirkhis,' likened to terrestrial dynamos) and a 'solookhnorakhoona' (a complex pump for creating an absolute vacuum). He is the 'producer' of Gornahoor Raoorkh, his first heir, for whom Beelzebub took on an 'alnatoorornian being-duty' during a sacred ceremony called 'khri-khra-khri' (similar to Earth's 'baptism'). Harharkh was kept informed of Beelzebub's observations and received copies of his notes. During one experiment, he made a mistake with levers and switches, causing him to experience a forceful physical reaction.
role: A scientist, inventor, and three-centered being from the planet Saturn; Beelzebub's essence-friend and father of Raoorkh.

key_quotes.text: The venerable harakhrakhrookhry of the planet Saturn mentioned that one of his learned subjects by the name of Harharkh, in order to study certain previously unexplained properties of that cosmic substance, had recently devised an exceedingly interesting apparatus, the chief demonstrating part of which he called 'hrakhartzakha.'

Gornahoor Harharkh, who afterward, as I have already told you, became my essence-friend, was then considered one of the foremost scientists among the ordinary three-centered beings of the planet Saturn.
all the objects contained in this 'hrakhartzakha,' as well as everything we were to put on later, were made of special materials invented by Gornahoor Harharkh
This first heir of Gornahoor Harharkh was then named Raoorkh.
Gornahoor Harharkh was always kept informed of my observations on their strange psyche, and that I even sent him, as well as your uncle Tooilan, copies of certain of my notes.

definition: Harnel-miatznel is a process of 'local character' that cooperates in the gradual evolution of the active elements forming the 'second being-food' (or 'air') after they enter the presence of beings through the nose. This process transforms these elements in the 'lungs' into 'astralnomian-protoëhary'. Furthermore, the 'astralnomian-protoëhary' itself can evolve from its centers of gravity solely by the process of harnel-miatznel, mixing with other evolved substances of the first being-food to help them transmute into 'being-tetartoëhary,' while the 'astralnomian-protoëhary' is transmuted into 'astralnomian-deuteroëhary'.
role: A cosmic process of local character involved in the transformation and evolution of substances related to being-food within organisms.

key_quotes.text: The active elements that compose this 'second being-food,' or 'air,' enter the presence of beings through the nose and, gradually evolving with the cooperation of various processes of harnel-miatznel of local character, are transformed in what are called the 'lungs' into 'protoëhary,' but this time into 'astralnomian-protoëhary. '

And then the substances of this 'astralnomian-protoëhary,' entering into the presence of beings for their own evolution and still having in themselves, according to the Sacred Heptaparaparshinokh, all the possibilities of evolving from their centers of gravity by the process of harnel-miatznel alone, mix with the totality of substances of the first being-food which have already evolved up to the third stopinder of the sacred being-Heptaparaparshinokh, and further evolve together, and thus help these substances of the first being-food to pass through the lower 'mechano-coinciding mdnel-in' and to be transmuted into other definite substances, named 'being-tetartoëhary,' while the 'astralnomian-protoëhary' itself is transmuted into the substances named 'astralnomian-deuteroëhary. '

definition: In its widest sense, 'hasnamuss' designates any three-brained being whose common presence, under the influence of certain 'individual impulses,' develops a 'something' that participates in the 'completed formation' of their independent individuality. This 'something' blends with crystallizations resulting from the action of 'naloo-ossnian impulses' during substance transformation. The existence of this 'something' in a being's presence leads to 'retributive consequences' and a 'suffering existence' for high orders of hasnamuss individuals. The term also refers to a 'future Universal Hasnamuss' (Lentrohamsanin) and 'candidates for hasnamuss individuals,' implying it can be a state or a designation for a type of being.
role: A designation for a three-brained being in whom a specific negative 'something' has arisen, affecting their individuality and leading to suffering or retributive consequences.

key_quotes.text: it will be opportune to explain a little more in detail, as I promised you, the significance of the word 'hasnamuss.'

In its widest sense the word 'hasnamuss' designates any three-brained being—whether he has already coated his highest being-parts or consists of his planetary body alone —in whose common presence, under the influence of certain 'individual impulses,' a certain 'something' arises which participates in the 'completed formation' of his independent individuality.

This 'something' arises in these cosmic individuals and, during the process of the transformation of substances, blends with the crystallizations resulting from the action of the entire 'spectrum' of what are called 'naloo-ossnian impulses. '
The inscription of this future Universal Hasnamuss went on as follows:

As a place for the suffering existence of the high orders of hasnamuss individuals, the Higher Sacred Individuals have intentionally allotted from all the large cosmic concentrations four small planets, disharmonized in their subjective functioning and situated in various most remote corners of our Great Universe.

definition: A 'Hasnamuss Individual' is a three-brained being characterized by the presence of a specific 'something' in their common presence, which participates in the formation of their independent individuality. The text describes four kinds of Hasnamuss Individuals: 1. A three-brained being consisting only of their planetary body, who is destroyed forever during the sacred rascooarno due to this 'something.' 2. A three-brained being with a 'kesdjan body' coated with this 'something,' acquiring 'nondecomposition' (toorinoorino) on their planet of origin and existing with transformations until the 'something' is eliminated. 3. A three-brained being with a 'highest being-body' or 'soul' coated with this 'something,' which also acquires 'nondecomposition' throughout the Great Universe. This individual has the possibility of being 'cleansed' from the 'something' through conscious labor and intentional suffering, being held responsible for subjective manifestations and suffering unremittingly until the 'something' is eradicated. 4. An 'Eternal Hasnamuss Individual,' similar to the third kind, but for whom the possibility of eliminating the 'something' is lost forever. Lentrohamsanin is presented as a typical representative of 'Eternal Hasnamuss Individuals.' These individuals with this 'something' face 'retributive consequences' and specific types of suffering.
role: A category of three-brained beings distinguished by the presence of a negative 'something' in their individuality, leading to specific fates and suffering, with four distinct kinds identified.

key_quotes.text: The first kind of hasnamuss individual is a three-brained being who, while acquiring this 'something' in his common presence, still consists only of his planetary body and who, during the process of the sacred rascooarno is subject to the consequences of the properties of this 'something' in him and is thus destroyed forever such as he is.

A hasnamuss individual of the third kind is a three-brained being in whose common presence the highest being-body, or 'soul,' has been coated, again with the participation of this 'something', and this highest being-body also acquires the property of toorinoorino, but this time corresponding to this highest coating, that is to say, it is not subject to decomposition, either in the spheres of that planet on which he arose, or in any other sphere of the Great Universe.

The fourth kind of hasnamuss individual is like the third, but with this difference, that the hasnamuss of the third kind has the possibility of at some time becoming so to say 'cleansed' from this 'something,' whereas for the fourth kind this possibility is lost forever "That is why the fourth kind of hasnamuss is called an 'Eternal Hasnamuss Individual.'"

And as for a hasnamuss individual of the third kind, namely, a three-brained being in whom the highest being-body has been coated, but with this 'something' participating to the extent that he has not lost forever the possibility of freeing himself from it, his fate is still more terrible

after my tale about this Lentrohamsanin—thanks to which you have received a concrete picture of the consequences for later generations of the activities of a typical representative of Eternal Hasnamuss Individuals

definition: 'Hasnamuss Individuals' refers to a group of three-brained beings in whose common presence a specific 'something' has arisen, affecting their independent individuality. They are subject to 'retributive consequences' and a 'suffering existence,' for which the Higher Sacred Individuals have allotted four small, disharmonized planets in remote corners of the Great Universe. Lentrohamsanin is cited as a 'typical representative of Eternal Hasnamuss Individuals,' a specific type among them. Some of these individuals possess 'hasnamussian properties' that radiate a 'maleficent influence,' which other beings instinctively sense as undesirable. There are also 'candidates for hasnamuss individuals,' indicating that one can develop into this state.
role: A collective term for three-brained beings who possess a detrimental 'something' in their individuality, resulting in suffering, retributive consequences, and the emanation of a maleficent influence.

key_quotes.text: after my tale about this Lentrohamsanin—thanks to which you have received a concrete picture of the consequences for later generations of the activities of a typical representative of Eternal Hasnamuss Individuals

As a place for the suffering existence of the high orders of hasnamuss individuals, the Higher Sacred Individuals have intentionally allotted from all the large cosmic concentrations four small planets, disharmonized in their subjective functioning and situated in various most remote corners of our Great Universe.

on the one hand, data for 'hasnamussian properties' did not always become completely crystallized in the presence of every one of them, and on the other hand, the other beings instinctively sensed the maleficent influence radiating from these professionals and hence were on their guard and took great care to behave toward them in a corresponding manner.

"That is why the fourth kind of hasnamuss is called an 'Eternal Hasnamuss Individual.'

As a place for the suffering existence of the high orders of hasnamuss individuals, the Higher Sacred Individuals have intentionally allotted from all the large cosmic concentrations four small planets, disharmonized in their subjective functioning and situated in various most remote corners of our Great Universe.

which was invented, as I already told you, by the present and future hasnamusses gathered in their capital from various countries, and which now enslave the ordinary beings of France even more than the beings of all other communities.

definition: The term 'Hasnamussian' is an adjective used to describe properties or psychic functioning that are characteristic of a 'hasnamuss'. These 'hasnamussian properties' may or may not become completely crystallized in certain three-brained beings, such as contemporary artists or actors. When present, they are associated with a 'maleficent influence' or 'noxious effect' radiating from these professionals.
role: An adjective describing properties or psychic functioning peculiar to a hasnamuss.

key_quotes.text: on the one hand, data for 'hasnamussian properties' did not always become completely crystallized in the presence of every one of them, and on the other hand, the other beings instinctively sensed the maleficent influence radiating from these professionals and hence were on their guard and took great care to behave toward them in a corresponding manner.

definition: Hassein is Beelzebub's grandson. He travels with Beelzebub, receiving education and explanations from him, particularly during a period when his 'Reason' needs to be developed. He is described as eagerly absorbing everything Beelzebub says or teaches, and is deeply affectionate and respectful towards his grandfather, whom he later refers to as a 'Sacred Podkoolad of our Great Megalocosmos'. Hassein also experiences an impulse of love for Ahoon and the three-brained beings of Earth, feeling they helped him become worthy of witnessing Beelzebub's glorification.
role: Beelzebub's grandson and pupil.

key_quotes.text: And as the moment happened to coincide with the time when the Reason of young Hassein needed to be developed, Beelzebub, now having a good deal of free time, took charge of the education of his grandson himself, and from then on kept Hassein with him wherever he went.
For his part, Hassein so loved his grandfather that he would not stir a step without him, and eagerly absorbed everything he said or taught.

Having said this, Ahoon was about to look expectantly at the face of Beelzebub with his usual unblinking gaze, but noticing the familiar smile, always sorrowful yet kind and indulgent, he turned in some confusion toward Hassein and, without waiting for permission, spoke as follows: 
"Who knows? Maybe, dear Hassein, you too will one day visit that planet Earth and have to exist among those peculiar three-brained beings who have taken your fancy. "

Tell me, tell me, dear beloved Grandfather!" cried Hassein eagerly. Then, with reverence, he lifted his arms and said with great sincerity. 
"May my dear and kind grandfather become worthy of perfecting himself to the degree of Reason of the sacred Anklad!"

During this scene, Hassein stood apart in the posture known everywhere as the "posture of the famous universal hermit, Harnatoolkpararana of the planet Kirmankshana. " 
And a little later, when Beelzebub glanced around and noticed his grandson in this posture, he turned to him and said: 
"What, my boy! Can it be that the same thing is proceeding in your presence as in our old Ahoon's?" 
To this question of Beelzebub, Hassein, in an uncertain tone unusual for him, replied timidly: 
"Yes . . . almost . . . Sacred Podkoolad of our Great Megalocosmos Only with this difference, that at this moment the impulse of love both for our Ahoon and for the three-brained beings of the planet Earth is functioning still more strongly in me. 
"This impulse of love is growing stronger in me because, it seems to me, both Ahoon and the three-brained beings of the planet Earth have greatly helped me to become worthy of being an eyewitness of the glorification of him who is the cause of the cause of my arising and who until now I have called 'my dear grandfather,' but who has now become,

definition: Havatviernoni is a term explicitly defined as 'religion'. It refers to a belief system or 'religious teaching' that can be peculiar and independent. The text mentions that some havatviernonis are invented by three-brained beings with 'hasnamuss' psychic functioning, while others are founded upon detailed instructions from 'genuine Messengers from Above'.
role: A term for 'religion' or religious teaching.

key_quotes.text: I at once decided how to act through this peculiar havatviernoni, or religion, of theirs.

I decided to attain my aim as before by means of the 'havatviernoni' existing there, that is, through their 'religion ' But it turned out that at that time the beings of this third group of the continent of Ashhark had several peculiar 'havatviernonis,' or 'religions,' each based upon a quite independent 'religious teaching' having nothing in common with the others.
ever since the custom arose of having independent 'havatviernonis' or 'religions,' there have existed and still exist among your favorites two basic kinds of 'religious teachings. '

definition: Heeshtvori is the name of a Brotherhood, or many almost independently functioning branches of a Brotherhood, founded on the continent of Asia during the time of the prophet Ashiata Shiemash. Initiates and priests of the Heeshtvori Brotherhood guide beings to strive and work upon themselves to transfer the results of data present in their subconscious for genuine Conscience into their ordinary waking consciousness. Many beings wished and strove to become priests of this Brotherhood.
role: A Brotherhood and its priesthood dedicated to spiritual self-work for integrating genuine Conscience.

definition: Heptaparaparshinokh is a primordial and fundamental sacred cosmic law. It governs processes in cosmic concentrations, from the greatest to the smallest, and is responsible for aspects of 'world-creation' and 'world-existence'. Its functioning involves 'stopinders' and 'vibrations', where results can be internal, external, or divided depending on the presence of extraneous vibrations. It has 'particularities' crucial for understanding other cosmic laws. This law is also responsible for the 'completing process for the continuation of the species' for three-brained beings, which can occur through two or even three individuals depending on the planet. It is involved in the transformation of cosmic substances required for the 'common-cosmic Trogoautoegocrat'. The formation of 'third-order suns' or 'planets' is part of its 'first outer cycle', and it has a 'fifth deflection' called 'harnel-aoot'. Processes of 'evolution' and 'involution' are inherent in it. On Earth, the understanding of this law is connected to the 'law of vibrations' and the 'division into seven tones of the octave of sound'.
role: A fundamental sacred cosmic law governing creation, existence, species continuation, and transformations of cosmic substances.

key_quotes.text: Thus from that time on, the actualization of the primordial sacred law of Heptaparaparshinokh began to proceed in the greatest as well as the smallest cosmic concentrations with the subjective action of its stopinders changed in this way.

I repeat, my boy, try very hard to understand everything relating to both these fundamental cosmic laws, since knowledge of these two sacred laws, especially knowledge of the particularities of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh, will help you later to understand very well and easily all the second-order and third-order laws of 'world-creation' and 'world-existence.'

Thanks to this, the completing process of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh for the continuation of the species is carried out not through one being, as with the tetartocosmoses, but through two beings of different sexes, called by us 'actavas' and 'passavas,' and on the planet Earth, 'man' and 'woman.'

The transformation through them of the cosmic substances required for the common-cosmic Trogoautoegocrat, according to the sacred law of Heptaparaparshinokh, proceeds on the same principles on which it does in our common presence and in the presence of your favorites breeding on the planet Earth.

At this stage in the process of the first outer cycle of the fundamental sacred Heptaparaparshinokh, that is, after the formation of the third-order suns or 'planets,' owing to the changed fifth deflection of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh—which, as I have already said, is called 'harnel-aoot'— just here, the initial impulse given for the completing process, having lost half the force of its vivifyingness, manifested only half of its action outside itself, keeping the other half for itself—that is, for its own functioning—in consequence of which, on these last big results called 'third-order suns' or 'planets,' there began to arise what are called 'similarities to the already arisen.'

This last particularity of the sacred Law of Heptaparaparshinokh can be demonstrated with absolute certainty by this means, that is to say, on the piano, because if the vibrations of the tones 'mi' and 'si' are produced in a hermetically sealed room, they either instantaneously cease or, thanks to the momentum obtained from the shock which engendered their arising, they undergo involution, in short, the tone 'mi' returns to the tone 'do' and the tone 'si' to the lower 'fa.'

definition: Heropass is explicitly equated with 'Time' and is referred to as 'the Most Great Heropass'. It is described as a merciless but just cosmic force or principle that has lawful commands. Its action can diminish the volume of the Sun Absolute, threatening its complete destruction, which compelled Endlessness to create the Megalocosmos to achieve immunity from its 'maleficent action'. It governs the duration of existence for beings and can compel the actualization of 'an obvious absurdity' for three-brained beings on Earth.
role: A merciless yet just cosmic force, synonymous with Time, that governs existence and has the power to compel cosmic events.

key_quotes.text: in His divine deliberations He had become clearly aware that if the action of the Heropass should continue to diminish the volume of the Sun Absolute, it would sooner or later bring about the complete destruction of this sole place of His Being.

And in view of this, our Endlessness was compelled to take certain corresponding measures, so that this merciless Heropass could not bring about the eventual destruction of our Most Most Holy Sun Absolute.
even the Most Great Heropass, that is, Time, has been compelled to actualize an obvious absurdity in the presence of those unfortunate three-brained beings who arise and exist on the planet Earth?
In any case, thanks to all I have explained to you, you will be able to put yourself in the position and understand the although merciless yet always, and in everything, just Heropass.

definition: Hertoonano was a great and famous individual, known all over the Earth, and considered the highest authority on the laws of the inner organization of man and the science called 'alchemy'. He was a representative of all the followers of the teaching of Jesus Christ who were settled on the shores of the Red Sea. He engaged in a famous debate at the Council of Kelnuan with the Greek philosopher Veggendiadi, concerning the necessity of abstaining from consuming certain edible products, specifically animal flesh.
role: A famous ancient authority on human inner organization and alchemy, and a representative of Jesus Christ's followers.

key_quotes.text: The initial cause of the institution of fasting was the debate that took place at the Council of Kelnuan between two famous learned men, namely, the great Hertoonano and the illustrious Greek philosopher, Veggendiadi.

The great Hertoonano was the representative of all the followers of the teaching of Jesus Christ who were settled on the shores of the Red Sea, while the philosopher Veggendiadi was the representative of all the followers of that teaching in Greece.

He was considered the highest authority on the laws of the inner organization of man, and also an authority on the science then called 'alchemy'—not of course that science of which contemporary people have a notion and designate by the same name.

definition: The Holy Affirming is identified as the first factor in the formation of the 'Reason of understanding', which is one of two kinds of being-Reason in three-brained beings. It consists of the newly perceived impressions that are gathered in whichever of a being's localizations (brains) is the 'center of gravity of functioning' at a given moment. It acts as the first of the three independent holy forces of the 'sacred Triamazikamno' in this context.
role: The first factor (or force) in the formation of the 'Reason of understanding', comprising newly perceived impressions.

key_quotes.text: And in the 'Reason of understanding,' the first factor, that is, the Holy Affirming, consists of the newly perceived impressions in whatever localization is, at the given moment, the 'center of gravity of functioning', the second, or Holy Denying, consists of the corresponding data already present in another of the localizations, and the third factor consists of what are known as the 'being-autokolitzikners' or, as they are otherwise called, 'hoodatzbabognari,' which is a word that means 'the results of perseveringly actualizing the striving to manifest one's own individuality.'

It is these 'autokolitzikners' in the common presence of three-brained beings, serving as the 'third holy force' of the sacred Triamazikamno, which actualize the arising of the 'Reason of understanding.'

definition: Iranan was an ancient name for a distant continent, where groups of pirmaral hunters from Atlantis settled. This continent later underwent significant changes due to various disturbances during the second terrestrial catastrophe, with parts entering the planet and other land masses emerging. It was subsequently called 'Ashhark' and is known today as 'Asia.' The shores of the 'Sea of Beneficence' on Iranan were described as marvelous, rich, and fertile, abundant with 'pirmarals' and fruit trees that served as a primary food source. A learned member of the Akhldanns society chose Iranan for his observations and settled there, eventually founding the second group of Asiatic beings.
role: An ancient continent, later called Ashhark and then Asia, where hunters from Atlantis settled and where the second group of Asiatic beings originated.

key_quotes.text: One day several of these families banded together and set off to hunt pirmarals on a distant continent then called 'Iranan,' which later, after the upheavals caused by the second catastrophe, was called the continent of 'Ashhark,' and today is known by your favorites as 'Asia.'

because of various disturbances during the second terrestrial catastrophe, certain parts of the continent of Iranan entered within the planet, while in their place other land masses emerged and attached themselves to it, with the result that this continent was considerably changed, becoming almost as large as the continent of Atlantis before the catastrophe.

One of these members, the important being I just mentioned, chose the continent of Iranan for his ob-servations and, having migrated there with his servants, settled on the shores of that water space later called the 'Sea of Beneficence.'

definition: Itoklanotz is a cosmic principle. Great Nature was compelled to adapt the duration of existence of three-brained beings on the planet Earth to this principle due to their abnormal existence, which prevented them from actualizing the 'being-partkdolgduty' and failing to produce the necessary quality of radiations for the common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process. This principle generally determines the duration of existence of one-brained and two-brained beings, as they lack the possibilities of three-brained beings. When three-brained beings exist according to this principle, the duration of their being-existence and the content of their common presence depend on seven external environmental factors. Furthermore, if beings existing by this principle manifest under the direction of only one or two of their spiritualized sources, rather than harmoniously with all three, their 'bobbinkandelnosts' (which are like springs or regulators in their brains) are prematurely exhausted, leading to their cessation of action or death.
role: A cosmic principle governing the duration of existence for certain beings.

key_quotes.text: Nature herself was compelled to adapt the presence of the three-brained beings gradually to conform to the second principle, called 'itoklanotz,' that is, to actualize them in the same way as one-brained and two-brained beings.
As regards the meaning of the principle of 'itoklanotz,' I shall also specially explain it to you sometime.

Sometime later, I shall explain to you why it is that when beings who exist according to the principle of itoklanotz manifest under the direction of only one or two of their spiritualized sources, and not harmoniously with all three combined and in agreement, the particular brain in which there has been an excess of associations is prematurely used up and consequently dies, and I shall also explain why, owing to this, the other bobbinkandelnosts are likewise used up, even though they had no part in it.

Great Nature, in order to restore the 'equilibrium of vibrations,' was compelled gradually to adapt the duration of their existence to the principle called 'itoklanotz,' which in general determines the duration of existence of one-brained and two-brained beings that have not the same possibilities as three-brained beings, and are therefore incapable of actualizing in their presence the partkdolgduty foreseen by Nature.

According to this principle, the duration of their being-existence and also the entire content of their common presence generally depend upon the results arising from the following seven factors in their surroundings:

definition: Kafirian refers to a type of three-brained being, or potentially a nationality or group designation, from ancient times on the planet Earth. Beelzebub noted that a stout gentleman dressed in a 'Kafirian' costume would resemble a type of being he observed in a 'kaltaan' (restaurant-like establishment) in the city of Koorkalai. Kafirians are also mentioned alongside other groups like Asklays, Veroonkietzes, and Klians as the inhabitants of the majestic city of Babylon, implying these are categories of people whose 'clothing and the names of their nationalities have changed' over time.
role: A type of three-brained being or a nationality from ancient times.

definition: Kalkali, specifically referred to as 'being-kalkali,' are defined as 'essential strivings.' These strivings manifested in the psyche of ordinary three-brained beings in the form of certain definite new teachings, such as 'anoklinism,' 'Darwinism,' 'Anthroposophism,' and 'Theosophism,' among others ending in '-ism.' These forms of kalkali are described as pernicious, leading to the disappearance of fundamental being-impulses like 'patriarchality' and 'religious feeling,' and further deranging the abnormal functioning of the psyche in many beings.
role: Essential strivings or new, detrimental teachings that affect the psyche of beings.

key_quotes.text: Beelzebub, Hassein, and Ahoon, the devoted old servant who always accompanied Beelzebub everywhere, were sitting on the highest 'kasnik,' or upper deck, of the Karnak under the 'kalnokranonis,' a sort of glass bell, talking among themselves while observing the boundless space.

definition: Kaltaan (or kaltaani, plural) refers to establishments found in ancient cities on the planet Earth, such as Koorkalai. These places were later called 'chaikhanas,' 'ashkhanas,' 'caravanserais' on the continent of Ashhark, and in contemporary Europe, they are known as 'cafés,' 'restaurants,' 'clubs,' 'dance halls,' and 'meeting places.' They served as important locations for observing and studying the psyche of the beings of a country.
role: A type of public establishment or gathering place.

key_quotes.text: As soon as we were settled in the city of Koorkalai I began visiting the 'kaltaani' there, that is, those establishments which were later called on the continent of Ashhark 'chaikhanas,' 'ashkhanas,' 'caravanserais,' and so on, and which contemporary beings on that planet, especially those breeding on the continent of 'Europe,' call 'cafés,' 'restaurants,' 'clubs,' 'dance halls,' 'meeting places,' and so on.
In those days, too, I used to sit among them in their 'kaltaani,' which were like contemporary restaurants
as usual, visiting the 'kaltaani,' by this time known as 'chaikhanas.'

definition: A kashireitleer is a unique, famous, and unprecedented document or creation, inscribed by Lentrohamsanin with his own hand. It served as a means by which his 'maleficent invention' or 'wiseacrings' were transmitted to learned beings.
role: A document or creation by Lentrohamsanin, used to convey his ideas.

key_quotes.text: Thus ended that famous kashireitleer.

When this future Universal Hasnamuss, Lentrohamsanin, had finished inscribing his wiseacrings on this unprecedented kashireitleer, he arranged an enormous and costly banquet... and at the end of the feast he showed them his kashireitleer.

This maleficent 'invention' of that learned being of a former period reached the learned beings of the Babylonian epoch by means of what is called a 'kashireitleer,' inscribed by Lentrohamsanin with his own hand.

definition: A kasnik is the highest part of the space ship Karnak, also referred to as the 'upper deck.' Beelzebub, Hassein, and Ahoon sit on the highest kasnik, under a 'kalnokranonis' (a sort of glass bell), for conversations and observing space.
role: The upper deck of the space ship Karnak.

key_quotes.text: As this narrative begins, Beelzebub, Hassein, and Ahoon, the devoted old servant who always accompanied Beelzebub everywhere, were sitting on the highest "kasnik," or upper deck, of the Karnak under the "kalnokranonis," a sort of glass bell, talking among themselves while observing the boundless space.

definition: Keeziak is a type of fuel used by Kolenian gypsies, primarily for burning in 'tandoors' (special earthen pits). It is composed of the dung of quadruped animals and burns slowly, allowing its embers to keep a fire burning for a very long time.
role: A fuel source.

key_quotes.text: In these tandoors they burn chiefly what is called 'keeziak'—a fuel composed of the dung of quadruped animals.
It is almost always hot in the tandoor because the dung burns very slowly and the embers from the keeziak keep the fire burning for a very long time.

definition: A kelleh-e-ofoo is a written text, specifically an invitation or message, that contains a main body and a postscript. One example is an invitation sent by an honorable 'toof-nef-tef' from the planet Mars to Beelzebub, requesting a visit for a final blessing and to convey gratitude.
role: A written message or invitation.

key_quotes.text: The text of this kelleh-e-ofoo was as follows:
At the end of this kelleh-e-ofoo was the postscript.
And so, my boy, when I received this invitation from the honorable toof-nef-tef, I of course decided to go to him without delay.

definition: Kelnuan is the name of a Council whose members laid down rules and made decisions. Specifically, the members of the Council of Kelnuan established the custom of fasting for followers of Jesus Christ, deciding they should abstain from certain edible products on particular days, especially during times when a substance called 'eknokh' was most harmful. A debate between Hertoonano and Veggendiadi at this Council was the initial cause for the institution of fasting.
role: A Council that established religious customs, particularly fasting.

key_quotes.text: And so it came about that during that Council of Kelnuan, its members first laid down the rule that the followers of the teaching of Jesus Christ should abstain on certain days from consuming certain edible products.

The initial cause of the institution of fasting was the debate that took place at the Council of Kelnuan between two famous learned men, namely, the great Hertoonano and the illustrious Greek philosopher, Veggendiadi.

definition: A 'higher being-body' in beings, distinct from the 'planetary body'. It is formed and perfected by substances absorbed through 'breathing' and 'pores of the skin'. It has its own 'blood' called 'being-hanbledzoin', which has special properties, including the ability to form a 'threadlike connection' if separated. After the planetary body ceases to exist, the kesdjan body separates and rises to a specific cosmic sphere based on its mass and the 'law of gravity'. Under certain conditions and with a definite degree of Reason, it can be intentionally 'materialized' or 'coated' through a sacred process called 'almtznoshinoo' to temporarily manifest functions of its former planetary body. It can also undergo 'rapid disintegration' or 'substitution of a new kesdjan body for the old one' after the 'sacred rascooarno'. Communication with a kesdjan body can be maintained if it is consciously fed with 'aiëssakhladonn'.
role: A higher being-body in multi-centered beings

key_quotes.text: But the substances needed both for coating and for perfecting the 'higher being-body,' that is, the 'kesdjan body,' enter into their common presence through their 'breathing,' and through certain what are called 'pores' of the skin.

The sacred 'almtznoshinoo' is the process by means of which certain three-centered beings, who have been able to attain the coating of their own kesdjan bodies up to completed functioning and to a definite degree of Reason, intentionally bring about the coating or, as is otherwise said, the 'materialization' of the 'kesdjan body' of a being whose planetary body has ceased to exist, up to such a density that this second body regains for a limited time the possibility of manifesting through certain functions proper to its former planetary body.

In order to understand the essence of this preparation for the sacred process of the 'sacrament of almtznoshinoo,' you need to know about two special properties of the 'being-hanbledzoin,' that is, the 'blood' of the kesdjan body.

kesdjan body is no sooner separated from the planetary body of the being than it rises, according to the cosmic law called 'tenikdoa' or, as it is sometimes called, the 'law of gravity,' to that sphere in which it finds the density that corresponds with its own mass and which is thus the place corresponding to such cosmic arisings.

the hope that as soon as the highest part of another two-natured arising perfects itself to the required degree of Reason and undergoes the final process of the sacred rascooarno, and before the rapid disintegration of its kesdjan body is clearly sensed, this first 'highest being-body' might instantly enter that other kesdjan body and continue to exist in it for its further perfecting, a perfecting which sooner or later must inevitably be accomplished by every arisen 'highest being-body. definition: Keva is a specific mastic, a chewing substance, prepared from various roots. It was invented by a wise being from an ancient Asiatic community. Its primary purpose, when chewed after consuming the 'first being-food', is to increase the amount of saliva and other substances in the body, which aids in the better and easier transformation, digestion, and assimilation of food. Additionally, chewing keva strengthens teeth and cleanses the mouth from food remains. The mastic itself is noted for hardly ever decomposing and becoming more elastic the longer it is chewed.
role: A beneficial mastic for aiding digestion, strengthening teeth, and cleansing the mouth.

key_quotes.text: 'Keva' is a certain mastic prepared from various roots, which is chewed after eating and which, no matter how long it is chewed, hardly ever decomposes, but on the contrary becomes more and more elastic.
This mastic was invented by a wise being who belonged to one of the old Asiatic communities.

It is useful to chew this 'keva' because it increases the amount of what is called on the Earth 'saliva' and also of other substances formed in beings and elaborated by their planetary bodies so that the first being-food may be better and more easily transformed in them or, as they themselves say, better and more easily 'digested' and 'assimilated. definition: Khrikhirkhi is an apparatus, also called a 'life-chakhan', which is equated to what terrestrial beings call a 'dynamo'. This appliance was invented by Gornahoor Harharkh. Its function is to first suck in separately all three independent parts of the omnipresent active element Okidanokh and then artificially reblend them into a single whole. Okidanokh then flows into a 'container' (like a condenser) and subsequently into another 'khrikhirkhi' (dynamo) where it undergoes the process of 'djartklom', with its separate parts being concentrated in other containers (like accumulators) for experimental use.
role: An apparatus (a 'life-chakhan' or 'dynamo') used for processing the cosmic substance Okidanokh by sucking in, reblending, and concentrating its parts.

key_quotes.text: '...two quite special "life-chakhans," which Gornahoor Harharkh called "khrikhirkhis."'
'It is interesting to note that your favorites also have something like this "life-chakhan," or "khrikhirkhi," which they call a "dynamo."'

'This particular appliance first sucks in separately all the three independent parts of the omnipresent active element Okidanokh present in the atmosphere or in any intraplanetary or surplanetary formation, and only when these separate parts have been artificially reblended into a single whole in the "khrikhirkhi" does Okidanokh, now in its usual state, flow into that "container," where it is concentrated.'

'From there,' he said, 'Okidanokh flows into another "khrikhirkhi," or "dynamo," where it undergoes the process of "djartklom"; and each of its separate parts is then concentrated in those other containers over there.'

definition: Kilprenos (or 'kilpreno' in singular) is a unit of time in the language of Beelzebub. It is explicitly stated to have 'approximately the same duration as what is called an "hour" on the Earth'. It is used to measure the time it takes for a ship to pass through a solar system or for a comet to pass a certain point.
role: A unit of time, approximately equivalent to an hour on Earth.

key_quotes.text: 'The point is that if we follow our intended course, in two "kilprenos"* our ship will be passing through the solar system "Vuanik." '

definition: Kimespai is the name given by beings of the planet Earth to a 'former fragment' or 'little satellite' of their planet. It is described as being comparatively small and remote, making it invisible to contemporary three-brained beings who would mistake it for a large 'aerolite'. The name 'Kimespai' itself meant 'never allowing one to sleep in peace'.
role: A former fragment or small satellite of the planet Earth.

key_quotes.text: '...called it "Kimespai," which meant "never allowing one to sleep in peace."'

'The contemporary three-brained beings of this peculiar planet do not know about this former fragment, chiefly because its comparatively small size and its remoteness make it quite invisible to them, and also because no "grandmother" ever told them that once upon a time any such little "satellite" of their planet had been known.'

definition: King-Too-Toz was a 'great Chinese learned being' and a 'genuine learned being', as well as a follower of 'the great twin brothers'. He propounded a detailed theory called 'the theory of the evolution and involution of vibrations'. To confirm this theory, he created a special experimental apparatus named 'lav-mertz-nokh', which became widely known throughout the Great Megalocosmos. On this apparatus, he arranged and tuned strings to engender vibrations according to calculations made by the great twin brothers, studying how cosmic substance vibrations blend for further actualizations.
role: A great Chinese learned being and follower of the great twin brothers, who developed a theory of vibrations and created the 'lav-mertz-nokh' apparatus.

key_quotes.text: '...that no less great Chinese learned being, King-Too-Toz.'

'On that remarkable experimental apparatus, lav-mertz-nokh, King-Too-Toz arranged and tuned, according to the corresponding calculations made by the great brothers, exactly as many strings for engendering vibrations as there are consecutive sources in the Universe—from any planet up to the Protocosmos—in the presence of which the vibrations of cosmic substances, changing according to law during the trogoautoegocratic process, blend in the required manner for the actualization of everything further.'

'Among these followers, about a century and a half after the sacred rascooarno of the saintly brothers, was a certain genuine learned being by the name of King-Too-Toz who, on the basis of the principles of construction of the middle part of the apparatus alla-attapan, named "dzendvokh," propounded a very detailed theory called the "theory of the evolution and involution of vibrations", and to confirm this theory of his he made a special experimental apparatus which he named "lav-mertz-nokh" and which later, by the way, also became known to almost all the learned beings of our Great Megalocosmos.'

definition: Kolenian Gypsies are described as a certain tribe of Asiatic beings, also known as 'Kolenian Lurs,' dwelling between Persia and Afghanistan. This tribe is regarded as the lowest and filthiest of all tribes on Earth, with their clothes consistently swarming with lice. Despite their extreme filth, they are noted for having no venereal diseases, a fact attributed to their unique custom of 'gypsy self-fumigation.' This ritual involves shaking their clothes over a 'tandoor' (a special kind of earthen pit or hearth) where lice explode in the fire, and then, from oldest to youngest, standing on a sacred 'ateshkam' (a special stool) within the tandoor to warm their sex organs while singing and reciting prayers.
role: An Asiatic tribe known for their extreme filth and a unique 'self-fumigation' custom that prevents venereal diseases.

key_quotes.text: a certain tribe of Asiatic beings called 'Kolenian Lurs' or 'Kolenian gypsies' dwelling between Persia and Afghanistan.
This custom, which the other beings of your planet call 'gypsy self-fumigation,' however stupid it may appear, produces the same result as the Persian custom of 'ablution' or 'abdast. '

This gypsy tribe is regarded as the lowest and filthiest of all the tribes existing on the Earth. And indeed, they are so filthy that their clothes are always swarming with the insects called 'lice. '
Although the members of this tribe are really exceedingly filthy, not only do no venereal diseases exist among them but they have never even heard that such diseases can be contracted.

For this rite of 'self-fumigation,' every family of gypsies has what is called an 'ateshkam,' or stool of a special form, which they regard as sacred, and the entire ritual is performed with the aid of this sacred stool.
The custom requires that he should do this until all parts of his sex organs have been warmed by the tandoor.

definition: Kolenian Lurs are described as a certain tribe of Asiatic beings, also known as 'Kolenian gypsies,' who live between Persia and Afghanistan. definition: Koniutsion was a king of a second group of beings, whose chief place of residence was the city of 'Gob' on the southeastern shore of the Sea of Beneficence. He was the grandson of the great-grandson of a learned member of the Society of Akhldanns. King Koniutsion was considered wise and beneficial, as he introduced a measure to combat a 'terrifying' evil that had arisen among his subjects. He observed that the beings of his community were becoming less capable of work, with an increase in scandals, robberies, acts of violence, and other unpleasant incidents. To address a persistent habit (chewing seeds), he decided to punish those who continued it more severely, increasing surveillance and enforcing punishment with greater strictness.
role: A wise and beneficial king who ruled a community and sought to address societal decline and evil among his subjects.

key_quotes.text: At the time to which my present tale refers, the king of the beings of this second group was the grandson of the great-grandson of that learned being, his name was Koniutsion.

My later inquiry and investigation showed that this King Koniutsion had introduced a most wise and beneficial measure in order to uproot a 'terrifying' evil that had arisen among the beings who by the will of fate had become his subjects.

One day King Koniutsion observed that the beings of his community were becoming less and less capable of work, while scandals, robberies, and acts of violence were on the increase among them, as well as many other unpleasant incidents, which had never occurred before or only in quite exceptional cases.

On realizing this, the wise King Koniutsion decided to punish still more severely those who persisted in this habit; at the same time he increased the surveillance over his subjects and enforced punishment with even greater strictness.

definition: Koorkalai was a city located on the continent of Asia, within an ancient community called 'Tikliamish'. It served as a principal center of culture for three-brained beings and was identified as the capital of the first Asiatic group. Beelzebub settled in Koorkalai during a descent to the planet Earth and began visiting establishments called 'kaltaani' (similar to contemporary cafes, restaurants, or meeting places) to observe and study the specific peculiarities of the psyche of the beings there, especially their attitude toward the custom of sacrificial offerings. He also made a friend in this city.
role: An ancient city in Asia, a principal center of culture and a location for Beelzebub's observations and studies.

key_quotes.text: Again many centuries passed, and their principal center of culture became the city of Koorkalai on the continent of Asia in the ancient community called 'Tikliamish.'

As soon as we were settled in the city of Koorkalai I began visiting the 'kaltaani' there, that is, those establishments which were later called on the continent of Ashhark 'chaikhanas,' 'ashkhanas,' 'caravanserais,' and so on, and which contemporary beings on that planet, especially those breeding on the continent of 'Europe,' call 'cafés,' 'restaurants,' 'clubs,' 'dance halls,' 'meeting places,' and so on.
I set about looking for a suitable being, in order to make friends with him as I had done in the city of Koorkalai.
dress him in the costume of a 'Kafirian'—would he not look exactly like that type I once saw sitting in a 'kaltaan' in the city of Koorkalai?

definition: Korkaptilnian thought-tapes are unique cosmic substances or crystallizations that are never destroyed, provided the given planet maintains the same 'tempo of movement' as at the moment of their arising. They are resistant to all periodic transformations caused by cosmic factors. Any three-brained being who has developed the ability to enter the being-state known as 'soorptakalknian contemplation' can perceive these thought-tapes and become aware of their contents, regardless of how much time has passed. Beelzebub utilized these 'korkaptilnian thought-tapes', along with 'teleoghinaras', as a source to learn details about the genesis of the learned Society of Akhldanns.
role: Indestructible cosmic records or manifestations containing historical information, accessible through a specific being-state.

key_quotes.text: These 'korkaptilnian thought-tapes' are never destroyed as long as the given planet remains in the same 'tempo of movement' as at the moment of their arising, and they are subject to none of those transformations, whatever the cosmic cause, to which all other cosmic substances and crystallizations are periodically subject

And however long a time may have passed, every three-brained being who has acquired in his presence the ableness to enter into the being-state called 'soorptakalknian contemplation' can perceive these 'korkaptilnian thought-tapes' and become aware of their contents'
