definition: Saint Krishnatkharna was a 'Messenger of our Endlessness' who was specifically sent to the three-centered beings of the planet Earth residing in the country of Pearl-land. He directly initiated a group of seven beings. Later, when Saint Buddha appeared in Pearl-land, he found many of Saint Krishnatkharna's instructions for the psyche of the beings to still be effective for destroying the consequences of the organ kundabuffer. Therefore, Saint Buddha decided to make some of Saint Krishnatkharna's instructions the foundation of his own teaching.
role: A Messenger of Endlessness who delivered instructions to Earth's beings in Pearl-land, with some of his teachings adopted by Saint Buddha.

key_quotes.text: At the very beginning it was composed of seven beings directly initiated by Saint Krishnatkharna, who was also a Messenger of our Endlessness, specially sent to the three-centered beings of the planet Earth breeding in the country of Pearl-land.

When Saint Buddha later appeared in Pearl-land, he ascertained that many of Saint Krishnatkharna's instructions for the psyche of the beings of that country were not yet obsolete, and that, if absorbed by any of them, these instructions could help destroy those consequences of the properties of the organ kundabuffer—to free themselves from which he too had been sent to help them, and he therefore decided to make some of these instructions of Saint Krishnatkharna the basis of his own teaching

definition: Kroahns were the name given in Egypt to a sacrificial offering, specifically objects considered 'worthy' to be offered as sacrifices. On one particular occasion, a decree stipulated that 'kroahns' were to consist of the eyes of 'bandits'—a term used by ordinary three-brained beings for the ruling class—and this was to apply to all, including the 'passive sex,' children, and the aged. The individual who collected the most 'kroahns' in their sacred urn on election day would be appointed chief of all Egypt, or of towns and villages, demonstrating their use as a criterion for leadership.
role: Sacrificial offerings in ancient Egypt, sometimes consisting of the eyes of the ruling class, and used as a metric for appointing leaders.

key_quotes.text: A 'kroahn' was the name then given in Egypt to a sacrificial offering.
Well, the objects considered 'worthy' to be offered as sacrifices were then called 'kroahns.'

In the decree about which I have just told you, it was stipulated that on that occasion the 'kroahns' were to consist of the eyes of the bandits—the name the ordinary three-brained beings gave to those of the ruling class behind their backs—and that no exception was to be made for the beings of the 'passive sex,' children, or the aged.

It was further stated in this decree that the one who had the most 'kroahns' in his sacred urn on the day of the elections would be appointed chief of all Egypt and, as I already said, as regards the towns and villages, those beings would be appointed as chiefs who had the correspondingly greatest number of 'kroahns' in their sacred urns.

role: A city in Asia, capital of Nievia, and birthplace of Lentrohamsanin.

key_quotes.text: It was then that I learned that this Lentrohamsanin arose or, as is said there, was 'born' on the continent of Asia in the city of 'Kronbookhon,' the capital of 'Nievia.'

definition: Kulnabo is a specific substance elaborated by the human organism. It is described as a waste product that is constantly eliminated. Its purpose within the organism is to neutralize other substances necessary for the functioning of sex organs, forming and participating in these organs from infancy in both sexes. After utilization, its residue is discharged from the organism. Contemporary medicine, however, has no name for Kulnabo as an independent substance, only for the general mass of substances—which it calls 'smegma'—in which Kulnabo is included.
role: A specific substance within the human organism, part of waste elimination, serving to neutralize other substances involved in sex organ functioning.

key_quotes.text: Among the definite substances elaborated by the human organism and constantly eliminated as waste, there is one called 'kulnabo.'

This substance is generally elaborated in the organism of beings for the purpose of neutralizing other substances necessary for the functioning of their sex organs, it is formed and participates in the functioning of these organs soon after the arising of the beings of both sexes, that is, from their infancy.

'Contemporary medicine has no name at all for the substance 'kulnabo,' which is entirely unknown to it as an independent substance. Contemporary medicine has a name only for the general mass of substances in which the substance 'kulnabo' is included. And this total mass, which it calls 'smegma,' is composed of entirely heterogeneous substances, secreted by various glands having nothing in common with each other,

definition: Kundabuffer is an 'organ' within three-brained beings with certain 'properties.' The text primarily describes the 'consequences of the properties of the organ kundabuffer,' which are associated with various negative traits in human psyche such as 'swaggering,' 'pride,' 'self-love,' 'vanity,' 'self-conceit,' 'self-infatuation,' 'envy,' 'hate,' 'touchiness,' 'oornel' (showing off), and 'cunning.' These consequences are often described as 'crystallized' in the common presence of beings and are linked to a 'lack of foresight on the part of certain Most Saintly Cosmic Final Results.' The organ kundabuffer can also 'proceed more intensively' in some beings.
role: An organ with properties whose consequences profoundly and negatively affect the psyche and behavior of three-brained beings.

key_quotes.text: Now among these friends and acquaintances of his were several serious beings not yet entirely enslaved by the action of the consequences of the properties of the organ kundabuffer, and they also, having penetrated to the gist of the matter, became very deeply interested in it, and continued to verify what proceeded in themselves and independently to observe those around them.
the organ kundabuffer, and thereby acquired being for themselves personally or became normal sources for the arising of a normal presence in future beings like themselves.
the organ kundabuffer proceeds more intensively than in the presence of all the other three-brained beings there.

those consequences of the properties of the organ kundabuffer they now call 'swaggering,' 'pride,' 'self-love,' 'vanity,' 'self-conceit,' 'self-infatuation,' 'envy,' 'hate,' 'touchiness,' and so on and so forth.
satisfy one of the consequences of the properties of the organ kundabuffer, very readily crystallized in the common presences of most of them, called 'oornel,' which they call 'showing off.'

those three-brained beings in whom most of the consequences of the properties of the organ kundabuffer have been completely crystallized, so that there actively functions in their presence that being-property they call 'cunning'

certain of them in whom for some reason or other the consequences of the properties of the organ kundabuffer have already been thoroughly crystallized—which gives to their common presence the impulse for what is called 'cunning'

definition: The Lav-mertz-nokh is a remarkable experimental apparatus created by the Chinese learned being King-Too-Toz, a follower of great twin brothers. It was designed to confirm King-Too-Toz's 'theory of the evolution and involution of vibrations' and later became known to learned beings throughout the Great Megalocosmos. The apparatus consists of a very strong frame on which a great many strings, made from the tail hairs and gut of various quadruped beings, were stretched and could be tightened or loosened by pegs. It was arranged to engender vibrations from as many sources as there are in the Universe, from any planet up to the Protocosmos. It was considered ideal for a full explanation of cosmic vibration laws and could blend vibrations to flow 'harmoniously,' rendering potentially injurious ones harmless. A simplified version of its basic principle, excluding the red and hair strings, was later used in the instrument called 'king'.
role: A remarkable experimental apparatus for studying and demonstrating the laws of vibrations.

key_quotes.text: On that remarkable experimental apparatus, lav-mertz-nokh, King-Too-Toz arranged and tuned, according to the corresponding calculations made by the great brothers, exactly as many strings for engendering vibrations as there are consecutive sources in the Universe—from any planet up to the Protocosmos—in the presence of which the vibrations of cosmic substances, changing according to law during the trogoautoegocratic process, blend in the required manner for the actualization of everything further.

Among these followers, about a century and a half after the sacred rascooarno of the saintly brothers, was a certain genuine learned being by the name of King-Too-Toz who, on the basis of the principles of construction of the middle part of the apparatus alla-attapan, named 'dzendvokh,' propounded a very detailed theory called the 'theory of the evolution and involution of vibrations', and to confirm this theory of his he made a special experimental apparatus which he named 'lav-mertz-nokh' and which later, by the way, also became known to almost all the learned beings of our Great Megalocosmos.

This apparatus, 'lav-mertz-nokh,' like the middle part of the alla-attapan, consisted of a very strong frame on which a great many strings were stretched, made from the tail hairs and gut of various quadruped beings there.

By frequently varying the tension of the red strings, however, and by blending their vibrations with those issuing from the lav-mertz-nokh, they were rendered harmless, that is, by this means the totality of vibrations issuing from the lav-mertz-nokh was made to flow 'harmoniously' for the beings who heard them, and ceased to have a harmful action.

His simplification consisted in this, that without taking into account the red and the hair strings on the lav-mertz-nokh, he made the basis of his sound-producing instrument only the white and black strings, retaining moreover only the number of strings corresponding to two octaves, and he placed them in such a way that one whole octave was in the middle and had for its evolutionary and involutionary continuation half of the next higher octave and half of the preceding lower octave.

definition: Legomonism is the name given to one of the means, devised by the beings of the continent of Atlantis, for transmitting information about certain events of long-past ages from generation to generation. This transmission occurs through three-brained beings who are worthy to be called 'initiates.' An example is the legomonism that transmitted the deliberations of the Saintly Ashiata Shiemash titled 'The Terror of the Situation', which began with a prayer.
role: A means for transmitting information and knowledge from past ages to future generations through initiates.

key_quotes.text: On my last visit in person to the surface of your planet, I happened to become acquainted with this legomonism, which transmitted to the initiated beings of remote generations of the planet Earth the deliberations of the Saintly Ashiata Shiemash under the title of 'The Terror of the Situation. '

'Legomonism,' Beelzebub replied, 'is the name given to one of the means used there for transmitting from generation to generation information about certain events of long-past ages through those three-brained beings who have become worthy to be, and to be called, 'initiates.'
This means of transmitting information had been devised by the beings of the continent of Atlantis.
THE LEGOMONISM,' Beelzebub continued, 'through which the deliberations of the Very Saintly Ashiata Shiemash were transmitted began with the following prayer:

definition: Legomonisms are multiple instances of a means, devised by the beings of the continent of Atlantis, for transmitting information about certain events of long-past ages from generation to generation. This transmission primarily occurs through three-brained beings known as 'initiates.' There were efforts and discussions among learned beings to collect all existing legomonisms and to find ways to transmit them to remote generations through means other than initiates alone.

The learned members of the club of the Adherents of Legomonism in Babylon who belonged to this group indicated the knowledge they wished to transmit in the movements and actions of those taking part in the mysteries in the following way:

And then, as I have said, with the other members of the club of the Adherents of Legomonism who were present, they selected from the being-impulses thus demonstrated those which best corresponded to their aim, and which had to be experienced and manifested in specific actions according to the law of the flow of associations coming from different sources, and only then did they include those selected in the details of some particular mystery.

definition: A leitoochanbros is an object or device that is handed to a being, placed to the ear, and contains 'contents' that can be listened to. It serves as a means of communication or for receiving information, sometimes interrupting a narrative.
role: A device for receiving or listening to information or messages.

key_quotes.text: Just then Beelzebub was handed a 'leitoochanbros,' and when he had finished listening to its contents he turned again to Hassein and said:
At this point in his narrative, Beelzebub was interrupted by a ship's servant who handed him a 'leitoochanbros ' He put it to his ear and began to listen to the contents.'

definition: Lentrohamsanin was a terrestrial three-brained being born in the city of Kronbookhon on the continent of Asia, conceived from the blending of 'exioëharies' of elderly, rich parents. He was educated with extensive but often 'fantastic and dubious information.' Due to his wealth and fame, and through 'accidental circumstances of his environment,' he became a 'great learned being' and an 'authority' for his contemporaries, hailed as a 'long-awaited Messiah' by other learned beings who admired his 'revelations.' However, he is identified as a 'Universal Hasnamuss' and one of 313 Eternal Hasnamuss Individuals existing on the planet Retribution. He is noted for a 'maleficent 'invention'' which was the 'prime initiative for the destruction of the holy labors of Ashiata Shiemash,' despite his highest being-part being perfected to Objective Reason.
role: A terrestrial three-brained being, a 'great learned being' and 'Universal Hasnamuss,' responsible for destroying the holy labors of Ashiata Shiemash.

key_quotes.text: It was then that I learned that this Lentrohamsanin arose or, as is said there, was 'born' on the continent of Asia in the city of 'Kronbookhon,' the capital of 'Nievia.'
His conception resulted from the blending of two heterogeneous 'exioëharies' formed in two already elderly three-brained 'keschapmartnian' beings.
there finally arose that long-awaited result of theirs, later called Lentrohamsanin.

Well then, all the learned beings began shouting and pushing each other in order to get near Lentrohamsanin, and hailing him as their 'long-awaited Messiah,' they expressed to him by their admiring glances the extent of what is called their 'high titillation. '

His name was Lentrohamsanin, and this being, whose highest being-part was coated into a definite unit and perfected to the required gradation of Objective Reason, became one of those 313 Eternal Hasnamuss Individuals who now exist on the small planet bearing the name of 'Retribution. '

The maleficent 'invention' or, as contemporary terrestrial learned beings of new formation would say, the 'composition' or even the 'creation' of that learned being was actualized, as I have already told you, at least two centuries before the time when during my fifth sojourn I first visited the city of Babylon, where learned beings were assembled, partly by coercion and partly voluntarily, from almost the whole surface of the planet.

definition: Logical Being-Mentation is a sacred property and capacity for logical thought that is intended to exist in three-brained beings, distinguishing them from two-brained beings like donkeys who lack it and are considered 'dull-witted.' This property is a possibility given by the Common All-Gracious Creator. However, it can be, and has been, weakened by various factors, such as the fantastic sciences and grammatical rules invented by the 'contemporary European group,' leading to the disappearance of data for 'sane logical mentation' and often being manifested as 'cunning' instead of for its preordained higher purpose.
role: A sacred property and capacity for logical thought in three-brained beings.

key_quotes.text: And therefore it is according to law that the possibility of 'logical mentation' is lacking in your donkey's presence and, in consequence, it is according to law that it should be what you call 'dull-witted' or 'stupid.'

Yet in spite of the possibilities given you, that is, in spite of your having been created three-brained and thus capable of logical mentation, you do not use this sacred property for its preordained purpose, but manifest it as 'cunning' toward His other creatures such as, for example, your own donkey.

they also invented a so-called 'grammatical rule,' according to which during any 'exchange of opinions' they always place the particle of negation after an affirmation—for instance, instead of saying 'I do not want this,' they say, 'I want this no.t
invent every sort of maleficent means for 'weakening' what is called 'logical being-mentation,' already sufficiently weakened without this,

that civilization is chiefly to blame for the complete disappearance, especially from contemporary beings, of the possibility of crystallizing in their presence the data for 'sane logical mentation' and for engendering the impulse of 'being-shame. '

definition: Logicnestarian is an adjective describing 'localizations' or 'material.' 'Logicnestarian localizations' are internal capacities or places within beings where impressions, particularly artificial perceptions resulting from abnormal existence, are intentionally fixed in offspring (Page 517). 'Logicnestarian material' refers to a monstrous substance into which maleficent fictions, invented by 'learned beings' in Babylon, were gradually crystallized over generations. This material then led to an 'exceptionally distorted, aimnophnian being-mentation' or 'perceptive logic' in contemporary three-brained beings (Page 712).
role: An adjective describing internal localizations for fixed impressions, or material formed from crystallized maleficent fictions that distort mentation.

Later, in their transmission from generation to generation, these fictions were gradually crystallized into such monstrous 'logicnestarian material' that, in the psyche of the contemporary three-brained beings, there began to proceed this exceptionally distorted, aimnophnian being-mentation.

definition: Looisos is a powerful celestial being, identified as "His Conformity the Archangel Looisos" and also as "Great Angel Looisos." He was a chief administrator during the first great catastrophe to the planet Earth, responsible for averting potential consequences of that cosmic misfortune (Page 170). He, along with other responsible cosmic Individuals, descended to the solar system to observe the effects of measures taken to ward off consequences of a cosmic miscalculation (Page 170). Endlessness commanded Archangel Looisos to investigate the causes of abnormal growth of elevations on a planet and take appropriate measures, a solar system with which he was already familiar (Page 245). Looisos is also described as the inventor of the "organ kundabuffer," which, when present in Earth's ancestors, caused them to be in a state similar to that induced by cocaine in later beings. The consequences of this organ, formed after Looisos and other Sacred Individuals, were gradually formed and transmitted by heredity, crystallizing in the psyche and becoming organic functions (Pages 393, 970).
role: A Great Archangel, administrator of cosmic affairs, and the inventor of the organ kundabuffer.

key_quotes.text: Among these Most High Sacred Individuals was again His Conformity, the Angel—now already Archangel— Looisos who, during the first great catastrophe to the planet Earth, as you remember I recently told you, had been one of the chief administrators in charge of averting the possible consequences of that general cosmic misfortune.

And our All-Gracious Endlessness, granting his request, immediately commanded that the Archangel Looisos be sent to that solar system where, as one already familiar with it, he might clarify on the spot the causes of these projections and take appropriate measures.

In the days when their ancestors still had within them this invention of the Great Angel Looisos, they were almost always in exactly the same state as the beings of today when they introduce into themselves this German invention called 'cocaine. '

Among the consequences of the properties of the organ kundabuffer—which consequences, after the Sacred Individuals, including the Great Archangel, Looisos—are gradually formed in them and, being transmitted by heredity from one generation to another, crystallize in the psyche of these unfortunates and become organic functions.

key_quotes.text: The larger of these two fragments was named 'Loonderperzo' and the smaller 'Anulios'; and the ordinary three-brained beings who arose and were formed on the Earth knew them by these names. definition: Loosochepana is the name for the front part of a famous experimental apparatus called "alla-attapan." It is specifically described as a special cone-shaped pipe, with its wide end hermetically fitted into a window frame and the other end having a small slit with a 'collecting disk.' Its function is to transform 'rays of daylight' into a 'concentrated white ray.' It is also mentioned as a component through which 'positive colored rays' pass or from which colored rays can be projected (Pages 764, 766).
role: The front part of the 'alla-attapan' experimental apparatus, functioning to concentrate and direct light rays.

key_quotes.text: The front part was called 'loosochepana,' the middle part 'dzendvokh,' and the last, the rear part, was called 'riank-pokhotartz. '

The front part, named 'loosochepana,' consisted of a special cone-shaped pipe, the wide end of which was hermetically fitted into the frame of the only window of the room where the experiments were made and the other end of which had a small slit with a 'collecting disk,' through which the 'rays of daylight' coming from the window were transformed, as your favorites would say, into a 'concentrated white ray.'

...the loosochepana through which the 'positive colored rays' had already passed, was a cavity of a special form in which was placed either the whole polormedekhtic product named 'opium,' or one of its active elements, required for the experiment.

definition: Makary Kronbernkzion was a terrestrial three-brained being who arose on the continent of Atlantis, resulting from a 'sacred process of elmooarno' between two terrestrial beings of different sex. He was raised with a scientific career in mind and became a 'very good scientist' on Earth, eventually achieving membership in the learned Society of Akhldanns. During his responsible existence, he realized his nullity and resolved to transform himself through 'conscious labor and intentional suffering,' without mercy toward his denying part. He is noted as the first individual to use the terms 'Good' and 'Evil,' which later acquired a maleficent sense. He created an original 'boolmarshano' that set forth his scientific thesis, 'The Affirming and Denying Influences on Man,' where he symbolized these forces as the basis for the formation of a being's presence and successive states. His highest being-part is said to still exist on a holy planet, its future dependent on terrestrial three-brained beings. Beelzebub undertook a detailed investigation into his personality and activities.
role: An ancient terrestrial scientist and 'pending saint' who first articulated the concepts of 'Good' and 'Evil' and developed a profound scientific thesis on being-influences.

key_quotes.text: this terrestrial three-brained being named Makary Kronbernkzion arose on the continent of Atlantis as the result of the sacred process of 'elmooarno' between two terrestrial beings of different sex who had just reached responsible age.

the result of this sacred process, that is, this 'son' of theirs later called Makary Kronbernkzion, received in his presence from his very arising and during his early childhood almost the same data required for a future responsible being as every keschapmartnian three-brained being possesses at his arising everywhere else on all the other planets of our Great Megalocosmos.

This special research of mine clearly showed me that although he was indeed the first to use the terms 'Good' and 'Evil,' he was not to blame that these words later acquired such a maleficent sense in the process of existence of your favorites of all subsequent generations.

During the process of his responsible existence, devoted entirely to science, he came one day to a clear vision of his own significance and sincerely realized his nullity. From then on, with sore grief, he meditated seriously on this realization, and the result of his meditations was that in every part of his entire presence the hope began to arise, and finally the conviction was definitely fixed in him, that conscious labor and intentional suffering could transform him from a nothing into a 'something.'

setting forth the scientific thesis by Makary Kronbernkzion under the title of 'The Affirming and Denying Influences on Man. ' ... Makary Kronbernkzion employed for the first time the idea of Good and Evil, by which he symbolized the forces which are the basis for the formation of the presence, as well as of the formation of the stream of successive states, of every relatively independent cosmic arising, and thus of course of every being.
the highest part of this poor Makary Kronbernkzion still exists on the holy planet and his future now depends exclusively on the three-brained beings who have taken your fancy.

definition: Maralpleician refers to an 'epoch' associated with the country of Maralpleicie. This epoch is contrasted with the contemporary American period, specifically concerning the methods used by beings to conceal their consumption of prohibited substances from government authorities. The text states that contemporary American beings are 'by no means as naive as were those of the Maralpleician epoch' in this regard, suggesting that beings of the Maralpleician epoch were comparatively less cunning or sophisticated in concealing their use of genuine poppy seeds.
role: An historical epoch related to the country of Maralpleicie, characterized by a specific level of ingenuity in concealing the use of prohibited substances.

key_quotes.text: the beings now breeding on the continent of America are by no means as naive as were those of the Maralpleician epoch.

definition: Maralpleicie is a country on the planet Earth. Its inhabitants were known for their addiction to chewing the seeds of the 'gulgulian' or 'poppy' plant. King Koniutsion, a ruler of Maralpleicie, attempted to suppress this habit through strict orders, punishments, and increased surveillance, though these measures ultimately proved ineffective and even led to an increase in the habit. The city of Gob was located within Maralpleicie, and the small town of Arguenia was considered its most remote point. At one stage, parts of Maralpleicie's surface began to be buried beneath sands, causing a group of its three-brained inhabitants to flee eastward and eventually settle to form the country now known as 'China.' During a certain period, an invention introduced in Maralpleicie led to a decrease in sacrificial offerings and an unprecedented level of attention given to beings of other forms, sometimes resulting in comical social scenes.
role: An ancient country on Earth, infamous for its inhabitants' addiction to poppy seeds, the site of King Koniutsion's efforts to curb this habit, and the origin of a refugee group who founded China.

key_quotes.text: as occurred in the country of Maralpleicie with the chewing of the seeds of the poppy. The difference is that the beings in the country of Maralpleicie were addicted to the use of genuine poppy seeds
the beings of Maralpleicie had a passion at that time for chewing the seeds of this surplanetery formation, which had to be gathered only when 'ripe.'

the city of Gob, in the country of Maralpleicie, but when this part of the surface of your planet began to be buried beneath the sands, they both joined those refugees who went east. This group of three-brained beings fleeing from the country of Maralpleicie, among whom were these twin brothers, the future great learned beings, crossed the eastern heights of Maralpleicie and settled on the shores of a large water space. They later formed a settled group inhabiting a country which still exists today and which is known as 'China.'
We finally arrived at a small town called 'Arguenia,' which in those days was considered the most remote point of the country of Maralpleicie.
in the country of Maralpleicie, not only did sacrificial offerings diminish but the beings of other forms even began to be treated with unprecedented attention.

Its law-conformable duration was prolonged to provide it with the required property of absorbing for its functioning the automatic inflow of all surrounding forces.
role: A stopinder (intermediate stage/step) of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh, responsible for absorbing automatic cosmic forces.

To provide the stopinder between the third and fourth 'points of deflection' with the required property of absorbing for its functioning the automatic inflow of all surrounding forces, He prolonged its duration.

definition: The Megalocosmos is described as "our present world" or "our world," comprising "all those cosmoses that together compose" it. It is a vast cosmic entity that was created by the Creator All-Maintainer. It contains planets where three-brained beings arise and exist, and it is the setting for "everything existing" within the Universe, where forces generated by initial impetus drive everything back to Prime Being.
role: The entirety of "our present world" or the Universe, comprising all cosmoses and everything existing within it.

key_quotes.text: And all those cosmoses that together compose our present world were called the 'Megalocosmos. '
It was just during this period of the flow of time that there appeared to our Creator All-Maintainer the imperative need to create our now-existing 'Megalocosmos,' that is, our 'world. '

In our Great Megalocosmos, it is even considered a law for all beings with Reason that one must always and in everything guard against the initial impetus, because on acquiring momentum, it becomes a force which is the fundamental mover of everything existing in the Universe, leading everything back to Prime Being.
everything existing in our Megalocosmos.
on most planets of our Megalocosmos where three-brained beings arise and exist
all the three-centered beings of our Great Megalocosmos constantly carry on a relentless

But to the misfortune of everything existing in the Megalocosmos, there is no honesty in your favorites in fulfilling their duties, not even toward that Nature to whom, in truth, they owe their very existence.

definition: Mentokifezoin is a cosmic substance that is a radiation given off from each separate second-order sun. It consists of substances transformed by the sun and other planets within a solar system, and these substances reach every planet through the radiations of the aforementioned cosmic concentrations. It is a component that helps in the formation of coatings in the common presences of tetartocosmoses.
role: A type of cosmic radiation/substance.

key_quotes.text: The radiation of each separate second-order sun they called 'mentokifezoin.'

And it was from such cosmic results that exactly similar forms began to be coated in their common presences, composed at first of the cosmic substance 'mentokifezoin,' that is, of substances transformed by the sun and the other planets of that solar system within whose limits these tetartocosmoses had the place of their arising—substances that reach every planet through the radiations of the said cosmic concentrations.

definition: A Microcosmos is a cosmic formation that represents the very smallest likeness of the Whole, and is associated with the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh. Radiations issuing from microcosmoses are called 'photoinzoin.' Aggregates of microcosmoses form 'tetartocosmoses.' On Earth, the 'reciprocal destruction of microcosmoses in the tetartocosmos' refers to specific processes that are looked upon as epidemics, known by names like 'kaliunium,' 'morkrokh,' 'selnoano' in ancient times, and 'black death,' 'cholera,' 'Spanish influenza' in contemporary times.
role: The smallest likeness of the Whole; a cosmic formation; a component of tetartocosmoses.

key_quotes.text: ...stopinder of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh, and which is the very smallest likeness of the Whole, was called 'microcosmos'...
That given off from the microcosmoses they called 'photoinzoin.'

...instead of this 'remorse of conscience,' there usually arise and become widely propagated certain specific processes, called the 'reciprocal destruction of microcosmoses in the tetartocosmos'—processes which they look upon as epidemics and which in ancient times were known by the names of 'kaliunium,' 'morkrokh,' 'selnoano,' and so on, and today by the names of 'black death,' 'cholera,' 'Spanish influenza,' and so on.

definition: Mister Prana refers to a misconception among later generations of three-brained beings on Earth regarding Saint Buddha's teaching about 'Holy Prana'. While Saint Buddha spoke of 'Holy Prana' as the 'most sacred particle of the Great All-Embracing of everything existing' that beings must consciously strive to crystallize and perfect, these later beings misunderstood this, believing that this sacred particle is already present in them at birth, without requiring any being-partkdolgduty. Beelzebub later capitalized on this misunderstanding, spreading the idea that sacred Prana is universally present in all beings, as part of his 'invention' to influence human behavior.
role: A misunderstood concept of a sacred cosmic particle, arising from a misinterpretation of Saint Buddha's teachings.

key_quotes.text: But when the beings of the second and third generations following Saint Buddha began wiseacring with their peculiar Reason about his explanations of cosmic truths, they introduced for future transmission the definite notion that this 'Mister Prana' is already in them when they first see the light of day.

Thanks to this misunderstanding, the beings of that period and of all subsequent generations, including the present one, have imagined that, without fulfilling any being-partkdolgduty, they are already particles of that Most Great Greatness, as Saint Buddha himself had so specifically described.
I spread the idea that the most sacred Prana, of which our divine teacher Saint Buddha had spoken, is already present not only in us men but in all beings that arise and exist on our planet Earth.

definition: Modiktheo is a planet within the Great Megalocosmos, belonging to the system of the Protocosmos, distinguished for being the origin of many angels, archangels, and Sacred Individuals. It is considered to host the most ideal and perfect forms of three-brained beings in the Universe. Unlike other planets where species continuation involves one or two sexes, on Modiktheo, the sacred law of Heptaparaparshinokh is carried out through three independent individuals. These three sexes are called 'martna,' 'spirna,' and 'okina.' The continuation of their species involves all three beings simultaneously receiving 'elmooarno' (conception), existing independently for a period, and then, as birth approaches, experiencing a 'psycho-organic attraction' that leads them to merge their three conceptions into one, resulting in a new three-brained being born with all three being-bodies already formed.
role: An ideal and perfect planet in the Megalocosmos, unique for its three-sexed reproductive process and as the origin of many sacred individuals.

key_quotes.text: I might say here that there even exists in our Great Megalocosmos a planet on which this sacred law of Heptaparaparshinokh carries out its completing process for the continuation of the species of the three-brained beings through three independent individuals.
You might as well be acquainted somewhat in detail with this uncommon planet, which is called 'Modiktheo' and belongs to the system of the Protocosmos.

Beings arising on this planet are three-brained... and in their outer appearance are very similar to us, at the same time they are, and are considered by all others, the most ideal and perfect of the innumerable forms of exterior coatings of three-brained beings of our Great Universe, and all our now existing angels, archangels, and most of the Sacred Individuals nearest to our Common Father Endlessness received their arising upon this marvelous planet.
...on the planet Modiktheo the beings of the different sexes are called 'martna,' 'spirna,' and 'okina,' and although externally they are all alike, their inner structures are entirely different.

The process of the continuation of their species takes place among them in the following manner: All three beings of different sexes simultaneously receive the sacred 'elmooarno' or, as your favorites say, 'conception,' through a special action, and with this sacred 'elmooarno' or conception they exist apart from one another for a certain period, entirely independently, but each of them with very definite intentional perceptions and conscious manifestations.
And three-centered beings of this kind are indeed ideal in our Megalocosmos because at their very arising they already have all three being-bodies.

definition: Moor-doorten is described as a disease that appears among children. According to an incomparable book cited, this disease occurs due to the elaboration and constant elimination of certain substances by the human organism. Specifically, it is linked to the substance "kulnabo," which is generally formed in the organism to neutralize other substances necessary for the functioning of sex organs from infancy, and whose residue is discharged from the organism.
role: A disease affecting children, related to internal bodily substances.

key_quotes.text: 'And as for the causes of the appearance of "moor-doorten" among children, it was said in Chapter VI, Verse XI, of this incomparable book that this disease occurs in children for the following reasons:
'Among the definite substances elaborated by the human organism and constantly eliminated as waste, there is one called "kulnabo."

definition: The Most Most Holy Sun Absolute is described as the "Most Most Holy Prime Source" and the "sole place of His Most Glorious Being," referring to Endlessness. Initially, it was maintained by two primordial sacred laws in a system called 'Autoegocrat.' Later, the principle of its functioning was changed by "Our All-Maintaining Endlessness" to depend on external forces, necessitating the creation of the Megalocosmos, and this new system was called 'Trogoautoegocrat.' It acts upon the prime-source cosmic substance 'ethernokrilno' to form concentrations and its emanations unite with those of 'second-order suns' to actualize common-cosmic processes. "Highest being-bodies" were originally able to blend directly with it, but this possibility was lost after the 'chootboglitanical period.' A "geneotriamazikamnian contact" between emanations of perfected Sacred Individuals and its atmosphere caused a terrible misfortune for "perfected highest being-parts" and a change in the harmonious movement of many solar systems.
role: The ultimate, primary cosmic source and dwelling place of Endlessness, maintaining the universe through sacred laws and receiving perfected beings.

key_quotes.text: In the beginning, as I have already told you, our Most Most Holy Sun Absolute was maintained solely by means of these two primordial sacred laws, but at that time these laws functioned quite independently without the help of any forces whatever coming from outside, and this system was called 'Autoegocrat.'

Our Almighty Endlessness was then compelled to create our existing Megalocosmos with all the cosmoses of different scales and the relatively independent cosmic formations contained in it, and since then the system for maintaining the existence of the Sun Absolute has been called 'Trogoautoegocrat. '

This admixture of extraneously caused arisings took place in the sacred Theomertmalogos owing to the following and, I must add, unforeseen causes "When each perfected 'highest being-body' becomes an independent Individual and acquires its own law of the sacred Triamazikamno, it begins to emanate similarly to the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute, but in miniature And when a great many of these perfected independent Sacred Individuals had been assembled on the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute, then between the emanations of these Sacred Individuals and the atmosphere of the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute there was established what is called a 'geneotriamazikamnian contact, ' which brought on this terrible misfortune for the 'perfected highest being-parts' of which I have just told you.

In the beginning, all the 'highest being-bodies,' like those who now have the place of their existence on this holy planet, went directly to our Most Most Holy Sun Absolute, but later, when that all-universal terrifying calamity which we call the 'chootboglitanical period' occurred in the Megalocosmos, similar 'highest being-bodies,' having lost the possibility of blending directly with our Most Most Holy Sun Absolute, began to dwell on this holy planet.

definition: Mosulopolis is identified as a city on the continent of Asia where a society, initially named "The Earth Belongs to Our Common Creator and Is Equally Free for All His Creatures," was formed "barely four or five of their centuries ago." This society was later renamed "The Earth Belongs Only to Men" after a dispute among its members.
role: A city in Asia, noted as the founding location of a significant society.

key_quotes.text: And quite recently, barely four or five of their centuries ago, the last such society was formed, also on the continent of Asia, in the city that was called, it seems, 'Mosulopolis.'

definition: Mullah Nasr Eddin is a wise and esteemed sage, referred to as "our dear teacher" and "our revered teacher." Beelzebub had personal meetings with him in Persia (near Isfahan and in Talayaltnikum) to discuss "subtle philosophic questions." He is known for his insightful sayings and "subtle psychological analysis." Examples of his wisdom include explaining why "Russian crows" became "turkeys" due to the imperfection of German aniline dyes, stating that "The purpose of their existence is to be the victims of leeches" in relation to a custom concerning female menstruation, and formulating practical counsels like the one advising against telling the truth on Earth and suggesting inaction. He is also associated with the saying, "to dance to his tune," which describes being controlled by another's directions.
role: A wise sage and teacher whose sayings and explanations offer insights into human nature and cosmic principles.

key_quotes.text: My personal meeting with him, during which he uttered that wise saying of his defining the real essence of the beings of this large community, took place on a part of your planet called 'Persia,' not far from a city named 'Isfahan,' where I had gone for my research concerning the most saintly activities of Ashiata Shiemash, and also to clear up on the spot the question of how there first arose that maleficent form of so-called 'politeness' now existing everywhere among them.

Here, my dear boy, with all due respect to the subtle psychological analysis of our most wise Mullah Nasr Eddin, it should in justice be said that if these Russians have become such exemplary turkeys, once more the blame must be placed solely on the beings of the community of Germany.
From that moment, as far as my outer manifestations were concerned, I was obliged, as our esteemed Mullah Nasr Eddin would say, 'to dance to his tune. '
which our great Mullah Nasr Eddin refers to when he says: 'The purpose of their existence is to be the victims of leeches.

'Ekh, brother! Here on Earth if you tell the truth you're a big fool, whereas if you cheat and he you are only a 'scoundrel,' though also a big one So better do nothing, and just recline on your couch and learn how to sing like the sparrow that has not yet been turned into an "American canary."

definition: Nievia is a country or community located on the continent of Asia, with Kronbookhon as its capital city. Lentrohamsanin was born in Kronbookhon, the capital of Nievia, and his parents made Nievia their permanent residence, with his father conducting trade in various cities of Nievia through caravans and caravanserais. The three-brained beings of Nievia became followers of Lentrohamsanin's invention, leading to the establishment of a republican form of government. The community of Nievia later grew powerful and engaged in wars with neighboring communities to impose its new 'state organization'. Lentrohamsanin also had ambitions to be considered a 'famous scientist' among the beings of Nievia and across the planet.
role: A country/community on the continent of Asia, capital of Kronbookhon, significant in Lentrohamsanin's life and the adoption of a republican government.

key_quotes.text: It was then that I learned that this Lentrohamsanin arose or, as is said there, was 'born' on the continent of Asia in the city of 'Kronbookhon,' the capital of 'Nievia.'

His 'producers' or, as they say, his 'parents,' having chosen the capital of Nievia as their place of permanent existence, had moved there three terrestrial years before the arising of that future Universal Hasnamuss.

By the time the source of the 'active principle of his origin,' in other words his father, had built up his fortune, he had several 'caravans' of his own as well as 'caravanserais' for bartering goods in various cities of Nievia.

From then on, all the three-brained beings of Nievia became followers of the 'invention' of Lentrohamsanin, and soon afterward there was established in that community a special form of government called a 'republic.'

Still later, the community of Nievia, having by then become great and powerful, began, as usually happens there, making war on neighboring communities for the purpose of imposing upon them its new form of 'state organization.'
had the ambition to be considered a 'famous scientist'—not only among the beings of Nievia but also over the whole of the surface of their planet.

definition: Nipilhooatchi was the ancient name for a great river flowing northward on a continent, in a region now known as 'Egypt'. This river is currently called the 'Nile'. Prior to and during the second transapalnian perturbation, the beings of the narrator's tribe existed on that planet near the source of this river.
role: The ancient name for the river now known as the Nile.

key_quotes.text: The entire region through which this great river flowed they first named 'Sakronakari.' This name was afterward changed several times and today that region is called 'Egypt,' while the great river then known as 'Nipilhooatchi,' is now, as I have already said, called the 'Nile.'

The part of the continent indicated by the 'pythoness' lay near the source of the river Nipilhooatchi, and the beings of our tribe existed there during the whole of the second transapalnian perturbation and also later, when things became relatively normal and most of the surviving terrestrial beings had almost forgotten the catastrophe, and had again formed—just as if nothing had happened to them—one of their famous 'centers of culture' in the very heart of the future

definition: Okidanokh is an omnipresent cosmic substance, active element, or unique crystallization that is fundamental to the Universe. It obtains its prime arising from the blending of three independent forces and necessarily participates in all cosmic formations. It is constantly present in the atmosphere of planets and is essential for the common presence of a planet, being the most important factor for every kind of arising and maintenance of existence. It forms the essence of 'relatively independent' intra-planetary and surplanetary formations, as well as the essence of beings of every brain-system and external coating. Okidanokh has three principal or active parts (specifically named 'anodnatius', 'cathodnatius', and 'parijrahatnatius') which undergo a process called 'djartklom' (division or separation), either in the general cosmos (often due to the sacred Aieioiuoa) or within beings (either consciously by 'partkdolgduty' or unconsciously by 'kerkoolnooarnian actualization'). After 'djartklom,' its parts possess a 'striving to reblend into a whole.' When Okidanokh enters beings through 'being-food,' its fundamental parts blend with corresponding perceptions ('kindred vibrations') and concentrate in the brains, forming 'being-impulsakri' that aid in common-cosmic transformations and conscious self-perfecting. During 'djartklom,' a pure 'ethernokrilno' is temporarily released, which connects active elements in cosmic formations. The holy forces of the fundamental sacred Triamazikamno are contained within the Omnipresent Okidanokh, serving as the affirming source for the crystallizations that form brains.
role: An omnipresent, fundamental cosmic substance or active element essential for creation, existence, and the potential for self-perfection in beings, operating through processes of division and reblending of its three active parts.

key_quotes.text: The Omnipresent Okidanokh obtains its prime arising in space outside the Most Holy Sun Absolute from the blending of these three independent forces into one, and in the course of its further involutions, it is correspondingly changed in the 'vivifyingness of its vibrations' during its passage through what are called the 'stopinders,' or 'centers of gravity,' of the fundamental sacred Heptaparaparshinokh.

This common-cosmic 'unique crystallization,' or 'active element,' has several particularities proper to it alone, and it is chiefly owing to these particularities that most cosmic phenomena occur—among others, those we have spoken of that take place in the atmosphere of certain planets.

omnipresent cosmic substance Okidanokh, present in our atmosphere and constantly being replenished, is necessary for the common presence of our planet and is the most important factor for every kind of arising and maintenance of existence, and also that the essence of every "relatively independent" intra-planetary and surplanetary formation, as well as the essence of beings of every brain-system and external coating, de-
The 'omnipresent active element' Okidanokh enters the presence of beings through the three kinds of 'being-food.'
all three active parts of Okidanokh, after the occurrence of the artificial "djartklom," reblend into a single mass.
I have just now admitted the current of the two parts of Okidanokh called "anodnatius" and "cathodnatius," giving them the same force of striving to reblend.'

But since an "able Reason"—my own, in this case—• has by intention artificially excluded the third part of Okidanokh, known as "parijrahatnatius," the process is now taking place between only two of its independent parts,

First of all, you should know that every cosmic localization known as a 'brain' takes its form from crystallizations for whose arising the affirming source is one or another of the corresponding holy forces of the fundamental sacred Triamazikamno contained in the Omnipresent Okidanokh.

definition: Orpheist was a name given to and adopted by the learned members of the 'club of the Adherents of Legomonism' during the Babylonian epoch. The word was formed from distinct roots that signified 'right' and 'essence,' meaning that someone called an Orpheist 'rightly sensed the essence.' This expression was later replaced by the word 'artist' about two centuries prior to the narration, with 'artist' being supposed to mean 'he who is occupied with art.'
role: A title for learned individuals who 'rightly sensed the essence', later replaced by 'artist'.

key_quotes.text: You must know that at that time the learned members of the club of the Adherents of Legomonism were given a name by the other learned beings, who were well disposed toward them, a name which they adopted for themselves, and which your contemporary favorites would write as 'Orpheist.'

This word was formed from distinct roots of words then in use, which in contemporary times would signify 'right' and 'essence.' If someone was called that, it meant that he 'rightly sensed the essence. '
So in place of the expression 'Orpheist' they invented the word 'artist,' which was supposed to mean 'he who is occupied with art.'

definition: Ors is identified as a solar system which Beelzebub visited, containing various planets such as Mars. Beelzebub arrived in this solar system and settled on Mars. On the planets of the solar system Ors, a being typically becomes a chief over other beings by their merit, often acquired as a 'plef-perf-noof' or physician (of both spirit and body).
role: A solar system.

key_quotes.text: My first meeting with the Martian toof-nef-tef took place soon after we arrived in this solar system and settled on the planet Mars

on almost all the planets of our Great Universe, and likewise on the other planets of the solar system Ors, a being becomes a chief over other beings by his merit, and most often by the merit he has acquired as a plef-perf-noof, or physician—that is, a physician of the spirit as well as of the body.

definition: Oskiano is a term equated to 'education' or 'education for the being of a responsible being' on the planet Earth. It is described as a 'maleficent means' invented by Earth beings, which, from the very first days after birth, subjects newly arisen beings to its stubborn influence. This process causes the possibilities for developing Objective Being-Reason to gradually atrophy and disappear. The purpose of 'oskiano' is to create inner and outer factors for perceiving impressions to crystallize data that give a being the 'power not to be identified with and not to be affected by externals through one's inevitably inherent passions.' Beelzebub voluntarily took upon himself the responsible guidance of Hassein's 'oskiano'.
role: The process of 'education' or the formation of a responsible being.

key_quotes.text: namely, that sort of 'oskiano' I have already told you about, called 'education.'

to create for his 'oskiano' every kind of inner and outer factor for perceiving corresponding impressions, in order to crystallize in his common presence all those data which alone, in their totality, can give to the three-brained being when he reaches responsible age the 'power' to be 'svolibroonolnian' or, as your favorites would say, the 'power not to be identified with and not to be affected by externals through one's inevitably inherent passions ' And it is solely this being-impulse, engendered in the being by these data, that can help him to attain a free and impartial observation of all true phenomena appearing in the cosmic results around him.

When I returned to our dear Karatas, and was free from any other being-duties, I voluntarily took upon myself the responsible guidance of your 'oskiano' or, as your favorites would say, your 'education for the being of a responsible being. '

definition: Paraparshinokh (often referred to as Heptaparaparshinokh) is a "sacred law" fundamental to cosmic processes. It governs the "completing process for the continuation of the species," which can occur through two beings of different sexes (such as 'actavas' and 'passavas,' or 'man' and 'woman' on Earth) or, on other planets, through three independent individuals. This law also dictates the "transformation of cosmic substances" required for the "common-cosmic Trogoautoegocrat." Furthermore, it is instrumental in the formation and perfecting of "higher being-bodies," such as the 'kesdjan body' and the 'third and highest 'being-body,' thanks to the assimilation of different 'being-foods.' The functioning of this law involves 'stopinders' (e.g., 'mechano-coinciding mdnelin,' 'intentionally actualized mdnelin,' and 'harnel-aoot') and 'points of deflection,' whose "subjective action" was altered by a higher being in three instances, affecting their duration and harmony.
role: A fundamental sacred cosmic law governing continuation of species, transformation of cosmic substances, and the development of higher being-bodies.

key_quotes.text: the completing process of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh for the continuation of the species is carried out not through one being, as with the tetartocosmoses, but through two beings of different sexes, called by us 'actavas' and 'passavas,' and on the planet Earth, 'man' and 'woman.'

I might say here that there even exists in our Great Megalocosmos a planet on which this sacred law of Heptaparaparshinokh carries out its completing process for the continuation of the species of the three-brained beings through three independent individuals.

The transformation through them of the cosmic substances required for the common-cosmic Trogoautoegocrat, according to the sacred law of Heptaparaparshinokh, proceeds on the same principles on which it does in our common presence and in the presence of your favorites breeding on the planet Earth.

paraparshinokh, thanks to the second being-food the 'kesdjan body' was formed in beings, and in accordance with the 'higher mdnel-in' of the same sacred law, thanks to the third being-food the third and highest 'being-body' was coated and perfected—then these completely perfected highest being-parts, after their separation from the lower being-parts, were deemed worthy to be immediately united with the Most Most Holy Prime Source and began to fulfill the purpose divinely foreordained for them.

He made the greater change in the law of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh. This change in the functioning of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh consisted in the alteration of what is called the 'subjective action' of three of its 'stopinders.'
And this is the stopinder of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh which is still called the 'mechano-coinciding mdnelin. '
And this stopinder of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh is the one that is still called the 'intentionally actualized mdnelin. '

definition: Partkdolgduty (or being-partkdolgduty) is an indispensable being-function or process for three-brained beings, the results or actualization of which significantly influence their existence. When its actualization ceased among "your favorites" (beings of the planet Earth), the duration of their existence became highly variable and dependent on accidental exterior factors, leading to its shortening. Critically, the non-actualization of being-partkdolgduty prevented the proper evolution of a "totality of substances" (which arises as the final result of the transformation of the first being-food, and is also referred to as "being-exioëhary" or 'sperm' for males) into higher definite active elements. Instead, these substances "involved back" into their original crystallizations, causing "innumerable 'illnesses'" and shortening the general duration of existence. It is implicitly linked to self-perfecting and reproduction and requires "psychic factors" for its intensive actualization.
role: An indispensable being-function crucial for the duration of existence, the proper evolution of being-substances for self-perfecting, and for reproduction.

key_quotes.text: when the results of partkdolgduty were no longer obtained in the presence of your favorites, and the duration of their existence began to depend exclusively on the results of the mentioned seven accidental exterior factors, then thanks to all this the length of their existence, especially among contemporary beings, became extremely variable.

ever since your favorites ceased to actualize being-partkdolgduty in their presence, this totality of substances, which inevitably arises in the presence of all beings as the final result of the transformation of their first being-food, no longer receiving, in accordance with the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh, the outside help required for completing its evolution into other higher definite active elements, began to involve back toward those crystallizations from which its evolution began

definition: Pearl-land is a country on the planet Earth, identified as what is currently known as "Hindustan" or "India." This region was characterized by abundant "pearl-bearing beings" in its surrounding waters, which attracted settlers from Atlantis who sought pearls. It became a permanent settlement for Atlanteans, especially after Atlantis was engulfed, and was also referred to as the "Land of Beneficence." Later, Pearl-land was noted as the origin of adherents of a "peculiar sect" whose religious doctrine was supposedly based on the teachings of Saint Buddha.
role: A country on Earth, also known as Hindustan or India, that was a source of pearls and a significant settlement for Atlanteans, and later a center for a particular religious sect.

definition: Pirindjiel is a small slab made of ivory, forming part of a famous experimental apparatus called 'alla-attapan.' It functions to receive seven different colored rays, which are produced when a concentrated white ray passes through a special crystal (a prism). This slab is designed to then re-concentrate these colored rays, though in a different manner, before they proceed through a second crystal and fall upon a larger ivory slab called 'polorishboorda.'
role: A small ivory slab used in a scientific apparatus to manipulate colored light rays.

key_quotes.text: This 'concentrated white ray,' passing then through a crystal of special form, was broken up into seven 'rays of different colors,' which fell upon a small slab made of ivory called 'pirindjiel.'

This slab, 'pirindjiel,' was so constructed and regulated that the colored rays falling on it were again concentrated, but this time in a different way, and passing through a second crystal, also of a special form, fell on another, but larger, ivory slab called 'polorishboorda.'

definition: A planetary body, in the context of beings, refers to their physical form or external coating. It houses the principal organs and organs for the transformation of 'first and second being-foods.' Depending on the planet, these bodies can vary greatly in form, such as being frail on the Moon, like a 'karoona' with a long trunk, fat, shining eyes, and wings on one planet, or like a double sphere ('toosook') on another. This physical presence is distinct from the being's spirit and is subject to burial after death.
role: The physical organism or external form of a three-brained being.

key_quotes.text: Though the beings of this planet have very frail planetary bodies, they have an indomitable spirit, which gives them an extraordinary perseverance and capacity for work.

the three-brained beings are coated with a planetary body having a form—how shall I tell you?—like a 'karoona,' that is to say, they have a long broad trunk, amply provided with fat, and a head with enormous protruding and shining eyes. On the back of this huge planetary body of theirs are two large wings, and on the underside two comparatively small feet with very strong claws.
Almost the entire strength of this huge planetary body is adapted by nature to generate energy for their eyes and their wings
the upper sphere serving to contain the principal organs of the planetary body, and the lower one the organs for the transformation of the 'first and second being-foods.'
paid due respect to the planetary body that I had brought back with me.

definition: A Plef-perf-noof is a term used on the planet Mars that is equivalent to a 'zirlikner' on Beelzebub's home planet and a 'physician' on Earth. This role involves being a physician of both the spirit and the body. Beings who acquire merit as a Plef-perf-noof often become chiefs over others, corresponding to a 'king' on Earth, as exemplified by the current Martian 'toof-nef-tef' (king) who was once a Plef-perf-noof.
role: A physician of spirit and body, a meritorious role that can lead to leadership on Mars.

key_quotes.text: 'Toof-nef-tef is the name given on the planet Mars to the chief of all the three-brained beings breeding there, that is, he corresponds to the being who, on your planet, is called 'king.'
A plef-perf-noof is almost the same as a zirlikner on our planet and a physician on your planet Earth.

on almost all the planets of our Great Universe, and likewise on the other planets of the solar system Ors, a being becomes a chief over other beings by his merit, and most often by the merit he has acquired as a plef-perf-noof, or physician—that is, a physician of the spirit as well as of the body.
He was then a plef-perf-noof on Just that part of the surface of the planet where I and all who accompanied me had established our place of residence.

definition: Plusiocrats were the name given to a type of being in ancient Greece, who centuries later came to be known as 'plutocrats.' These individuals are described as 'scoundrels of the deepest dye,' thoroughly 'saturated' with 'hasnamussery,' and acquiring 'force' and 'power' through 'ill-gotten gains.' They skillfully exploit honest and naive people to accumulate large quantities of 'money' and 'slaves.'
role: The ancient Greek term for individuals who exploit others to gain wealth and power, later called plutocrats.

key_quotes.text: Although these types also existed in ancient Greece they were then called 'plusiocrats.'

these types on their planet are scoundrels of the deepest dye, and are, so to speak, 'saturated to the marrow of their bones' with every kind of hasnamussery, and therefore a name had to be found that would fit them to perfection.

At first these beings in charge wished to 'exalt' them with some title corresponding to their inner significance, but on reflection, they were afraid to do this, because these terrestrial types, thanks to their 'ill-gotten gains,' had acquired 'force' and 'power' perhaps greater than that of their kings...

definition: Plutocrats are a specific type of terrestrial being, generally from the 'intelligentsia,' who have undergone a psychic transformation. They skillfully exploit honest and naive fellow countrymen to acquire significant 'money' and 'slaves' during their responsible existence. They are characterized as 'scoundrels of the deepest dye' and 'saturated' with 'hasnamussery,' and are a primary source of 'hasnamuss individuals.' Their name, 'plutocrat,' was coined seven or eight centuries ago, with the first part 'plut' derived from the Russian word for 'rogue' and the second part 'crat' from ancient Greek, allowing them to be called by their true nature while appearing honored. They satisfy their hasnamussian needs by influencing others through the function of 'trust.' In ancient Greece, these types were called 'plusiocrats.'
role: An exploitative terrestrial individual from the intelligentsia who accumulates wealth and power through deceit and preys on others' trust.

key_quotes.text: And as for the second of these names, that is, 'plutocrat,' this is applied to those beings of the 'intelligentsia' who, also after a certain transformation of their psyche, very artistically succeed during the period of their responsible existence in getting into their toils all the honest, that is, 'naive,' fellow countrymen they encounter, with the result that they become the owners of a large quantity of what are called 'money' and 'slaves.'
Bear in mind, in this connection, that it is from just these terrestrial types that most hasnamuss individuals arise.
Although these types also existed in ancient Greece they were then called 'plusiocrats.'
these types on their planet are scoundrels of the deepest dye, and are, so to speak, 'saturated to the marrow of their bones' with every kind of hasnamussery...

The first half of this word, however, was not taken from the ancient Greek, as was usually done, but from the Russian language They took the word 'plut,' which in Russian means 'rogue,' and thus obtained 'plutocrat.'
The only difference between the plutocrats and the theocrats is that to satisfy their hasnamussian needs, the former act upon those around them through the function they call 'trust'...

definition: Podkoolad is a sacred and extremely rare gradation or degree of Reason in the Great Megalocosmos. It represents the ultimate stage of Reason before the sacred Anklad, which itself is the highest Reason attainable by any being (third in degree from Absolute Reason). Beelzebub attained this level, and the Very Saintly Ashiata Shiemash is also described as possessing the Reason of the sacred Podkoolad, serving as a chief assistant to Endlessness. Attaining this Reason is considered a dream and a goal for spiritual struggle, offering a 'revivifying shock' against one's 'denying source.'
role: A sacred, very high, and rare gradation of Reason, one step below the highest attainable Reason, Anklad.

key_quotes.text: And all fell prostrate before Beelzebub because the fifth fork on his horns indicated that he had attained the Reason of the sacred 'Podkoolad,' which is the last gradation of Reason before the sacred Anklad.
But the Reason of the sacred Podkoolad, to which Beelzebub had perfected himself, is also very rare in the Universe
which power alone can lead us to that sacred Podkoolad attained by this son of our Common Father who, although he first

But if nothing could be done by that Being who has now the Reason of the sacred 'Podkoolad' and is one of the first assistants of our Endlessness in the government of the world, namely, the Very Saintly Ashiata Shiemash...
...one of the sacred Podkoolads of our Great Megalocosmos, before whom all will bow and before whom at this moment I have the happiness to stand.

definition: Poisoninoskirian refers to 'vibrations' that are produced in certain 'abstaining monks' on Earth—specifically 'thin monks'—instead of the expected deposits of fat. According to a theory by a Catholic monk, this phenomenon occurs because these monks, in their early years, zealously engage in an 'occupation' known to cause 'pimples' on young beings. This production of poisoninoskirian vibrations is attributed to the 'involutionary process of the exioëhary,' which intensifies the crystallization of the consequences of the organ Kundabuffer's properties within these monks.
role: A type of harmful vibration produced in certain abstaining monks due to specific past behaviors and psycho-physical conditions.

key_quotes.text: among certain of the abstaining monks produces 'poisoninoskirian vibrations' instead of deposits of fat, there even exists a very detailed 'theory,' worked out several centuries ago by a certain what is called 'Catholic monk,' who proved conclusively that this happens because in the first years of their existence these 'thin monks' busy themselves very zealously with that occupation from which, as is known even to contemporary medicine, 'pimples' generally appear on the faces of young beings there.

So that you may represent to yourself and fully understand the significance of this sort of abstinence among these contemporary monks, it remains for me to add that during my last sojourn on the planet Earth I became convinced that, thanks only to the results of the involutionary process of the exioëhary in these unfortunate terrestrial abstaining monks, the crystallization of various consequences of the properties of the organ kundabuffer in their common presence has become greatly facilitated and has therefore increased.

definition: A larger ivory slab that is part of a famous experimental apparatus called 'alla-attapan'. It receives seven colored rays, which have been concentrated and passed through a crystal after originating from a white ray. An apparatus opposite the 'polorishboorda' can isolate and direct any of these colored rays to another part of the 'alla-attapan'.
role: A component (specifically a larger ivory slab) in the experimental apparatus 'alla-attapan' used to process and direct colored light rays.

key_quotes.text: This slab, 'pirindjiel,' was so constructed and regulated that the colored rays falling on it were again concentrated, but this time in a different way, and passing through a second crystal, also of a special form, fell on another, but larger, ivory slab called 'polorishboorda.'

Opposite this 'polorishboorda' was a small apparatus of special construction through which, on its being shifted in a certain way, any colored ray which fell on the 'polorishboorda' could be isolated and directed further on to the third part of the alla-attapan called 'riank-pokhotartz.'

definition: A very learned being and the chief zirlikner of the planet Karatas, who shared Beelzebub's exile. After their pardon, he became an assistant to the Great Observer of the Megalocosmos, Arch-Seraph Ksheltarna. He also served as the inspector and manager of Beelzebub's observatory on the planet Mars and later as the 'oskianotsner' (educator) for Beelzebub's sons, enlightening their Reason and providing practical explanations about cosmic concentrations and their reciprocal influences.
role: A highly learned cosmic being, chief zirlikner of Karatas, an assistant to a Great Observer, and an educator of Beelzebub's sons.

key_quotes.text: among those who shared my exile from its very beginning was the chief zirlikner of our planet Karatas, the still young but already very learned Pooloodjistius, who, after our all-gracious pardon, was considered worthy to be, and still is today, an assistant to the Great Observer of the movements of all the concentrations of the Megalocosmos—His Self-Keepness the Arch-Seraph Ksheltarna.
And so, when I began to organize my observatory on the planet Mars, the learned Pooloodjistius proposed that I should take him as inspector and manager of this new establishment.
I asked this learned Pooloodjistius also to undertake the duty of 'oskianotsner' or, as your favorites would say, 'educator' of my children He consented with great readiness...

the good Pooloodjistius constantly enlightened their Reason and gave them practical explanations about observing various concentrations, the methods of studying their reciprocal influence, and the significance of these influences themselves.

definition: Synonymous with 'ossaniaki' or, as terrestrial learned beings call them, 'brain cells.' These are separate localized concentrations of cosmic substances within the head brain of three-brained beings. They are destined to fulfill the same purpose for the whole presence of each being as the perfected highest bodies of three-brained beings united with the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute or Protocosmos fulfill for the entire Great Universe.
role: The fundamental units (cells) of the head brain in three-brained beings, serving a high purpose in the being's overall presence and in the cosmic scheme.

key_quotes.text: The separate 'ossaniaki' or poptoplasts' of this localization or, as terrestrial learned beings call them, 'brain cells,' are destined to fulfill exactly the same purpose for the whole presence of each of them as is fulfilled for the whole of our Great Universe by the perfected highest bodies of three-brained beings who have already united themselves with the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute or Protocosmos.

key_quotes.text: which for our planet Karatas is the little planet of our solar system called 'Prnokh-Paiokh,' and for the planet Earth, its former fragments now called the 'Moon' and 'Anulios.'

definition: A product, also referred to as 'bread,' which is considered the most important first being-food for almost all three-brained beings in the Universe. It is made from a 'divine grain' (wheat). When prepared by beings aware of its sacred significance, it involves the crystallization of cosmic substances according to the Law of Triamazikamno, with water representing the Holy Affirming principle, flour from the wheat grain representing the Holy Denying principle, and fire representing the Holy Reconciling principle. However, when made by contemporary beings on certain continents without consciousness or proper processing (such as 'scraping,' 'combing,' 'smoothing,' and 'polishing' the wheat to destroy active elements), it becomes useless, containing nothing beneficial for consumption, and instead produces noxious gases and 'intestinal worms'.
role: A vital first being-food, essentially 'bread,' intended to have sacred significance and provide renewal of expended being-data, but can become harmful due to improper preparation.

key_quotes.text: the product called 'prosphora,' which they themselves name 'bread.'
this divine gram from which 'prosphora' is made.

Hence it is, my boy, that the prosphora, or bread, made from the wheat that arises in such abundance on this continent now contains nothing useful for the beings who consume it, and from its consumption there is produced in their presences nothing but noxious gases and what are called there 'intestinal worms.'

Prosphora, or bread, is generally made everywhere by beings who are aware of its sacred significance Only your contemporary favorites prepare it without any consciousness of what they do, merely as a practice automatically transmitted to them by inheritance.

In this bread the crystallization of cosmic substances proceeds, as always, in accordance with the Law of Triamazikamno, whose three holy forces are represented by substances from three relatively independent sources, namely the Holy Affirming, or active principle, is represented by the totality of cosmic substances composing what your favorites call 'water', the Holy Denying, or passive principle, by the totality of substances composing what your favorites call 'flour,' obtained from the divine wheat grain, and the Holy Reconciling, or neutralizing principle, by the substances obtained from burning, or as your favorites say, from 'fire.'
