definition: The Protocosmos is described as the 'Most Holy' and 'Most Most Holy Sun Absolute'. It is a fundamental cosmic entity that fulfills a totality of functions for the entire Megalocosmos (the present world, composed of all cosmoses). The perfected highest bodies of three-brained beings can unite with the Protocosmos to fulfill a purpose for the whole Great Universe. The relationship of second-order newly arisen suns to the Megalocosmos is analogous to the relationship of the spinal marrow to the head brain, which in turn corresponds to the relationship of the Most Most Holy Protocosmos.
role: A fundamental and Most Holy cosmic entity, identical with the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute, which fulfills functions for the entire Megalocosmos.

key_quotes.text: I once told you that in them, as in us, the head is the place of concentration of cosmic substances, the total functioning of which corresponds exactly to the totality of functions that our Most Holy Protocosmos fulfills for the entire Megalocosmos.

The separate 'ossaniaki' or poptoplasts' of this localization or, as terrestrial learned beings call them, 'brain cells,' are destined to fulfill exactly the same purpose for the whole presence of each of them as is fulfilled for the whole of our Great Universe by the perfected highest bodies of three-brained beings who have already united themselves with the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute or Protocosmos.

Further, in each of them, in what is called their 'spinal column,' another concentration is localized, called the 'spinal marrow,' which contains those 'denying sources' that in their functioning fulfill precisely the same role in relation to the head brain as the second-order newly arisen suns of the Megalocosmos fulfill in relation to the Most Most Holy Protocosmos.

definition: The exact term 'Pseudo Being-impulse' is not present in the provided passages. However, the passages discuss various 'being-impulses' that arise in beings. Some are described as divine (like Conscience), while others are negative tendencies that a being might need to overcome (like 'self-love,' 'pride,' 'vanity,' and 'naloo-ossnian impulses' such as depravity, the urge to destroy, and the striving 'to be not what one is'). Other general being-impulses mentioned include joy, sorrow, and religiousness. Without the specific term 'Pseudo Being-impulse,' it is not possible to define it from the given text.
role: Not enough context provided in the passages. The specific term is not present.

key_quotes.text: First of all, he decided to attain without delay the 'potency' that would give him the force and the possibility to be absolutely sincere with himself, that is, to be able to overcome those impulses which had become habitual in the functioning of his common presence from the many heterogeneous associations arising in him from all sorts of accidental shocks, coming from outside and also engendered within, namely, the impulses called 'self-love,' 'pride,' 'vanity,' and so on.

And if these different aspects of the entire 'spectrum of naloo-ossnian impulses' were described according to the notions of your favorites and expressed in their language, they might be defined as follows: 1 Every kind of depravity, conscious as well as unconscious, 2 The feeling of self-satisfaction from leading others astray, 3 The irresistible urge to destroy the existence of other breathing creatures, 4 The inclination to free oneself from the necessity of making the being-efforts required by Nature, 5 The tendency to make use of every kind of artifice to conceal what in the opinion of others are one's physical defects, 6 Serene enjoyment in the use of what is not personally deserved, 7 The striving to be not what one is

And so, my boy, when the data arose in the common presence of your favorites for engendering this peculiar being-impulse of egoism, this 'unique property'—evolving gradually and giving rise to factors for other, also peculiar, but secondary being-impulses—took the place of a Unique All-Autocratic Ruler in their general organization; and then, not only every manifestation of that divine being-impulse of Conscience but even the faintest stirring of that impulse became a hindrance to the actions of this All-Autocratic Ruler

definition: The 'Psycho-organic Need to Wiseacre' is a specific property fixed in the psyche of terrestrial three-brained beings ('your favorites') since the time of the loss of Atlantis. It is described as a 'very peculiar' or 'special' psycho-organic need, which has formed particularly over the last twenty centuries. Its primary manifestation is that individuals feel 'absolutely obliged' to 'teach others sense' or 'put them on the right road'. This need is also formulated as 'An irresistible thirst to be considered learned by beings around them like themselves,' and it engenders a tendency called 'cunning wiseacring'.
role: A fixed property in the psyche of terrestrial three-brained beings, characterized by an irresistible urge to teach others or be considered learned, leading to 'cunning wiseacring'.

key_quotes.text: Owing to this 'feature' of their strange psyche, another very peculiar 'psycho-organic' need has been formed in them during the last twenty centuries.
The chief manifestation of this psycho-organic need of theirs consists in this, that each of them feels absolutely obliged, as they say, 'to teach others sense' or 'to put them on the right road.
special 'psycho-organic need' which in their speech might be formulated thus: 'An irresistible thirst to be considered learned by beings around them like themselves.'
And this psycho-organic need began to engender in them that strange tendency I have spoken about many times, which they call 'cunning wiseacring.'
As I have already told you, my boy, from the time of the loss of Atlantis the property called the 'psycho-organic need to wiseacre' had become fixed in the psyche of your favorites.

definition: This term is used to describe a type of 'investigations'. The passages do not provide further details on what these investigations entail or what specific phenomena the term refers to beyond the general context of observations and the 'psyche' of beings.
role: A descriptor for a type of investigation.

key_quotes.text: very minute what are called "psycho-physico-astrological" investigations— through the hole in the window pane made by our crazy lame goat, there poured vibrations of sound from an Edison phonograph in the neighbor's house, while the midwife who delivered me had in her mouth a lozenge saturated with cocaine of German make, moreover not ersatz, which she was sucking to the sound of the music without the proper enjoyment.

definition: Purgatory is referred to as a 'Holy Planet'. It is described as 'the heart, as it were, and place of concentration of all the final results of the pul-' (the sentence is incomplete in the provided text). Events that happen on this planet have a 'common-cosmic character' and are connected with the 'individuality of every relatively independent responsible Individual'. The 'All-Embracing, Uni-Being Autocrat Endlessness' appears there often, and members of Beelzebub's genealogical tree were involuntarily involved in events on this planet. Beelzebub's cosmic ship, Karnak, departs from this planet.
role: A Holy Planet, cosmic heart and concentration point for final results, often visited by Endlessness.

key_quotes.text: I must not fail to tell you, my boy, the history of the events that recently happened on this Holy Planet Purgatory, first of all because they have a common-cosmic character and are connected with the individuality of every relatively independent responsible Individual, and second, because certain members of our 'genealogical tree' were the involuntary cause of these events.
CHAPTER 39 The Holy Planet Purgatory
In any case, you must first of all be told that this holy planet, which is called 'Purgatory,' is the heart, as it were, and place of concentration of all the final results of the pul-

Grandfather, oh, dear Grandfather! Explain to me, please, why, as my Uncle Tooilan told me, does our All-Embracing, Uni-Being Autocrat Endlessness appear so often upon that holy planet where we have just been?

definition: Raoorkh is an individual who is the 'heir' and 'godson' of Gornahoor Harharkh. His responsible existence is devoted to the detailed study of the omnipresent substance Okidanokh. He has attained profound knowledge of Okidanokh, having 'smelled out its very essence'. His scientific attainments were so significant that they led Gornahoor Harharkh to completely abandon his own long-held convictions and inventions related to Okidanokh, causing Gornahoor Harharkh to agree with Raoorkh's opinion on the matter.
role: The heir and godson of Gornahoor Harharkh, a being dedicated to and having attained deep knowledge of the substance Okidanokh.

key_quotes.text: On the evening of our arrival there, I asked this essence-friend of mine during friendly conversation how the existence of his heir was proceeding; I was referring to my dear 'external kesdjanian result' or, as your favorites would say, my 'godson,' Gornahoor Raoorkh.

He thanked me and said that Raoorkh's existence was proceeding quite well, and that he had already become his heir in all respects, having even made the aim of his responsible existence, as he himself had done, the detailed study of the omnipresent substance Okidanokh.
After pausing a little, he added that as regards the knowledge he had attained of the cosmic substance Okidanokh, his heir had already, as he expressed it, 'smelled out its very essence.'

He then said that, thanks to the results of his heir's scientific attainments, not only had all the factors for every conviction previously crystallized in his own being through long years of persevering labors now been totally decrystallized, but he had even destroyed all his inventions for investigating this omnipresent cosmic substance, including his famous 'nonradiating lamp', and, with a deep sigh, he concluded: 'I am now in full agreement with the opinion of the "result of my all" that it was the greatest misfortune for me to have been occupied so long with this, in the objective sense, absolutely "irredeemable sin. " '

definition: Rascooarno is a 'sacred process' or 'sacred cosmic actualization', often referred to as 'principal and final'. It is explicitly equated with 'death' for certain types of beings, specifically hasnamuss of the first kind. For these beings, the process of rascooarno begins during their planetary existence and proceeds in stages, with their 'separate spiritualized localizations' (brains) gradually ceasing to function one by one before final death. After the 'final sacred rascooarno', the 'highest being-part' can become an independent Individual with its own individual Reason. There was also a 'second process of the sacred rascooarno' in former times, after which beings could unite with the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute or go to other cosmic concentrations. If cosmic arisings have not achieved the required 'gradation of Reason' at the approach of the final rascooarno, their 'highest being-parts' must continue to exist in a certain sphere until perfected. Instances of the sacred rascooarno are rare among beings with longer lifespans. It is also mentioned as an event that occurred to 'the great twin brothers' and as a process after which religious teachings began to arise.
role: A sacred, often final, cosmic process equivalent to death or a transformative stage, leading to the independence of a being's highest part.

key_quotes.text: And only at the end of a certain time does the principal and final sacred rascooarno occur to this 'two-natured arising,' after which the 'highest being-part' becomes an independent Individual with its own individual Reason.

Formerly, that is, prior to the 'chootboglitanical period,' it was only after the second process of the sacred rascooarno that this sacred cosmic actualization became worthy of being united with the presence of our Most Most Holy Sun Absolute or went to other cosmic concentrations where such independent holy Individuals were needed.

For the hasnamuss of the first kind, who acquires this 'something' while consisting only of a planetary body, the decomposition of his planetary body does not proceed according to the general rule, that is to say, all the various sensed impulses in his organism do not stop functioning simultaneously at the approach of the sacred rascooarno, that is, death.

But the process of the sacred rascooarno already begins in him during his planetary existence and proceeds in stages, that is, one by one his 'separate spiritualized localizations' gradually cease to function in his common presence—or, as your favorites would say, in such a being first one of his brains with all its functions dies, later on, the second one dies, and only then does the final death of the being occur.
This notion no doubt appeared because the beings of our tribe had a duration of existence much longer than theirs, and hence instances of the sacred rascooarno among us were rare.

definition: The term 'Rascooarnos' (plural) is only directly referred to as 'instances of the sacred rascooarno' which were rare among beings with longer lifespans. Based on the singular 'rascooarno', 'Rascooarnos' would denote multiple occurrences or processes of the sacred event described as 'death' or a final transformation for beings.
role: Multiple occurrences or instances of the sacred process of 'rascooarno' (death or transformation).

key_quotes.text: This notion no doubt appeared because the beings of our tribe had a duration of existence much longer than theirs, and hence instances of the sacred rascooarno among us were rare. And it may even that in that period this sacred process did not chance to occur to any of our tribe.

definition: Sakoor is a great comet belonging to the solar system 'Vuanik', also known as 'the Madcap'. This comet always leaves a gas called 'zilnotrago' in its track, which can disorganize the functions of a being's planetary body if encountered.
role: A great comet.

key_quotes.text: the great comet belonging to that solar system and named 'Sakoor' or, as it is sometimes called, 'the Madcap.'

And as Your Right Reverence certainly knows, this mad comet always leaves a great deal of 'zilnotrago' in its track, which on entering the planetary body of a being disorganizes most of its functions until all the zilnotrago has been volatilized.

definition: Sakronakari was the initial name given to an entire region through which a great river flowed northward. This region's name was subsequently changed several times and is today known as 'Egypt'. The great river itself was then known as 'Nipilhooatchi' and is now called the 'Nile'. This area was settled by surviving members of the Akhldann Society and later by Beelzebub's tribe, who migrated there after a prophecy. The region contained structures for the observation of other suns and planets, and for intentionally directing atmospheric currents to achieve a desired climate. A large stone figure called the 'Sphinx', reminiscent of the 'Conscience' emblem of the Akhldann Society, stood at the main entrance to a vast enclosure of these structures.
role: An ancient name for the region now known as Egypt.

key_quotes.text: The entire region through which this great river flowed they first named 'Sakronakari.' This name was afterward changed several times and today that region is called 'Egypt,' while the great river then known as 'Nipilhooatchi,' is now, as I have already said, called the 'Nile.'
All these structures occupied a fairly large area in that locality and were enclosed within a special lattice fence made of the plant known there as 'zalnakatar.'

It is very interesting to note here that at the main entrance to that vast enclosure they had erected a rather large stone figure—large of course in comparison with the size of their presences—called the 'Sphinx,' which strongly reminded me of the statue I had seen on my first descent in person to your planet in the city of Samlios, just opposite the enormous building belonging to the learned Society of Akhldanns, which was then known as the 'principal cathedral' of this society.

definition: Salnichissinooarnian Momentum-Vibrations are a type of vibration, also referred to as 'rays' by most beings, that should issue from a process where two active parts of the Omnipresent Okidanokh strive to reblend into a whole within a vacuum. This phenomenon was demonstrated by Gornahoor Harharkh in an apparatus called 'hrakhartzakha'. Although these vibrations typically do not issue from the interior of the apparatus where the particularities of the Omnipresent Okidanokh are studied, a specific wall in the invention was designed to allow them to pass through, enabling beings outside to evaluate the force of this process.
role: Vibrations or 'rays' resulting from the reblending of active parts of the Omnipresent Okidanokh.

key_quotes.text: 'One of the advantages of my new invention for the demonstration of this phenomenon is that in spite of the extraordinary power of the "force of striving" now proceeding there, the "salnichissinooarnian momentum-vibrations," which should issue from this process, and which most beings regard as "rays," do not issue from the place of their arising, that is, the interior of this apparatus, where the particularities of the Omnipresent Okidanokh are being studied.

'But in order that beings who are outside this part of my invention may evaluate the force of this process, I purposely made the wall in one place out of a material which allows the "salnichissinooarnian momentum-vibrations," or "rays," to pass through.'

definition: Salzmanino is a solar system located on the direct route between the Holy Planet Purgatory and the planet Deskaldino. It comprises numerous cosmic concentrations whose purpose, within the general trogoautoegocratic process, is the transformation and radiation of the substance 'zilnotrago'. Its presence makes direct travel through it difficult for the ship Karnak.
role: A solar system with cosmic concentrations for cosmic substance transformation, acting as an obstacle to direct travel.

key_quotes.text: there lies the solar system called 'Salzmanino,' which includes numerous cosmic concentrations destined, for purposes of the general trogoautoegocratic process, for the transformation and radiation of the substance 'zilnotrago', and therefore it will scarcely be possible for our ship Karnak to fall in a direct line through this system

definition: Samlios was a city located on the continent of Atlantis. In its time, it was considered 'the source and the place of concentration of the results attained in the sense of the perfecting of their Reason' or, as contemporary beings would say, their chief 'center of culture'. The city had a treasury and served as a meeting place for Beelzebub's tribe. It housed the principal 'cathedral' of the learned Society of Akhldanns and displayed a statue called 'Conscience,' which was the society's emblem.
role: A significant city on the continent of Atlantis, once considered a 'center of culture' and associated with the Society of Akhldanns.

key_quotes.text: city of Samlios, just opposite the enormous building belonging to the learned Society of Akhldanns, which was then known as the 'principal cathedral' of this society.
The statue I saw in the city of Samlios and which greatly interested me was the emblem of the society, and was called 'Conscience.'
But soon on the planet Mars also his sources ran dry, and still the treasury of the city of Samlios demanded more and yet more, and there was no end in sight.
So, my boy, when we arrived in the city of Samlios I was met by all the beings of our tribe who had remained on that planet, both old and young.

behave just as unbecomingly as the beings of the city of Samlios on the continent of Atlantis, which in its day was considered 'the source and the place of concentration of the results attained in the sense of the perfecting of their Reason'—or as contemporary beings would say, their chief 'center of culture'

definition: The Samliosian Civilization was a period during which beings on the continent of Atlantis developed and meticulously observed specific customs. These customs aimed at the effective fulfillment of two being-duties: the perfection of their higher bodies and the service of the Most Great Cosmic Trogoautoegocrat, often achieved by uniting and performing both duties simultaneously.
role: A historical period and associated culture on the continent of Atlantis, characterized by specific being-duties and customs.

key_quotes.text: And so the beings of that period, which was then called the 'Samliosian civilization,' devised and very scrupulously practiced certain customs that contributed to the fulfillment of those being-duties in the most effective way.

These beings of the continent of Atlantis even devised a wise and practical means of fulfilling these two being-duties—namely, the duty of perfecting their higher bodies and the duty of serving the Most Great Cosmic Trogoautoegocrat—by uniting them into one and performing them simultaneously.

definition: Samoniks is a city located in the country of Tikliamish on the planet Earth. At one point, it was regarded as the chief 'center of culture' for all three-brained beings on that planet. It was the first place where important beings from most Asiatic communities assembled with the aim of creating a common agreement to prevent reciprocal destruction.
role: A city that was once a 'center of culture' and the site of an early attempt at a peace-keeping society.

key_quotes.text: It was in the city of 'Samoniks' in the country of Tikliamish, which was then regarded as the chief 'center of culture' for all the three-brained beings of this peculiar planet of yours.

Then for the first time important beings from most of the communities of the continent of Asia assembled in that city with the aim of drawing up a common agreement, so that among the different Asiatic communities there would never again arise any cause whatever for the process of reciprocal destruction.

definition: Saonoltooriko is identified as a branch of general knowledge. The text states that this branch of knowledge "somewhat resembl[es]" what the beings of Earth call 'medicine'.
role: A branch of general knowledge, analogous to medicine.

key_quotes.text: For these experiments of mine I was even obliged to have recourse to those branches of general knowledge which we call 'saonoltooriko,' 'gasometronoltooriko,' and 'sakookinoltooriko,' somewhat resembling what is found among your favorites under the names of 'medicine,' 'physiology,' and 'hypnotism.'

definition: Sarnuonino is a specific anatomical location found in boys. It is described as being at the end of the 'genital member,' specifically between the 'toolkhtotino' and the 'sarnuonino' itself, where the residue of the substance 'kulnabo' is discharged. The text clarifies that 'sarnuonino' corresponds to what contemporary medicine calls the 'prepuce penis'.
role: A specific male anatomical part (prepuce penis).

key_quotes.text: Great Nature has so arranged it that after its utilization, the residue of this substance is discharged from the organism, in boys at the place between the 'toolkhtotino' and the 'sarnuonino,'

what are called 'toolkhtotino' and 'sarnuonino' correspond to what contemporary medicine calls 'glans penis' and 'prepuce penis,' and are found at the end of what is called the 'genital member' in boys

definition: Saroonoorishan is a 'great' being and is described as Beelzebub's 'first educator.' He is considered the 'primary cause of the spiritualization of all the parts of my genuine common presence,' and the 'prime creator of my genuine being-existence.' His permanent place of existence is the planet Deskaldino. Beelzebub expresses an 'inextinguishable being-impulse of gratitude' towards him and seeks his 'creator-benediction.'
role: Beelzebub's 'first educator' and 'creator of genuine being-existence,' a great being of profound significance to Beelzebub.

key_quotes.text: the planet Deskaldino is the permanent place of existence of the great Saroonoorishan, my first educator, who was, so to say, the primary cause of the spiritualization of all the parts of my genuine common presence.
I should like to take advantage of the opportunity... to prostrate myself at the feet of the prime creator of my genuine being
an inextinguishable being-impulse of gratitude arose in me toward the great Saroonoorishan.
have the happiness of greeting the great Saroonoorishan, the creator of my genuine being-existence, and receive what was most dear and most precious to me, his 'creator-benediction.'

definition: Satkaine is a 'means' specifically invented by German beings. It is synonymous with 'samookoorooazar' and is described as one of the seven 'neutralizing gases' that arise and are always found in the common presence.
role: A neutralizing gas, also known as samookoorooazar, invented by German beings.

key_quotes.text: The first of these 'means, specially invented by the German beings, namely 'satkaine,' is nothing other than 'samookoorooazar,' that is, one of the seven 'neutralizing gases' that arise and are always to be found in the common presence.

definition: The Second Being-Food consists of 'second-sourced' cosmic substances, which originate from the transformations of a solar system's sun and its planets. These substances enter the atmosphere through radiations and are absorbed by beings for further evolutionary transformation, likened to the 'air' they breathe. Its primary function is for the coating and maintenance of a being's 'second being-body.' Beings of the continent of Atlantis called it 'amarloos,' meaning 'help for the moon.' While its absorption continues, for contemporary beings who have lost the 'fulasnitamnian principle,' certain elements now primarily serve to assist the transformation of the first being-food and remove utilized elements from the planetary body. Unlike the first being-food, it is crucial for the 'higher parts' of a being's presence. In contemporary beings, it enters spontaneously without conscious intention, only in the quantity required for common-cosmic harmony and species continuation. Historically, after the destruction of the organ kundabuffer, beings consciously utilized this higher being-food, and in its final period, Atlantean beings considered its absorption a central purpose of their existence. The intentional cessation of its absorption led to the disappearance of the striving for self-perfection and 'intentional contemplation.'
role: Cosmic substances (like air) that nourish a being's 'second being-body' and aid in evolutionary transformation, historically known as 'amarloos'.

key_quotes.text: The 'second-sourced' substances, arising from the transformations of their own sun and of all the other planets of their solar system, and which penetrate the atmosphere of their planet through the radiations of the latter, enter into them for further evolutionary transformation, again just as with us, as the 'second being-food,' which is, as they say, the 'air' they breathe, and it is these substances in the air that serve for the coating and maintenance of the existence of their 'second being-body.'

As regards the second kind of being-food, the absorption of which continues among beings even until now, ever since your favorites lost the possibility of existing according to the fulasnitamnian principle certain of its elements continue to serve only for assisting the transformation of the first being-food and for removing from the planetary body certain elements that have already been utilized.

The beings of the continent of Atlantis then named the second being-food 'amarloos,' which meant 'help for the moon,' and they named the third being-food the sacred 'amarkhoodan,' which signified for them 'help for God.'

Although these sacred substances of the higher being-food have never ceased to enter into them, they enter, particularly in contemporary beings, only spontaneously, without any participation of their conscious intention, and only in the amount required for the transformations proceeding through them for the purposes of the common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic harmony and for the automatic continuation of their species demanded by Nature.

definition: Sensiminiriko is a terrestrial three-brained being who, along with Poundoliro, became a genuine 'initiate' on the planet Earth before the 'Ashiatan' epoch. His highest being-parts had already been coated to the gradation called 'completion' and he later perfected these parts to the required gradation of sacred Objective Reason. His perfected highest being-parts now exist on the Holy Planet Purgatory. He was also a co-founder of the 'Tchaftantoori Brotherhood'.
role: A genuine terrestrial initiate and co-founder of the Tchaftantoori Brotherhood.

key_quotes.text: One of these two terrestrial beings who had become genuine initiates was named Poundoliro and the other, Sensiminiriko.

You should know, by the way, that in the common presences of both of these genuine terrestrial initiates their highest being-parts had already been coated to the gradation called 'completion,' and that, during their further existence, they had time to perfect these highest parts of theirs to the required gradation of sacred Objective Reason, thus today, their perfected highest being-parts have become worthy to have, and in fact do have, the place of their existence on the Holy Planet Purgatory.

This brotherhood was founded five of their years before the arrival of the Very Saintly Ashiata Shiemash on the initiative of two terrestrial three-brained beings who had become genuine 'initiates' according to the principles existing before the 'Ashiatan' epoch.

definition: Serooazar refers to a great holy sacrament related to the continuation of species, which is considered the most sacred of all divine sacraments in the Great Universe. On the planet Earth, the period for this sacred act is known as 'spring days', and on the planet Karatas, these periods are called 'dianosks of the holy sacrament of the great Serooazar' or 'helping-God dianosks'. It involves the fulfillment, for the continuation of species, of the substances of 'being-exioëhary', through the fusion of two kinds (affirming and denying principles) transformed by 'beings-apparatuses' known as 'actavas' (male sex) and 'passavas' (female sex).
role: A sacred cosmic sacrament for the continuation of species, marked by specific holy days.

key_quotes.text: We will talk about the 'holy sacrament of Serooazar' when we return to our dear Karatas.

There I will explain to you in detail where and how the holy sacrament of Serooazar for the continuation of the species is fulfilled with the substances of 'being-exioëhary,' and on what occasions and in what way the fusion and subsequent results of the two kinds of 'being-exioëhary' are obtained...
...the period called, by three-brained beings everywhere, the 'dianosks of the holy sacrament of the great Serooazar,' known on the planet which interests you as 'spring days.'
Perhaps, my boy, you do not yet know anything about the 'holy sacrament of the great Serooazar'?

definition: Shat-chai-mernis is a science, discussed by Beelzebub and Hadji Asvatz Troov, that deals exclusively with the nature and significance of vibrations in general, including the laws of the vibrations of sound. Hadji Asvatz Troov, a venerable dervish who used to make stringed instruments, became interested in this science through studying sound vibrations and devoted the rest of his life to its practical aspects, achieving results scarcely attainable by contemporary terrestrial three-brained beings.
role: A science focused on the nature and laws of vibrations.

key_quotes.text: In the course of our conversation, which dealt exclusively with the science called at that time 'shat-chai-mernis,' while speaking of the nature and significance of vibrations in general, we came to mention the octave of sound...
'I myself became interested in the science of "shat-chai-mernis" through studying the laws of the vibrations of sound, and they were the cause of my devoting the rest of my life to this science.'

...my dervish acquaintance told him, among other things, that I too was very interested in the science of 'shat-chai-mernis,' and then explained briefly what I already knew about it and what in general we had discussed before.

From the conversation that followed, I learned that this venerable Hadji Asvatz Troov had been interested in this science for a long time, and that during the last ten years he had been studying it exclusively in its practical aspect.

definition: A 'sherakhoorian concoction' refers to a corrupted or distorted version of the Islamic divine teaching. It was produced when power-possessing beings with hasnamussian properties, acting for their egoistic and political aims, added their own invented 'spices' to the original teaching. This transformation of the teaching was so profound that its 'secret' would be envied by European 'pastry cooks' and 'chefs', implying a complex and artful perversion.
role: A term describing a corrupted version of a divine teaching.

key_quotes.text: The power-possessing beings of certain communities began to 'season' this divine teaching, for their hasnamussian aims, with such 'spices' of their own invention that a 'sherakhoorian concoction' was produced, the secret of which would be the envy of all the famous contemporary European 'pastry cooks' and 'chefs.'

definition: Sikt Ner Tchorn is one of two religious rites created by the Great Moses, specifically for boys, and its practice was obligatory. It is described as being identical to 'sooniat' and consisted of cutting the 'vojiano' or 'frenum penis' of boys. This procedure severed the connection between the head of the genital member and its covering skin (the 'prepuce penis'), allowing the skin free movement. The purpose of this rite, as intended by Moses who was a medical authority, was to ensure that substances accumulating in these areas would be mechanically eliminated, thereby preventing a 'maleficent itching.' It was created to counteract the negative effects of clothing which destroyed natural protection for these organs. While its companion rite for girls ('tziel pootz kann') ceased after King Solomon's death, 'sikt ner tchorn' continued to be performed automatically, reaching contemporary Jewish people. It was also adopted by followers of the Christian religion, who observed it strictly at first, but it later disappeared from their practice and its memory was lost among them.
role: A religious rite of male circumcision.

key_quotes.text: 'The contents of this papyrus made it clear that the Great Moses put into practice the ideas set down on this question in the book Tookha Tess Nalool Pan by creating for his people those two religious rites, one of which was called "sikt ner tchorn" and the other "tziel pootz kann."'
'The sacred "sikt ner tchorn" was specially created for boys and the sacred "tziel pootz kann" for girls, their practice was obligatory.'

'The rite of "sikt ner tchorn" for instance, was identical with your "sooniat " It consisted in cutting what is called the "vojiano" or the "frenum penis" of boys, whereby the connection is severed between the head of the genital member and the skin covering it, thus permitting the free movement of this skin or, as it is called, the "prepuce penis."'

'Moses ... wished by this means to make sure that, through all kinds of accidental contacts, the totality of substances accumulating in the places I spoke of would of itself be mechanically eliminated, and thus cease to become a factor for the arising of that maleficent itching.'

'These two rites were created by the Great Moses and introduced into the ordinary life of the Jewish people to counteract that maleficent invention of clothes, thanks to which those factors were destroyed which had been provided by Nature for the protection of those organs from the harmful action of the substances they secrete, and these two rites were transmitted from generation to generation, both to the followers of the Judaic religion and to others who took over these useful rites almost unchanged.'

'It was only after the death of the great King Solomon that the rite of "tziel pootz kann" ceased to be observed even by the followers of the Judaic religion, and only the rite of "sikt ner tchorn" continued to be performed automatically, and reached the contemporary representatives of that race.'

definition: Sinkraga is the name of a small continent located near the continent of Grabontzi, which is now called 'Africa.' During the second 'transapalnian perturbation' to the 'ill-fated planet' (Earth), Sinkraga, like Atlantis, entered within the planet, taking everything on it with it. A copy of the 'boolmarshano' (a work by Makary Kronbernkzion) was assigned to a cathedral on this continent.
role: A small continent that disappeared within the Earth.

key_quotes.text: 'One of these copies, as my 'spipsychoonalnian investigations' showed, was then assigned to the cathedral of a small continent named 'Sinkraga,' which lay not far from the continent of Grabontzi.'
'During the second transapalnian perturbation to that ill-fated planet, this small continent of Sinkraga, in the same way as Atlantis, entered within the planet with all that was on it.'

'As for the continent of Grabontzi or, as it is now called, 'Africa,' it did not entirely disappear within the depths of the planet, but suffered the same fate as other still existing continents, for instance Asia, that is, certain parts of it were engulfed, and in their place others rose from beneath the waters and became joined to the remaining parts, forming the continent as it is at the present time.'

definition: Sirklinimana is a sensation experienced by three-brained beings, which they describe as 'feeling out of sorts.' This sensation is invariably accompanied by 'mechanical suffering.' It arises when these beings fail to remove the 'sacred substance, exioëhary' from themselves in the mechanical ways that had become customary or, more specifically, when this substance (continuously formed for the continuation of their species) is not utilized normally through the sacred process 'elmooarno' with the opposite sex. The text indicates that this sensation occurred when male beings resorted to 'moordoorten' and 'androperasty' (onanism and pederasty), or when women sought 'partners' among other forms of beings for the removal of this substance, after being obliged to exist without beings of the opposite sex for several years.
role: A sensation described as 'feeling out of sorts' and accompanied by 'mechanical suffering,' arising from the improper removal of a sacred substance.

key_quotes.text: they did not remove it from themselves in ways that by then had become mechanical, they naturally experienced a sensation called 'sirklinimana,' a state they describe as 'feeling out of sorts,' and which is invariably accompanied by what is called 'mechanical suffering.'

Well then, they like ourselves are only 'keschapmartnian' beings, and when this sacred substance, continuously and inevitably formed in them, is utilized normally for the continuation of their species by means of the sacred process 'elmooarno,' its removal from their presences must be accomplished exclusively with the opposite sex.

The beings of the male sex had recourse to the antinatural means called 'moordoorten' and 'androperasty' or, as the contemporary beings would say, 'onanism' and 'pederasty,' and these antinatural means fully satisfied them.

definition: Solioonensius is a cosmic law. Its action on the common presence of terrestrial three-brained beings (referred to as 'your favorites') leads to the arousal of a 'need of freedom' and a sensation that strengthens the desire for changes in their ordinary being-existence. This 'need of freedom' is identified as the primary cause of various 'grievous processes,' such as 'Bolshevism.' The action of this law has occurred at least forty times on Earth since the 'loss of Atlantis.' Under its influence, certain beings act as 'leaders' and 'clamor,' initiating 'terrible processes' and 'excesses' that ultimately prove futile and worsen ordinary existence, leading to a deterioration of 'sane awareness.' When the action of Solioonensius concludes, a 'relatively normal' existence briefly resumes, but paradoxically leads to an increase in undesirable entities referred to as 'slugs,' 'snails,' 'lice,' 'cockroaches,' and other parasites.
role: A cosmic law that influences three-brained beings on Earth

key_quotes.text: But later, among the chief evils flowing from the conditions of ordinary being-existence established by them themselves, especially since there began to predominate in the presence of every terrestrial three-brained being their 'inner evil god' named 'self-calming,' it came about that under the action of Solioonensius, instead of the desire and striving for a more rapid self-perfecting, a 'something' began to arise in them which they themselves characterize by the words 'need of freedom,' which is the chief cause of the appearance of these grievous processes of theirs such as this recent 'Bolshevism. '

After the second transapalnian perturbation occurred to this ill-starred planet, that is, after the 'loss of Atlantis,' the action of the cosmic law of Solioonensius in the common presence of your favorites took place at least forty times, and each time, thanks to this strange need of freedom which

Under the influence of the action of Solioonensius, several beings from one or another group in whom data for engendering that strange impulse toward beings of other castes, particularly those of the ruling class, happen to have been crystallized more strongly than in the rest—see and feel reality more than the others and begin, as is said there, to 'clamor,' and these 'clamoring orators' become for those around them what at the present time are usually called 'leaders.'

And really, my boy, each time the action of Solioonensius comes to an end and a 'relatively normal' existence begins again among your favorites, the 'freshly baked' power-possessing beings 'cut those capers' thanks to which there is a constant increase in the birth rate of what are called 'slugs,' 'snails,' 'lice,' 'cockroaches,' and many similar parasites which destroy everything good on that planet.

definition: Solni is identified as a "great comet" located within the solar system known as 'Baleaooto.' In accordance with specific combinations of the 'common-cosmic harmonious movement,' Solni periodically approaches its sun, Baleaooto, very closely. This proximity compels Baleaooto to significantly increase its 'tension' to maintain its own path of falling. This heightened tension then propagates, affecting the suns of neighboring systems, including the system Ors, and subsequently all the concentrations within the Ors system, such as the planet Earth.
role: A great comet in the Baleaooto solar system

key_quotes.text: In this latter system, however, the 'center of gravity of causes' is determined by the presence, among the number of its concentrations, of a great comet, 'Solni,' which, in accordance with certain combinations of the 'common-cosmic harmonious movement,' comes at times in its falling very near to its sun Baleaooto, which is thereby forced greatly to increase its 'tension' in order to maintain the path of its own falling

This tension provokes the same in the suns of the neighboring systems, among which is the system Ors, and when in its turn the sun Ors increases its tension in order not to change the path of falling proper to it, it provokes the same tension in all the concentrations of its own system, among which is also the planet Earth.

definition: Solookhnorakhoona is described as an "enormous appliance" found in Gornahoor Harharkh's workshop. It is further explained as being what Earth's inhabitants (referred to as 'your favorites') would call 'a pump of complex construction for exhausting the atmosphere to the point of absolute vacuum.' Gornahoor Harharkh was observed interacting with this appliance by moving one of its parts with his left wing, thereby setting a mechanism in motion.
role: A complex pump for creating an absolute vacuum

key_quotes.text: At one side stood another enormous appliance which turned out to be a special kind of 'solookhnorakhoona,' or what your favorites would describe as a 'pump of complex construction for exhausting the atmosphere to the point of absolute vacuum.
While I was looking at all this with amazement, Gornahoor Harharkh went over to this complex pump and with his left wing moved one of its parts, thus putting a certain mechanism in motion

definition: Sooansotoorabitzo refers to two specific 'particularities' of a great law. These particularities were first observed by the two Chinese learned beings, Choon-Kil-Tess and Choon-Tro-Pel, and were added to the seven 'doostzakos' (clearly differentiated manifestations) of the law to form what they called the 'Law of Ninefoldness.' The term 'sooansotoorabitzo' itself signifies 'obligatory gap aspect of the unbroken flowing of the whole.' Through their extensive research, these learned beings determined that these particularities are consistently found at specific points in the process of this great law, within all the 'cosmic transitory results' they investigated.
role: Two particularities of a great law, signifying 'obligatory gap aspect of the unbroken flowing of the whole'

key_quotes.text: That branch of genuine knowledge, similar to the one known on the continent of Atlantis as the 'science of the seven aspects of every whole phenomenon,' they called the 'Law of Ninefoldness'; and they called it thus because they added to the seven clearly differentiated manifestations of this great law, which they called 'doostzakos,' the two particularities first observed by them which they named 'sooansotoorabitzo,' a word signifying 'obligatory gap aspect of the unbroken flowing of the whole '

And they named this law thus because during their exhaustive research they became convinced beyond doubt that in all the 'cosmic transitory results' they investigated, these particularities are necessarily found at specific places in the process of this great law.

definition: Soorptakalknian contemplation is described as a 'being-state' that any three-brained being can achieve if they have developed the necessary 'ableness' in their presence. Entering this state allows the being to perceive 'korkaptilnian thought-tapes' and comprehend their contents. These thought-tapes are said to be indestructible and maintain their integrity as long as the planet remains at the same 'tempo of movement' as when they first arose.
role: A being-state enabling the perception of 'korkaptilnian thought-tapes'

key_quotes.text: And however long a time may have passed, every three-brained being who has acquired in his presence the ableness to enter into the being-state called 'soorptakalknian contemplation' can perceive these 'korkaptilnian thought-tapes' and become aware of their contents'

definition: Spipsychoonalnian refers to a category of "means" or methods of investigation. Beelzebub states that he resorted to these means in addition to ordinary forms of investigation. 'Mediumism' is specifically mentioned as one of Beelzebub's 'spipsychoonalnian' means, which involves utilizing a special property of prepared mediums.
role: A type of investigative means, including mediumism

key_quotes.text: ordinary forms of investigation, to have recourse to this 'spipsychoonalnian' means as well.
Among these 'spipsychoonalnian' means of mine, I also resorted to what is called 'mediumism,' making use of that special property of the mediums I had prepared.

definition: Spirna is one of three entities, alongside 'martna' and 'okina.' Each of these entities is responsible for separately conceiving the arising of one of the three being-bodies within themselves. Through their specialized corresponding being-existences, spirna (and the other two) assist the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh in forming the respective being-body to perfection. At the moment of 'birth,' this perfectly formed being-body is then merged with the other two into a single unit. This process is described in the context of beings arising on the planet Modiktheo.
role: An entity involved in the conception and formation of being-bodies

key_quotes.text: ...namely martna, spirna, and okina, each separately conceive the arising of one of the three being-bodies within themselves and, owing to their special corresponding being-existences, aid the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh to form the given being-body to perfection and, at the moment of 'birth,' to merge it with the other bodies into one.

definition: A specific component or stage within the functioning of the 'sacred Heptaparaparshinokh,' which is a cosmic law. The subjective action of these components can be altered; for example, one might be lengthened to absorb surrounding forces (called the 'mechano-coinciding mdnelin'), another shortened to depend on external forces (called the 'intentionally actualized mdnelin'), and a third (like 'harnel-aoot') might become disharmonized as a result of changes to other stopinders.
role: A component or stage of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh cosmic law.

key_quotes.text: This change in the functioning of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh consisted in the alteration of what is called the 'subjective action' of three of its 'stopinders.' In one He lengthened the law-conformable duration, in another He shortened it, and in a third, disharmonized it.
And this is the stopinder of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh which is still called the 'mechano-coinciding mdnelin.'
And this stopinder of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh is the one that is still called the 'intentionally actualized mdnelin.'

As regards the third stopinder which was changed in its subjective action and which is fifth in the series and called 'harnel-aoot,' its disharmony came about by itself, simply as a result of the change of the other two stopinders.

definition: Multiple components or stages that constitute the 'sacred Heptaparaparshinokh,' a cosmic law. The subjective action of at least three of these stopinders was intentionally altered (lengthened, shortened, or disharmonized) by a higher being.
role: Multiple components or stages of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh cosmic law.

key_quotes.text: This change in the functioning of the sacred Heptaparaparshinokh consisted in the alteration of what is called the 'subjective action' of three of its 'stopinders.' In one He lengthened the law-conformable duration, in another He shortened it, and in a third, disharmonized it.

As regards the third stopinder which was changed in its subjective action and which is fifth in the series and called 'harnel-aoot,' its disharmony came about by itself, simply as a result of the change of the other two stopinders.

key_quotes.text: processes taking place nearby in intraplanetary and surplanetary arisings and decompositions, and owing to 'kindred vibrations,' and in accordance with surrounding conditions, its center-of-gravity vibrations blend and become part of the common presence of these definite intraplanetary or surplanetary formations in which these processes are taking place.

definition: A power or state that a three-brained being can possess, defined as 'the power not to be identified with and not to be affected by externals through one's inevitably inherent passions.' It was founded five years before the Very Saintly Ashiata Shiemash's arrival by two terrestrial three-brained beings, Poundoliro and Sensiminiriko, who had become genuine 'initiates.' Ashiata Shiemash entered into relations with its brethren and was involved in drawing up the brotherhood's rules or statutes.
role: A brotherhood of genuine initiates on Earth, associated with the Very Saintly Ashiata Shiemash.

key_quotes.text: On arriving there, he first of all entered into relations with the brethren of the 'Tchaftantoori Brotherhood,' which had its place of existence not far from that city, and whose name signified 'To be—or not to be at all.'

definition: A Teleoghinara is described as a materialized idea or thought that, after its arising, exists almost eternally in the atmosphere of the planet where it appeared, such as Earth. These can be formed from 'being-contemplation' of a high quality, actualized by three-brained beings who have coated their higher being-bodies and perfected their Reason to the degree of the sacred 'Martfotai.' A sequence of such materialized being-ideas concerning a specific event is called a 'korkaptilnian thought-tape.' Beelzebub learned about the history of the Society of Akhldanns from these teleoghinaras, which were intentionally fixed by an eternal Individual, Asoochilon. These thought-tapes are not destroyed and can be perceived by beings capable of 'soorptakalknian contemplation.'
role: A cosmic actualization; a materialized idea or thought that exists eternally in a planet's atmosphere, serving as a record of events, perceivable by highly developed beings.

key_quotes.text: I must first tell you that I learned about the history of this society through what are called 'teleoghinaras,' also found in the atmosphere of your planet Earth As you probably do not yet know exactly what a 'teleoghinara' is, try to transubstantiate in the corresponding parts of your common presence the information concerning this cosmic actualization.
A 'teleoghinara' is a materialized idea or thought, which after its arising exists almost eternally in the atmosphere of the planet where it appeared.

'Teleoghinaras' can be formed from being-contemplation of a quality such as only those three-brained beings have and can actualize who have coated in their presences their higher being-bodies, and have brought the perfecting of the Reason of these higher being-parts up to the degree of the sacred 'Martfotai ' And a sequence of being-ideas materialized in this way concerning a given event is called a 'korkaptilnian thought-tape.'

And so, my boy, I myself learned the details of the arising of the Society of Akhldanns partly from the texts of these 'teleoghinaras' and partly from numerous data I gathered much later when I made my usual detailed investigations concerning a highly important fact that interested me

definition: The Teskooano is an automatically controlled instrument or device that enhances the power of sight, capable of increasing the visibility of remote cosmic concentrations 7,000,285 times. It was installed by Beelzebub in his observatory on the planet Mars, allowing him to see and observe the processes of existence on other planets from Mars. It is also used by a governor of beings to gather information about three-brained beings on Earth, and can be used to probe peculiarities or ascertain convenient locations for travel, such as mooring a ship.
role: A powerful observational instrument, similar to a super-telescope or remote sensing device.

key_quotes.text: This governor of our beings gathers all his information about the three-brained beings of the planet Earth either from his own observations through the great teskooano I left him

Having said this, he put in front of my organ of sight an automatically controlled teskooano, then began to turn several switches on and off in a certain sequence; and as I looked through the teskooano, he gave me the following explanation
since it was quite impossible to try to probe this new peculiarity by means of the teskooano, I decided to go in person to the planet Earth

before our flight we had ascertained through the teskooano that the most convenient place both for our plan of travel—which was to reach the city of Babylon—and for the mooring of our ship Occasion would be that particular saliakooriapnian space of the surface of your planet.

I owe it entirely to his knowledge that I was later able to install in my observatory on the planet Mars that 'teskooano' which enhanced the power of my sight and, as is said, increased the visibility of remote cosmic concentrations 7, 000, 285 times.

by means of this teskooano I was able, even while staying at home on Mars, to see and observe relatively easily the processes of existence taking place on those parts of the surface of other planets of that solar system

definition: A Tetartocosmos is defined as a relatively independent "aggregate of microcosmoses" that arises and concentrates on the surface of planets due to the second-order cosmic law of "mutual attraction of the similar." These entities serve as "apparatuses for the Most Great Cosmic Trogoautoegocrat," transforming cosmic substances for both common-cosmic processes and their own existence. Their common presence can become composed of two independent formations from different cosmic sources, existing jointly, and they can develop "new coatings" which possess the inherent possibility of acquiring "individual Reason." Within a Tetartocosmos, "independent crystallizations" such as protoëhary, deuteroëhary, tritoëhary, tetartoëhary, pentoëhary, exioëhary, and resulzarion exist. The "reciprocal destruction of microcosmoses in the tetartocosmos" is a specific process that humans identify as epidemics (e.g., black death, cholera). Tetartocosmoses (plural) also emit radiations known as "hanbledzoïn" and can exhibit independent automatic movement on planetary surfaces.
role: A cosmic entity; an aggregate of microcosmoses that arises on planets, serves as an apparatus for cosmic processes, and can contain independent crystallizations and individualized coatings with the potential for Reason.

key_quotes.text: those 'aggregates of microcosmoses' that also became concentrated on the planets, this time thanks to the second-order cosmic law called 'mutual attraction of the similar,' were named 'tetartocosmoses.'
The radiations issuing from the tetartocosmoses they called 'hanbledzoïn.'

the effect of this divine attention directed toward these tetartocosmoses was that, while serving as apparatuses for the Most Great Cosmic Trogoautoegocrat, the possibility appeared in them that from among the cosmic substances transformed through them, both for the needs of this most great common-cosmic process and for the needs of the process of their own existence

the common presence of certain tetartocosmoses then began to be composed of two independent formations coming from two entirely different cosmic sources, and these formations began to have a Joint existence, as if one were placed within the other.
there usually arise and become widely propagated certain specific processes, called the 'reciprocal destruction of microcosmoses in the tetartocosmos'—processes which they look upon as epidemics
He graciously decided to use in the future those coatings that obtained independent individuality in the 'tetartocosmoses' as an aid for Himself in the administration of the enlarging world.
in each of the tetartocosmoses, that is, those relatively independent 'aggregates of microcosmoses' that had their arising on the surface of the planets
These independent crystallizations in tetartocosmoses were given the following names: 1 protoëhary 2 deuteroëhary 3 tritoëhary 4 tetartoëhary 5 pentoëhary 6 exioëhary 7 resulzarion

definition: Tetartocosmoses are a class of cosmic entities, defined as "aggregates of microcosmoses" that concentrate on the surface of planets, arising due to the "mutual attraction of the similar." They serve as "apparatuses for the Most Great Cosmic Trogoautoegocrat," transforming cosmic substances for both general cosmic processes and their own existence. This transformation can lead to the appearance of results from higher cosmic sources, composed of vibrations of greater "vivifyingness." Their common presence can be composed of two independent formations from different cosmic sources, existing jointly. New "coatings" or "independent formations" can be coated within them, which possess the inherent possibility of acquiring "individual Reason." They are also capable of independent automatic movement on the surface of planets under certain conditions. Within their presences, various "independent crystallizations" are found, including protoëhary, deuteroëhary, tritoëhary, tetartoëhary, pentoëhary, exioëhary, and resulzarion. The radiations issuing from Tetartocosmoses are called "hanbledzoïn."
role: A class of cosmic entities; aggregates of microcosmoses that arise on planets, act as cosmic apparatuses for transformation, and can develop independent formations with the potential for individual Reason.

key_quotes.text: those 'aggregates of microcosmoses' that also became concentrated on the planets, this time thanks to the second-order cosmic law called 'mutual attraction of the similar,' were named 'tetartocosmoses.'
The radiations issuing from the tetartocosmoses they called 'hanbledzoïn.'

the effect of this divine attention directed toward these tetartocosmoses was that, while serving as apparatuses for the Most Great Cosmic Trogoautoegocrat, the possibility appeared in them that from among the cosmic substances transformed through them, both for the needs of this most great common-cosmic process and for the needs of the process of their own existence

the common presence of certain tetartocosmoses then began to be composed of two independent formations coming from two entirely different cosmic sources, and these formations began to have a Joint existence, as if one were placed within the other.
in each of the tetartocosmoses, that is, those relatively independent 'aggregates of microcosmoses' that had their arising on the surface of the planets
These independent crystallizations in tetartocosmoses were given the following names: 1 protoëhary 2 deuteroëhary 3 tritoëhary 4 tetartoëhary 5 pentoëhary 6 exioëhary 7 resulzarion
the possibility appeared of independent automatic movement from one place to another on the surface of these planets.
new independent formations could be coated in them with the inherent possibility of acquiring 'individual Reason.'
He graciously decided to use in the future those coatings that obtained independent individuality in the 'tetartocosmoses' as an aid for Himself in the administration of the enlarging world.

The provided passages offer no further specific details about its nature or function.

definition: Theomertmalogos is the name now given to the 'Emanation of the Sun Absolute,' which is also referred to as 'Word-God.' This emanation came into being when the Common Father Creator Almighty changed the functioning of two primordial sacred laws, directing their forces from within the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute into the space of the Universe. It is described as the emanation of the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute itself.
role: An emanation from the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute, also known as 'Word-God'.

key_quotes.text: whereupon there came into being the 'Emanation of the Sun Absolute,' which is now called 'Theomertmalogos' or 'Word-God.'
The emanation of the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute Itself, as I have already told you, they called 'Theomertmalogos,' or 'Word-God.'

definition: Three-brained beings are a type of entity existing on various planets, including Earth (where they are called 'your favorites'). They are characterized by having 'three separate brains' where new impressions accumulate and participate in associations, and they normally develop 'mechanical instinct.' On Earth, they have a 'periodic need to destroy the existence of beings like themselves.' A special organ was provisionally implanted in Earth's three-brained beings to make them perceive reality 'upside down' and to engender sensations of 'pleasure' and 'enjoyment' from repeated impressions, a measure taken to prevent them from prematurely comprehending their purpose and destroying themselves. Their physical forms vary by planet; for example, on one planet they are like a 'karoona' (long broad trunk, fat, large eyes, wings, small feet), and on another, they are like a 'toosook' (double sphere covered in thick soft wool). They possess the inherent possibility of acquiring 'individual Reason' and the 'being-property of 'ikhriltatzkakra', but contemporary Earth three-brained beings often exist as 'three quite separate personalities' due to a lack of conscious actualization of cosmic results.
role: A fundamental type of being in the Megalocosmos, characterized by having three brains, capable of developing Reason, and existing in various forms on different planets.

key_quotes.text: the three-brained beings are coated with a planetary body having a form—how shall I tell you?—like a 'karoona,' that is to say, they have a long broad trunk, amply provided with fat, and a head with enormous protruding and shining eyes.

On another planet not far from the planet Mars, owing to the intense cold there, the three-brained beings are covered with thick soft wool The outer form of these three-centered beings is like that of a 'toosook,' that is, it resembles a kind of double sphere, the upper sphere serving to contain the principal organs of the planetary body, and the lower one the organs for the transformation of the 'first and second being-foods.'
...the irresistible urge grew in me to find out the exact cause of a particularity so phenomenal for three-brained beings.

You must know that in the presence of the three-brained beings there today, as in the presence of every kind of three-brained being in general, all new impressions accumulate in the three separate brains in the order of what is called 'kinship,' and afterward take part—along with impressions previously registered—in the associations evoked in these three separate brains by every new perception in accordance with and depending on the 'center-of-gravity impulses' present in them at that moment.
You know that by this time what is called 'mechanical instinct' had gradually been engendered in them, as is normal in three-brained beings.

So, my boy, in view of this, the Most High Commission decided, among other things, to implant provisionally in the common presence of the three-brained beings there a special organ with properties that, first, would make them perceive reality 'upside down' and, second, would cause every repeated impression from the outside to crystallize in them data that engender factors for evoking sensations of 'pleasure' and 'enjoyment.'

definition: Three-centered beings are a category of beings, sometimes referred to as or synonymous with three-brained beings. They exist on various planets, such as Saturn. On the planet Modiktheo, a specific ideal type of three-centered being arises when three conceptions (from beings of three different sexes: 'martna,' 'spirna,' and 'okina') merge into one, resulting in a new three-brained being that, at its very arising, already has all three being-bodies. On a planet near Mars, some three-centered beings have a physical form like a 'toosook,' a double sphere covered with thick soft wool.
role: A category of beings, often used interchangeably with 'three-brained beings,' but can also refer to a specific ideal type of three-brained being or a physical description of them.

key_quotes.text: On another planet not far from the planet Mars, owing to the intense cold there, the three-brained beings are covered with thick soft wool The outer form of these three-centered beings is like that of a 'toosook,' that is, it resembles a kind of double sphere, the upper sphere serving to contain the principal organs of the planetary body, and the lower one the organs for the transformation of the 'first and second being-foods.'
When I descended to the surface of the planet Saturn, and began to mingle with the three-centered beings there...
And three-centered beings of this kind are indeed ideal in our Megalocosmos because at their very arising they already have all three being-bodies.

definition: This term is an adjective used to describe a type of being, specifically referring to beings whose creation is attributed to 'Our Common Father Endlessness.' It also describes beings for whom certain 'being-efforts' are considered proper. The context suggests it is closely related to, and possibly a fundamental characteristic of, three-brained beings.
role: An adjective describing a type of being, referring to those created by the Common Father Endlessness and for whom specific being-efforts are appropriate.

key_quotes.text: 'Our Common Father Endlessness is only the Creator of a three-centered being But the genuine creator of his essence during the period of his preparatory existence is his "oskianotsner" '—that is, he whom your favorites on the planet Earth call 'educator' or 'teacher. '
...particularly 'passively' as regards the being-efforts proper to three-centered beings, they thoroughly absorbed and appropriated these maleficent fictions.

definition: Tikliamish was an ancient country located on the continent of Asia, which served as the 'chief 'center of culture' for all the three-brained beings' on Earth for a significant period. The city of Samoniks was located within Tikliamish, as was Koorkalai which was its principal center of culture. Following a great catastrophe, the country of Tikliamish was covered by 'kashmanoonoms' (sands) and became known as the 'Hungry Desert'; its principal part is now called 'Karakum,' meaning 'black sands.' It predated the Babylonian period, and from it, groups of beings migrated to other continents.
role: An ancient country and a major cultural center on the continent of Asia for three-brained beings on Earth, which later became a desert.

key_quotes.text: It was in the city of 'Samoniks' in the country of Tikliamish, which was then regarded as the chief 'center of culture' for all the three-brained beings of this peculiar planet of yours.

After this third catastrophe the country of Tikliamish was long known as the 'Hungry Desert'; but nowadays the different parts have different names, and what was once its principal part is called 'Karakum,' which means 'black sands.'
...their principal center of culture became the city of Koorkalai on the continent of Asia in the ancient community called 'Tikliamish.'
...when the existence of those strange beings was proceeding mainly on the continent of Asia and their chief center of culture was in the country of Tikliamish...

definition: 'Tikliamishian' is an adjective used to describe something originating from or pertaining to Tikliamish, specifically in reference to a 'civilization.' During the period of the Tikliamishian civilization, certain learned beings made discoveries and a notion of transforming metal into gold was invented, which later evolved into 'alchemy.'
role: An adjective referring to the civilization associated with the country Tikliamish.

key_quotes.text: During the period of the Tikliamishian civilization, when the learned beings of the country of Maralpleicie discovered for the first time this possibility of 'combinations' in their general psyche and tried to put each other, at will, into this special state, they soon found out and understood how to obtain it with the help of what is called 'being-hanbledzoin,'

...at the period of the Tikliamishian civilization, in the town of 'Chiklaral,' a learned three-brained being by the name of Harnakhoom—whose essence later became crystallized into what is called an 'Eternal Hasnamuss Individual'—invented the notion that any old metal you like, found in abundance on the surface of that planet, could easily be transformed into the rare metal 'gold'...

definition: The Tikliamishian civilization refers to a historical period and culture centered in the ancient country of Tikliamish, which was a significant 'chief center of culture' for three-brained beings on the continent of Asia. During this civilization, important events occurred, such as the discovery by learned beings in the country of Maralpleicie of 'combinations' in the general psyche and methods to induce a special psychic state using 'being-hanbledzoin.' Also, in the town of Chiklaral, a learned being named Harnakhoom invented the notion that common metals could be transformed into gold, an invention that later contributed to the development of a 'maleficent, fantastic science' called 'alchemy.'
role: A historical period and culture centered in the country Tikliamish, characterized by significant intellectual and psychic developments, including the origin of 'alchemy'.

key_quotes.text: During the period of the Tikliamishian civilization, when the learned beings of the country of Maralpleicie discovered for the first time this possibility of 'combinations' in their general psyche and tried to put each other, at will, into this special state, they soon found out and understood how to obtain it with the help of what is called 'being-hanbledzoin,'

definition: A 'tikloonia' is a specific type of being, chosen from among the female sex, who served as a means for Beelzebub to make clarifications concerning the disappearance of the custom of 'initiates of art.' Historically, these beings were known as 'pythonesses,' and in contemporary times, they are referred to as 'mediums.'
role: A type of female being, formerly known as a pythoness and currently as a medium, used for communication or clarification.

key_quotes.text: For this purpose I specially prepared a very good 'tikloonia' chosen from among the beings of the female sex there, and made these clarifications through her.
'Tikloonias' were formerly known on that planet as 'pythonesses,' but the contemporary ones are called 'mediums.'

definition: Titillarian is part of the phrase "titillarian result," which is described as the origin or source from which apes issue. Apes, issuing from this result, are said to be very fond of occupying themselves with "titillation."
role: A source or origin associated with apes and their inclination for titillation.

key_quotes.text: And it will succeed because the apes themselves, issuing from what is called a 'titillarian result,' are by nature very fond of occupying themselves with titillation, and before the day is out will no doubt play their part and enthusiastically assist your favorites in this 'scientific experiment.'

definition: Toof-nef-tef is the name given on the planet Mars to the chief of all the three-brained beings breeding there, corresponding to a king on Earth. The narrator (Beelzebub) knew one such Toof-nef-tef in his youth when he was a 'plef-perf-noof' (a physician on Earth). This particular Toof-nef-tef became a chief by merit, often acquired as a physician of spirit and body, and was nearing the state of the sacred Ishmetch. This honorable Toof-nef-tef of Mars made a request to Beelzebub regarding a "lamentable factor" affecting the Martian beings.
role: The chief or king of the three-brained beings on the planet Mars.

key_quotes.text: 'Toof-nef-tef is the name given on the planet Mars to the chief of all the three-brained beings breeding there, that is, he corresponds to the being who, on your planet, is called 'king. '
I had known this toof-nef-tef, or king, in his youth, when he was only a 'plef-perf-noof' A plef-perf-noof is almost the same as a zirlikner on our planet and a physician on your planet Earth.

Later on, while existing on various parts of the surface of that planet in the capacity of plef-perf-noof, he became worthy to be the head of all the beings breeding on the planet Mars, and when he was nearing the state of the sacred Ishmetch, he desired to return to that part of his planet where he had spent his youth And that is why this former plef-perf-noof, now the toof-nef-tef, happened at that time to be near the place of my residence on Mars.

Thus ended the request of the honorable toof-nef-tef of the planet Mars, and of course, my boy, I there and then promised my old friend to inquire about all this at my first meeting with a corresponding Individual and to communicate the reply to him without fail.

definition: Tooilan is referred to as "Your uncle Tooilan," implying a familial relationship (likely Hassein's uncle). He dwells on a "holy planet" and is tasked with reproducing the contents of etherograms regularly on a "toolookhtertzinek" (a device similar to Earth's radio). This information, concerning the psyche of three-brained beings on Earth, is for the "highest being-bodies" on the holy planet to listen to for relaxation.
role: Hassein's uncle, who disseminates information from etherograms on a 'holy planet'.

key_quotes.text: Tooilan to reproduce their contents regularly on the 'toolookhtertzinek'— which is to a certain degree similar to what is called on Earth the 'radio'—so that some of the 'highest being-bodies' dwelling on the holy planet might, if they wished, by way of relaxation, listen to this information about the psyche of those peculiar three-brained beings inhabiting one of the very remote corners of our Megalocosmos.

Your uncle Tooilan did as he was requested. Whenever he received etherograms from me he reproduced their contents on the common planetary 'toolookhtertzinek,' and in this way all those righteous souls dwelling on the holy planet were kept informed of my observations and investigations of that strange psyche of the beings of the planet Earth.

definition: Toolkhtotino is a term found in an "incomparable book" that corresponds to what contemporary medicine calls the "glans penis." It is described as being located at the end of the "genital member" in boys, specifically the place between the "toolkhtotino" and the "sarnuonino," where the residue of a substance called "kulnabo" is discharged from the organism.
role: A specific anatomical part of the male genital organ, equivalent to the glans penis.

key_quotes.text: 'Great Nature has so arranged it that after its utilization, the residue of this substance is discharged from the organism, in boys at the place between the "toolkhtotino" and the "sarnuonino," and in girls at the place between the "kartotakhnian hills." '

'In this incomparable book, what are called "toolkhtotino" and "sarnuonino" correspond to what contemporary medicine calls "glans penis" and "prepuce penis," and are found at the end of what is called the "genital member" in boys'

definition: Toorinoorino is a property that means 'nondecomposition'. It is acquired by the 'kesdjan body' or the 'highest being-body' (soul) of certain hasnamuss individuals. For a 'hasnamuss individual of the second kind,' this property signifies 'nondecomposition' within any sphere of the planet where they originated. For a 'hasnamuss individual of the third kind,' this property, corresponding to their highest coating, means they are not subject to decomposition in the spheres of their home planet or in any other sphere of the Great Universe.
role: A property of 'nondecomposition' acquired by certain being-bodies.

key_quotes.text: having acquired the property of 'toorinoorino,' that is, 'nondecomposition' in any sphere of that planet on which he arose

this highest being-body also acquires the property of toorinoorino, but this time corresponding to this highest coating, that is to say, it is not subject to decomposition, either in the spheres of that planet on which he arose, or in any other sphere of the Great Universe.
