definition: The Toosooli Kurds are a small tribe of people dwelling in Transcaucasia, near 'Mount Ararat'. They are described as clean, unlike the 'Kolenian gypsies', due to their daily bathing in the 'Aras River' and their life in the open, primarily as shepherds. They do not emit the specific odor peculiar to people of almost all small tribes in Asia. Each family of this tribe has a 'saklia', which serves as both a dwelling and a place for receiving guests, indicating a highly developed custom of visiting among them.
role: A small, clean tribe of shepherds in Transcaucasia.

key_quotes.text: I saw another custom, very similar and seemingly just as stupid, among the people of another small tribe called the 'Toosooli Kurds,' dwelling in Transcaucasia not far from 'Mount Ararat.'

This tribe is not dirty like the 'Kolenian gypsies ' On the contrary, these people, from their daily bathing in the 'Aras River' and their life in the open— they are chiefly shepherds—are not only very clean but they even do not give off the specific odor peculiar to the people of almost all the small tribes which populate this great Asia.

Each family of this tribe of Kurds has its own what is called 'saklia,' which serves as a dwelling and for the reception of guests—as the custom of visiting one another is highly developed in this tribe.

definition: Triamazikamno is a fundamental and sacred cosmic law. It is actualized by three independent holy forces, or heterogeneous cosmic substances, which include emanations from the sun, substances transformed by the planet itself, and substances transformed by other planets of the system that reach the planet through radiations. This law is the basis for the crystallization of data for cognizance and understanding in three-brained beings, leading to the formation of sacred substances like 'abrustdonis' and 'helkdonis' necessary for perfecting their higher parts and actualizing the 'Reason of understanding'. The fundamental sacred law of Triamazikamno was modified by the Creator to render the 'Heropass' harmless, making its holy parts dependent on outside forces. It is also associated with the 'holy affirming' force, localized by perception and transformation organs in three-brained beings, and involves two opposite forces (represented by male and female sexes) whose fusion contributes to species continuation and the formation of these sacred substances.
role: A fundamental, sacred cosmic law governing creation, existence, and transformations, actualized by three holy forces.

key_quotes.text: Triamazikamno, data for the cognizance and understanding proper to that being alone, and it is only during these processes of the crystallization of data for consciousness in the presence of three-brained beings that what is called 'zernofookalnian friction' takes place, which gives rise in them to the formation of the sacred substances 'abrustdonis' and 'helkdonis,' required for the coating and perfecting of their higher parts.

It is these 'autokolitzikners' in the common presence of three-brained beings, serving as the 'third holy force' of the sacred Triamazikamno, which actualize the arising of the 'Reason of understanding.

Concerning this cosmic law, it is important to tell you that it arose and began to exist in the Universe after the fundamental sacred law of Triamazikamno had been modified by our Creator in order to render the Heropass harmless, and after its holy parts, until then entirely independent, had become dependent upon forces from outside.

Meanwhile, you should know that on normally existing planets anywhere in our Great Universe the exioëhary formed in the presence of a three-brained being having organs of perception and transformation for localizing the 'holy affirming' force of the sacred Triamazikamno, in other words, the exioëhary formed in a three-brained keschapmartnian being of the 'male' sex, can never be blended— owing to that same law—with the exioëhary formed in the presence of a two-brained keschapmartnian being of the opposite sex.

On the other hand, when a special combination of cosmic forces occurs and this same law of the 'affinity of the numbers of the totality of vibrations' begins to act, the exioëhary formed in a three-brained keschapmartnian being of the 'female' sex can sometimes, in certain surrounding conditions, blend quite well with the exioëhary formed in two-brained keschapmartnian beings of the male sex, but only as the active factor in the actualizing process of the fundamental sacred Triamazikamno.

The second are the substances transformed by the planet itself where the beings who absorb this food exist. And the third are those substances which are transformed through the other planets of this system, and reach this planet through their radiations. And so, the process of fusion of all the substances necessary for the normal formation and existence of beings can proceed in the required proportion in the atmosphere only within a certain distance above the surface of the planet because, owing to the second-order cosmic law called 'tenikdoa' or, as your favorites would call it, the 'law of gravity, ' the substances which actualize the second holy force of the sacred Triamazikamno cannot penetrate beyond a definite height in the atmosphere.

sexes, representing two opposite forces of the sacred Triamazikamno—a fusion taking place during the satisfaction of that function of theirs which, thanks to the 'inheritance' from the ancient Romans, has become the chief vice of contemporary three-brained beings.

definition: Trogoautoegocratic refers to a "common-cosmic process" that is described as "most great" and is the sole basis for the existence and maintenance of everything in the Universe, whether intentionally created or automatically arisen. This process was actualized by the "Endless Uni-Being" and established by the "Endless Creator" to enable the "exchange of substances," or "reciprocal feeding" among all existing things. Its purpose is to prevent the "merciless Heropass" from having a maleficent effect on the "Sun Absolute." The common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process is actualized based on two fundamental cosmic laws: the "fundamental first-order sacred Heptaparaparshinokh" and the "fundamental first-order sacred Triamazikamno." Through these laws, it facilitates the arising of various 'crystallizations' from 'ethernokrilno,' and from these, various cosmic 'formations' where 'involution' and 'evolution' take place.
role: A fundamental, common-cosmic process that maintains and enables the reciprocal feeding of all existence in the Universe.

key_quotes.text: First of all, you must know that everything in the Universe—all that was intentionally created and all that has automatically arisen—exists and is maintained solely on the basis of the 'common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process.'

This most great common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process was actualized by our Endless Uni-Being when there already existed the Most Great and Most Holy Sun Absolute, on which our All-Gracious Endless Creator had and still has the chief place of His existence.

This system, which maintains everything that arises and exists, was established by our Endless Creator to permit the 'exchange of substances,' or 'reciprocal feeding' of everything existing, to proceed in the Universe, so that the merciless Heropass would no longer have its maleficent effect on the Sun Absolute.

This most great common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process is actualized, always and in everything, on the basis of the two fundamental cosmic laws, the first of which is called 'the fundamental first-order sacred Heptaparaparshinokh,' and the second 'the fundamental first-order sacred Triamazikamno.'

definition: Turkeyness is described as a 'peculiarity' or inherent psychic quality found in three-brained beings on Earth, particularly noticeable in Europe. It is exemplified by the contemporary people of Russia, who, having an Asiatic nature, strive to become Europeans, leading to a state of being neither one nor the other, making them 'ideal turkeys.' This state is likened to the strange psyche of a turkey bird, which is characterized by a need to 'swagger' and 'puff itself out' without reason. Turkeyness also describes a process of psychological degeneration that occurs when a community, such as the Turks, abandons long-standing traditions (like exchanging the 'fez' for 'European bowlers') and adopts new, alien ideas, especially when these are imposed by multiple leaders who lack understanding of the community's ingrained psyche and morality. This leads to a degeneration of their psyche, similar to what occurred in Russia.
role: A peculiarity or inherent psychic quality of three-brained beings, reflecting a state of cultural/psychological hybridity, ostentation, and the degeneration of psyche due to external influences or misguided leadership.

key_quotes.text: The best representatives of these 'turkeys' are the contemporary people of Russia, and it was precisely such 'turkeys' that surrounded one of the chief 'crows' of this country who just went dashing by.

But since in recent times they have all been doing their utmost to become Europeans and with this intent have been 'stuffing' themselves accordingly, they are little by little ceasing to be 'crows', and since, according to various undoubtedly lawful data, they cannot turn into real 'peacocks' and, having left the 'crows' behind but having not yet caught up with the 'peacocks,' they are in themselves, as I have said, ideal 'turkeys.'
One of the many specific features of the psyche of this strange bird, the turkey, is that he always finds it necessary to swagger, and thus without rhyme or reason will often puff himself out.

Although this peculiarity which I have just called 'turkeyness' has already become inherent in almost all the three-brained beings who breed on this planet of yours, its manifestation and results are especially noticeable among the three-brained beings who breed on the continent of Europe.

Once they have started to exchange the 'fez' for European 'bowlers,' the rest will follow of itself. Doubtless the psyche of these Turkish beings will soon degenerate, as did the psyche of the beings of the community of Russia.

But now in this community of Turkey there are several leaders, and each of them wiseacres and imposes his callow ideas upon the unfortunate ordinary beings there—ideas not corresponding at all either to the long-since crystallized needs of the psyche of the beings of this community or to the established pillars of their being-morality.

definition: The term "Two-system Zoostat" is not directly mentioned or defined in the provided passages. However, the passages describe "two-brained beings" as a category of entities, exemplified by animals such as hyenas, cats, wolves, lions, tigers, wild dogs, baigooshis, frogs, and donkeys. These two-brained beings are created with an organization necessary for cosmic existence on planets, but they lack "logical mentation" and are considered "dull-witted" or "stupid" compared to "three-brained beings." They instinctively sense certain acts as sacred, fulfilling them during periods ordained by Great Nature. Their internal and external organs are adapted in accordance with the sphere in which their existence flows.
role: Not explicitly defined; however, "two-brained beings" are a category of beings lacking logical mentation

key_quotes.text: Even many two-brained and one-brained beings of the planet Earth, such as the beings called 'hyenas,' 'cats,' 'wolves,' 'lions,' 'tigers,' 'wild dogs,' 'baigooshis,' 'frogs,' and many others, who in their 'law-conformable presences' have no data at all for 'comparative logic,' still continue, of course only instinctively, to sense this act as sacred, and fulfill it only during those periods ordained by Great Nature for this holy sacrament...

if this donkey is compelled to stand unwillingly in your stable, it does so only because it was created two-brained; and it was created two-brained because that organization of its common presence is necessary for cosmic existence on the planet. And therefore it is according to law that the possibility of 'logical mentation' is lacking in your donkey's presence and, in consequence, it is according to law that it should be what you call 'dull-witted' or 'stupid.'

our Common Creator has given Nature the corresponding principle that enables her to coat and adapt all your internal and external organs in accordance with that sphere in which the process of existence of beings with such a brain-system as yours is destined to flow.

definition: Tziel Pootz Kann is a sacred religious rite, one of two rites created by the Great Moses and introduced into the ordinary life of the Jewish people. It was specifically created for girls, and its practice was obligatory. The purpose of this rite was to counteract the harmful effects of the "maleficent invention of clothes" by ensuring that certain accumulating substances would be mechanically eliminated, thereby preventing "maleficent itching." The observance of Tziel Pootz Kann ceased even among followers of the Judaic religion after the death of King Solomon.
role: A sacred religious rite for girls, created by Moses

key_quotes.text: These two rites were created by the Great Moses and introduced into the ordinary life of the Jewish people to counteract that maleficent invention of clothes, thanks to which those factors were destroyed which had been provided by Nature for the protection of those organs from the harmful action of the substances they secrete, and these two rites were transmitted from generation to generation...
It was only after the death of the great King Solomon that the rite of 'tziel pootz kann' ceased to be observed even by the followers of the Judaic religion...
The sacred 'sikt ner tchorn' was specially created for boys and the sacred 'tziel pootz kann' for girls, their practice was obligatory.

Moses... wished by this means to make sure that, through all kinds of accidental contacts, the totality of substances accumulating in the places I spoke of would of itself be mechanically eliminated, and thus cease to become a factor for the arising of that maleficent itching.

definition: Uni-Being Endlessness (also referred to as "Endless Uni-Being," "Endlessness Himself," "our All-Gracious Endless Creator," and "our All-Embracing Uni-Being Creator") is the supreme Creator of the Universe. This entity actualized the "most great common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process" after the Most Great and Most Holy Sun Absolute already existed. The Creator's chief place of existence is on the Sun Absolute. The trogoautoegocratic process was established by this Creator to permit the "exchange of substances," or "reciprocal feeding," of everything existing in the Universe, and to prevent the "merciless Heropass" from having a maleficent effect on the Sun Absolute. The "Endlessness Himself" is depicted as an entity who could summon Beelzebub and inquire about the three-centered beings of Earth.
role: The supreme Creator of the Universe

key_quotes.text: Endlessness Himself were to summon you before Him and ask you this: "'Beelzebub' "'You, who are one of the hoped-for, accelerated results of all My actualizations, manifest briefly the conclusions of your impartial observations and studies over long centuries of the psyche of the three-centered beings arising on the planet Earth, and say whether it is still possible by any means to save them and to direct them into the becoming path. '"
if our All-Embracing Uni-Being Creator should indeed summon him and ask him such a question, he would answer . . .

This most great common-cosmic trogoautoegocratic process was actualized by our Endless Uni-Being when there already existed the Most Great and Most Holy Sun Absolute, on which our All-Gracious Endless Creator had and still has the chief place of His existence.

This system, which maintains everything that arises and exists, was established by our Endless Creator to permit the 'exchange of substances,' or 'reciprocal feeding' of everything existing, to proceed in the Universe, so that the merciless Heropass would no longer have its maleficent effect on the Sun Absolute.

definition: The term "Universal Hasnamuss" is used to refer to Lentrohamsanin, an individual born in Kronbookhon, the capital of Nievia, whose inscription criticized the prevailing order of collective existence and emphasized freedom from dependence on others for happiness. The broader term "hasnamuss" designates any three-brained being (whether having coated highest being-parts or consisting only of a planetary body) in whose common presence a certain "something" arises, under the influence of "individual impulses," that participates in the "completed formation" of their independent individuality. This "something" blends with crystallizations from "naloo-ossnian impulses." There are four kinds of hasnamuss individuals, distinguished by the extent to which this "something" is present and whether the possibility of being cleansed from it is lost. The fourth kind is called an "Eternal Hasnamuss Individual" because for them, this possibility is lost forever. Higher orders of hasnamuss individuals suffer on specific small planets that are "disharmonized in their subjective functioning."
role: A designation for Lentrohamsanin; more broadly, a three-brained being with a specific internal 'something' that can lead to various fates depending on its nature and development

key_quotes.text: The inscription of this future Universal Hasnamuss went on as follows: "'Man's greatest happiness consists in not being dependent on any other person, whoever it may be, and in being free from the influence of anyone whatsoever!'"
This Lentrohamsanin... became one of those 313 Eternal Hasnamuss Individuals who now exist on the small planet bearing the name of 'Retribution.'

In its widest sense the word 'hasnamuss' designates any three-brained being—whether he has already coated his highest being-parts or consists of his planetary body alone —in whose common presence, under the influence of certain 'individual impulses,' a certain 'something' arises which participates in the 'completed formation' of his independent individuality.

The fourth kind of hasnamuss individual is like the third, but with this difference, that the hasnamuss of the third kind has the possibility of at some time becoming so to say 'cleansed' from this 'something,' whereas for the fourth kind this possibility is lost forever. 'That is why the fourth kind of hasnamuss is called an 'Eternal Hasnamuss Individual.'

As a place for the suffering existence of the high orders of hasnamuss individuals, the Higher Sacred Individuals have intentionally allotted from all the large cosmic concentrations four small planets, disharmonized in their subjective functioning and situated in various most remote corners of our Great Universe.

definition: Veggendiadi is an "illustrious Greek philosopher" and a learned man, known for his learning primarily in his own country, Greece. He was the representative of the followers of Jesus Christ's teaching in Greece during the Council of Kelnuan. In a famous debate with the great Hertoonano, Veggendiadi affirmed and demonstrated for two days that it was absolutely necessary for followers of Jesus's teachings to spread the concept that killing animals for the purpose of consuming their flesh for food was the greatest sin, and that meat was very harmful to health. His arguments against consuming meat were concurred with by Hertoonano, who also considered it an "infamy of infamies."
role: An illustrious Greek philosopher who advocated against eating meat

key_quotes.text: The initial cause of the institution of fasting was the debate that took place at the Council of Kelnuan between two famous learned men, namely, the great Hertoonano and the illustrious Greek philosopher, Veggendiadi.
The philosopher Veggendiadi was well known for his learning only in his own country, while Hertoonano was famous all over the Earth

The philosopher Veggendiadi, it seems, affirmed and demonstrated for two days that it was absolutely necessary to spread the concept among all the followers of the teachings of Jesus that to kill animals for the purpose of consuming their flesh for food was the greatest sin, and that at the same time meat was very harmful to health, and so on.

For my part, I fully concur in all the evidence and arguments set forth here by our brother in Christ, the philosopher Veggendiadi. "' "I will even add to all he has said that to cut short other lives merely to stuff one's own belly is an infamy of infamies such as only man is capable of.

definition: Vojiano is identified as another term for the 'frenum penis' of boys. It is specifically mentioned in the context of the sacred rite 'sikt ner tchorn,' where it is cut to sever the connection between the head of the genital member and the skin covering it, thereby allowing the free movement of the prepuce penis.
role: An anatomical part of the male genital organ

key_quotes.text: 'The rite of "sikt ner tchorn" for instance, was identical with your "sooniat " It consisted in cutting what is called the "vojiano" or the "frenum penis" of boys, whereby the connection is severed between the head of the genital member and the skin covering it, thus permitting the free movement of this skin or, as it is called, the "prepuce penis."

definition: Vuanik is described as a solar system. The ship Karnak is destined to pass through it, but its path is complicated by the presence of a great comet named 'Sakoor' or 'the Madcap' which leaves 'zilnotrago' in its track.
role: A solar system

key_quotes.text: The point is that if we follow our intended course, in two 'kilprenos'* our ship will be passing through the solar system 'Vuanik.'

definition: Vznooshlitzval is a sacred process that exists in the Universe. It involves implanting 'the impulse that Objective Science describes as 'trusting another as oneself'' into corresponding three-centered beings. This implantation is carried out by means of another sacred process called 'askalnooazar'.
role: A sacred cosmic process

key_quotes.text: certain essence-friends of mine, who had not taken part in the events that caused my exile, carried out in relation to me personally the sacred process which exists in the Universe under the name of the sacred 'vznooshlitzval,' that is to say, they implanted in the presence of certain corresponding three-centered beings, by means of another sacred process called 'askalnooazar,' the impulse that Objective Science describes as 'trusting another as oneself.'

definition: Wiseacring (or 'to wiseacre') describes a behavior adopted by beings, often after acquiring a 'sense of superiority' due to wealth. It is done 'to achieve that contemporary ideal' and can involve 'deforming' something, like divine gram (wheat), by processes such as 'scraping,' 'combing,' 'smoothing,' and 'polishing' it to give its product a 'beautiful and striking appearance,' even if it destroys 'active elements' important for nature's service.
role: A pretentious or superficial behavior

key_quotes.text: they began to wiseacre to achieve that contemporary ideal I spoke of—and they also wiseacred with all their might with this divine gram from which 'prosphora' is made.
They employed every possible means to, so to say, 'deform' this divine gram in order to give its product a 'beautiful and striking appearance.'

definition: The 'Word-God' is also called 'Theomertmalogos' and came into being as the 'Emanation of the Sun Absolute.' This emanation resulted from the Common Father Creator Almighty changing the functioning of two primordial sacred laws, directing the action of their forces from within the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute into the space of the Universe. It is part of the sequence of creation, following the initial participation of the 'Force of the Divine Will' of Endlessness, with subsequent creation proceeding automatically thanks to these changed laws.
role: An emanation from the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute, resulting from the Common Father Creator Almighty's modification of primordial sacred laws.

key_quotes.text: there came into being the 'Emanation of the Sun Absolute,' which is now called 'Theomertmalogos' or 'Word-God.'

when in the beginning our Common Father Creator Almighty changed the functioning of both these primordial sacred laws, He directed the action of their forces from within the Most Most Holy Sun Absolute into the space of the Universe, whereupon there came into being the 'Emanation of the Sun Absolute,' which is now called 'Theomertmalogos' or 'Word-God.'

definition: Zevrocrats are a type of terrestrial three-brained being found in communities with a 'republican state organization.' They are similar to 'aristocrats' (found in monarchic organizations) and possess exactly identical inner properties, making them 'jokes of nature.' Their 'material of experience' is extremely limited, consisting only of recollections related to food, the past functioning of their sex organs, and memories of their first nurse. They are described as 'quite vacuous and therefore feeble' and are often supported with the left arm during 'puppet shows,' which is the custom that differentiates their name from aristocrats.
role: A type of vacuous and feeble terrestrial being in republican state organizations, functionally identical to aristocrats.

key_quotes.text: In communities where a republican state organization exists these types are called 'zevrocrats', whereas in a monarchic state organization they are called 'aristocrats.'
the aristocrats and zevrocrats are similar in every respect and have exactly identical inner properties.
The most we can say of them is that they are simply 'jokes of nature '

the 'material of experience' of these aristocrats and zevrocrats is limited to three series. The first concerns the question of food, the second consists of the recollections associated with the past functioning of their sex organs, and the third relates to memories of their first nurse.
But as these beings are in themselves quite vacuous and therefore feeble, other beings of the community have to support them during these 'puppet shows.'
in the communities where a 'republican state organization' exists, they are supported with the left arm, and hence are called 'zevrocrats.'

definition: Zilnotrago is a gas, explicitly compared to what is called "cyanic acid" on Earth. It is left in the track of the great comet 'Sakoor' or 'the Madcap'. When this substance enters the planetary body of a being, it disorganizes most of its functions until the zilnotrago has volatilized. It disperses over time, and waiting for its dispersion can prolong a journey.
role: A disorganizing and harmful gas left by a comet.

key_quotes.text: And as Your Right Reverence certainly knows, this mad comet always leaves a great deal of 'zilnotrago'† in its track, which on entering the planetary body of a being disorganizes most of its functions until all the zilnotrago has been volatilized.
† "Zilnotrago" is the name of a gas similar to what is called on the Earth "cyanic acid."
On the other hand, to wait somewhere until the zilnotrago is dispersed would take still longer.

definition: Zirlikners are responsible individuals found on the planet Karatas and other planets inhabited by three-brained beings. They voluntarily assume essential obligations toward the beings in their 'district'. Their purpose is to dedicate their entire existence to helping others fulfill their being-obligations, particularly if a being is unable to do so due to a temporary disorder in their planetary body or other reasons. Their profession corresponds to what are now called 'physicians' on Earth, and historically, Earth's physicians performed similar roles.
role: Responsible individuals who assist beings in fulfilling their essential obligations.

key_quotes.text: This profession corresponds more or less to that of our 'zirlikners.'

You are probably already well aware that our zirlikners on the planet Karatas, as also the beings corresponding to them on the other planets of our Great Universe inhabited by already formed three-brained beings, are those responsible individuals who voluntarily take upon themselves essential obligations in relation to the beings of their 'district,' and who devote the whole of their existence to helping any one of them to fulfill his being-obligations if, on account of a temporary disorder in the functioning of his planetary body, or for some other reason, he ceases to be able to fulfill his inner or outer being-duty himself.
It must be said that formerly, on your planet also, those professionals now called 'physicians' were almost the same and did almost the same as our zirlikners.

definition: Adiat is a term used during the Tikliamishian civilization for a "hasnamussian practice of 'devising new fashions'". It is equivalent to "haidia" in the Babylonian period and "fashion" in contemporary times. This practice consists of devising new ways for beings to manifest in ordinary existence and various methods for changing and disguising the reality of one's presence. Unlike beneficial customs that alleviate external conditions, adiat (fashion) is temporary, serves insignificant, abnormal, and egoistic personal aims of hasnamusses, and arises from automatic reasoning based on abnormally established conditions of existence.
role: A term for "fashion" in the Tikliamishian civilization, involving new, often egoistic, outward manifestations.

key_quotes.text: This hasnamussian practice of 'devising new fashions' existed in former civilizations also, during the Tikliamishian civilization it nourished under the name of 'adiat,' and in the Babylonian period, under the name of 'haidia.'
'Adiat,' 'haidia,' or 'fashion' consists in devising new means of being-manifestation for ordinary existence, and various methods of changing and disguising the reality of one's presence.

'Adiat,' 'haidia,' or 'fashion' play the same role in their daily being-existence as those customs of ours which are established to alleviate the inevitable external conditions independent of beings, customs that gradually enter into use everywhere as an essential need These contemporary customs or 'fashions' of theirs, on the other hand, are first merely temporary and serve only for the satisfaction of the insignificant personal aims of these present and future hasnamusses, which have become utterly abnormal and trivially egoistic, and second, they are neither more nor less than the results of automatic reasoning based on relative notions flowing from the abnormally established conditions of ordinary being-existence there.

definition: Afalkalnas are defined as "various works of man's hands which have entered into the everyday life of people." They serve as a means for transmitting information or knowledge from generation to generation. Specifically, those made of lasting materials can remain intact and be passed down to remote descendants, or copies may be transmitted, sometimes with minor alterations made by later generations. They are contrasted with "soldjinokhas," which are procedures and ceremonies.
role: Works of man's hands used for transmitting knowledge across generations.

key_quotes.text: transmission from generation to generations be carried out through the human "afalkalnas," as they are called, that is, through various works of man's hands which have entered into the everyday life of people, and also through the human "soldjinokhas," that is, through various procedures and ceremonies, which have been established for centuries in the social and family life of people and which pass automatically from generation to generation.

Certain of these human "afalkalnas," particularly those made of lasting materials, may remain intact and be handed down to our remote posterity, or copies may pass from generation to generation, thanks to the property rooted in man's essence of giving out as his own, after having changed some minor detail, works that have reached him from long-past epochs.
'The question now is only this by what means can we bring about such a transmission through the various human "afalkalnas" and "soldjinokhas"?'

definition: Aliamizoornakalu is an "essence-sacred process" that Beelzebub was obliged to perform before the Arch-Cherub Peshtvogner upon his return from exile. This sacred process was performed "over an essence" as a precaution against Beelzebub repeating the manifestations of his youth and to prevent similar occurrences in the Reason of other individuals at the Center of the Great Universe. Mullah Nasr Eddin metaphorically describes this process as "giving one's word of honor not to poke one's nose into the affairs of the authorities."
role: A sacred essence-process involving a solemn pledge or oath to prevent undesirable manifestations.

key_quotes.text: my return from exile, when my first duty was to present myself to our All-Quarters Maintainer, the Arch-Cherub Peshtvogner and, prostrating myself at his feet, to perform before him what is called the 'essence-sacred aliamizoornakalu.'

I was obliged to do this on account of the sins of my youth. For when I was pardoned by His Uni-Being Endlessness and allowed to return to my native land, certain Sacred Individuals decided to demand of me that this sacred process be performed over my essence, both as a precaution against my ever again manifesting myself as in the days of my youth, and so that nothing similar would recur in the Reason of most of the Individuals dwelling at the Center of the Great Universe.

You probably do not yet know what the sacred 'aliamizoornakalu' over an essence means. Later I will explain that to you in detail, but meanwhile, I shall simply turn once more to our dear Mullah Nasr Eddin, who describes this process as 'giving one's word of honor not to poke one's nose into the affairs of the authorities.'

definition: The 'common-cosmic ansapalnian octave' is a fundamental cosmic totality of vibrations of all cosmic substances. These substances originate from seven distinct independent sources and collectively form one of its seven "centers of gravity." Each octave of strings on the lav-mertz-nokh apparatus was designed to correspond to the totality of vibrations of substances from seven separate sources, which in turn constitute one of the seven centers of gravity of this fundamental ansapalnian octave.
role: A fundamental cosmic totality of vibrations of all cosmic substances, forming one of its seven centers of gravity.

key_quotes.text: Each of these octaves of strings on the lav-mertz-nokh gave that totality of vibrations which, according to the calculations of the great twin brothers, corresponded to the totality of vibrations of all the cosmic substances issuing from seven separate independent sources, substances that constitute one of the seven centers of gravity of the fundamental 'common-cosmic ansapalnian octave. '

Each white string on the lav-mertz-nokh was tuned separately by this Chinese learned being, King-Too-Toz, in such a way that it gave the average number of vibrations which, according to the calculations of the great brothers, ought to be present in the substances constituting one of the seven centers of gravity of the given totality of substances, which in its turn constitutes one of the seven centers of gravity of the fundamental cosmic octave of substances.

They serve as the "third holy force" of the sacred Triamazikamno, and their function is to actualize the arising of "Reason of understanding." They are also instrumental in the process of crystallizing newly perceived impressions within a being.
role: The "third holy force" in three-brained beings, actualizing "Reason of understanding" and the crystallization of impressions.

definition: Being-Conscience, also referred to as "Objective Conscience" or "genuine divine Conscience," is a fundamental being-impulse or factor that should engender the impulse upon which the entire psyche of three-brained beings is generally based. While it is often atrophied or has receded into the subconscious in contemporary beings, it is a "divine function" that, if made to participate in their ordinary consciousness, could liberate them from the effects of the organ kundabuffer. It is associated with the impulse of "self-remorse" or "remorse of conscience."
role: A fundamental divine impulse or factor in three-brained beings, crucial for their psyche and liberation from negative influences.

key_quotes.text: the factor that should engender that being-impulse on which, in general, the whole psyche of beings of a three-brained system is based, namely, the impulse existing under the name of "Objective Conscience," is not yet atrophied in them, and remains in their presence almost in its primordial state.

only if this being-factor still surviving in their common presence were to participate in the general functioning of the consciousness under whose direction they pass their daily, as they call it, "waking existence"—only then would it be possible to save the contemporary terrestrial three-brained beings from the consequences of the properties of that organ which was intentionally implanted in their first ancestors.
All the beings of that planet then began to work in order to have in their consciousness this divine function of genuine Conscience
the data present in their 'subconscious' for engendering real being-Conscience also did not take part in the functioning of their 'waking consciousness,'

They can arise either from inner, separately spiritualized being-parts or from corresponding perceptions coming from without. "Being-confrontative associations" are a specific kind that usually proceed from every new perception in three-brained beings, and from which data can crystallize in them for their individuality.
role: Conscious associations vital for receiving new shocks and for the intensity of "being-energy" transformation in beings.

definition: Being-factors are exterior influences, enumerated as seven specific categories, upon which the crystallization of 'bobbinkandelnosts' in a being's 'being-localizations' (brains) depends. These 'bobbinkandelnosts' then determine a definite quantity of possible 'associations' or 'experiencings.' The seven exterior factors are: heredity in general, conditions and environment at the moment of conception, combined radiations of all planets during womb formation, the level of being-manifestation of producers during their preparation for responsible age, the quality of being-existence of beings in immediate surroundings, the quality of 'teleokrimalnichnian thought waves' formed in the atmosphere, and the quality of their own 'being-egoplastikoori' (being-efforts for obtaining Objective Reason).
role: Determinants that influence the crystallization of 'bobbinkandelnosts' in a being's brain, thereby shaping their capacity for 'associations' and 'experiencings.'

key_quotes.text: depending on the enumerated seven exterior factors, there are crystallized in their 'being-localizations' or, as your favorites say, in their 'brains'—which are the central locations of the sources of manifestation of all the separate independent parts of their common presence—what are called 'bobbinkandelnosts,' that is to say, a certain 'something' that gives to these 'localizations' or 'brains' a definite quantity of possible 'associations' or 'experiencings.'

1 Heredity in general, 2 Conditions and environment at the moment of conception, 3 The combined radiations of all the planets of their solar system during their formation in the womb of their productress, 4 The level of being-manifestation of their producers during the period in which they themselves are preparing for responsible age, 5 The quality of being-existence of the beings in the immediate surroundings, 6 The quality of what are called 'teleokrimalnichnian thought waves' formed in the atmosphere around them—also during the period of their preparation for responsible age—that is, the sincerely manifested good wishes and actions of 'beings of the same blood', and finally, 7 The quality of their own 'being-egoplastikoori,' that is, their being-efforts for the transubstantiation in themselves of all the data for obtaining Objective Reason

definition: Being-food refers to substances or edible products consumed by beings. There is a distinction between 'first being-food' and 'higher being-foods.' The 'first being-food' is composed of substances primarily for the maintenance of a being's 'coarse planetary body' but provides almost nothing for the 'higher parts of their presence.' Beings can have a disharmonized 'function that serves for the transformation of the first being-food.' Beings, especially contemporary ones, have lost the conscious need and understanding of 'higher being-foods.' An abnormality in their existence is consuming 'first being-food' in a decomposed state, lacking 'active elements' from Nature, due to a loss of being-efforts and the ability to instinctively sense harmfulness.
role: Nourishment, either for the coarse planetary body ('first being-food') or for higher parts of a being's presence ('higher being-foods').

key_quotes.text: ...they not only ceased to feel the need to absorb these cosmic substances consciously, but even lost the knowledge and understanding of the existence and significance of 'higher being-foods.'

At the present time, your favorites only know about the first being-food... this 'first being-food' is composed almost exclusively of substances necessary for the maintenance of the existence of their coarse planetary body, which is a denying source, and that this 'first being-food' can provide almost nothing for the higher parts of their presence.
...the function that serves for the transformation of the first being-food is disharmonized or, as they would say, their 'digestive systems are spoiled'...
...never to consume as their first being-food anything fresh whatsoever, but to make use exclusively of products that are already in a state of decomposition.
...these products, of whatever kind and however they might be preserved, always deteriorated with time and became worthless for their first being-food...

definition: Being-functions are capacities or operations described as those 'needed to acquire being-Reason,' which beings have the possibility of perfecting. These functions are presented as essential for the development of 'being-Reason' in different forms of tetartocosmoses throughout the Universe.
role: Capacities or operations within a being that can be developed for the attainment of 'being-Reason.'

key_quotes.text: ...had the same possibilities of perfecting the functions needed to acquire being-Reason as have all other forms of tetartocosmoses throughout the whole Universe.

definition: Being-hikdjnapar is an inner state or feeling that is directly equated to 'pity.' It is described as permeating Beelzebub's state when a terrestrial three-brained being was suffering on his account.
role: A specific inner feeling, identified as pity.

key_quotes.text: And this time that state, so unusual for me, was permeated with my 'being-hikdjnapar' or, as your favorites say, 'pity,' for that terrestrial three-brained being, chiefly because he was suffering on my account.

definition: Being-illnesses are conditions that afflict beings, often grouped with 'subjective vices.' They can manifest as physical ailments, such as 'impotence' or 'spoiled digestive systems' (a disharmony in the transformation of 'first being-food'), which can deprive beings of continuing their species. They also include behavioral or psychological conditions, such as a 'strange illness' causing individuals to write dramas with specific symptoms (e.g., particular vibrations, physical changes, irrational fears, lack of empathy, criticism, atrophied objective perception, and hemorrhoids), or a 'disease called 'tomorrow'' which leads to procrastination, hinders necessary efforts for self-improvement, and prevents removing undesirable consequences.
role: Conditions or maladies that afflict beings, impacting their physical, psychological, and behavioral aspects, often with detrimental effects on their existence and evolution.

key_quotes.text: ...my acquired habit of collecting material... for those statistics of mine comparing the prevalence of being-illnesses and strange 'subjective vices' among beings of different groups...

...that form of disease specific to beings there which they call 'impotence,' thanks to which disease, a great many of the contemporary beings of your planet are deprived forever of the possibility of continuing their species.

...he suddenly gets this strange illness, and begins wiseacring on paper or, as is said there, 'composing' various 'dramas.'... In the common presence of the sick being, there also appear in the course of this peculiar malady seven very specific symptoms.

Thanks to this abnormal hope of theirs, a singular and very curious disease, with the property of evolving, arose and exists among them even until now—a disease called 'tomorrow.' This strange disease, 'tomorrow,' has brought the most terrifying results...

definition: Being-manifestation refers to the outward expressions, behaviors, qualities, or the level of being displayed by individuals. It is described as a 'level' belonging to producers during a specific developmental period, acting as an 'exterior factor' influencing their offspring. More broadly, it encompasses 'external manifestations' such as clothes, gestures, manners, and habits, which are engendered by an 'inner subjective evaluation.' These manifestations can be artificial, influence relationships between beings, and beings may sense their harmfulness.

definition: Being-need refers to a fundamental requirement or impulse within a being. It explicitly includes 'a constant and unflagging instinctive need to perfect oneself in the sense of Being,' which is identified as a 'being-obligolnian striving.' It also encompasses the striving to have everything satisfying and really necessary for the planetary body, and the need to absorb cosmic substances consciously, which beings can cease to feel. The text also uses 'inevitable being-necessity to feed themselves' in a similar context.
role: A fundamental requirement or impulse for a being's existence, perfection, or maintenance.

definition: Being-parts are the distinct components that make up a being's 'whole presence.' These include the 'planetary body,' described as the largest and an auxiliary, unconscious part, and 'spiritualized parts.' The 'Reason' of any being depends on the correct functioning of these separate parts. Specific independent parts, also referred to as 'localizations' or 'brains' (the central locations of their manifestation), are identified as the 'thinking center,' 'feeling center,' and 'moving center,' each possessing its own 'bobbinkandelnost.' The 'essence' is considered the principal part which the planetary body serves.
role: The constituent components or divisions of a being's entire presence, essential for its functioning and the development of Reason.

definition: 'Elekilpomagtistzen' is a substance. When 'magtistzen' (implied to be this substance) is made to pass through special glass, it destroys atmospheric components such as air, gases, and fog, creating an empty, resistance-free space. This same substance is also used to set wing-like appendages on a large structure (specifically, a ship) in motion, thereby providing the impetus to move the structure in a required direction.
role: A substance used to clear atmospheric space and propel large structures like ships.

definition: 'Epsi-noora-chaka' is one of a series of names (e.g., 'okhti-noora-chaka', 'khooti-noora-chaka') used to refer to one of the 'three results of cosmic processes.' To further specify which aspect of these results is being indicated, additional terms are appended to the name: 'alil' for nuances of sound and vibrations, 'nar-khra-noora' for particularities of the 'white ray' composition, and a number denoting 'specific gravity' for the active elements of the product called 'opium'.
role: A name used in a classification system for one of the three results of cosmic processes.

For indicating the particularities of the composition of the 'white ray,' they added the expression 'nar-khra-noora.'
And for indicating the active elements of the polormedekhtic product called 'opium' they simply added the number denoting their 'specific gravity. '

definition: Ethernokrilno is the primordial substance that permeates the entire Universe, serving as the fundamental basis for the arising and maintenance of all existence. Objective Science considers everything in the Universe, without exception, to be material. The Omnipresent Okidanokh, a cosmic crystallization, arises from ethernokrilno. During a process called 'djartklom' in the Okidanokh, a pure, unblended portion of ethernokrilno is temporarily released, which enters all cosmic formations and connects their active elements, being restored after the three principal parts of Okidanokh re-blend.
role: The fundamental, primordial substance that fills the entire Universe and is the basis for all existence.

definition: Haidia is a term that refers to a 'hasnamussian practice' of devising new fashions, specifically from the Babylonian period. It is synonymous with 'adiat' and 'fashion,' and involves creating new means of being-manifestation for ordinary existence, as well as various methods of changing and disguising the reality of one's presence. These practices are temporary, egoistic, serve insignificant personal aims, and arise from automatic reasoning based on abnormally established conditions of being-existence.
role: A historical term for a 'hasnamussian practice' of creating fashions or artificial modes of being-manifestation during the Babylonian period.

manifestation for ordinary existence, and various methods of changing and 
disguising the reality of one's presence.

'Adiat,' 'haidia,' or 'fashion' play the same role in their daily being-
existence as those customs of ours which are established to alleviate the 
inevitable external conditions independent of beings, customs that gradually 
enter into use everywhere as an essential need These contemporary customs or 
'fashions' of theirs, on the other hand, are first merely temporary and serve 
only for the satisfaction of the insignificant personal aims of these present and 
future hasnamusses, which have become utterly abnormal and trivially 
egoistic, and second, they are neither more nor less than the results of 
automatic reasoning based on relative notions flowing from the abnormally 
established conditions of ordinary being-existence there.

These fashions are temporary, serving insignificant and egoistic personal aims, and they arise from automatic reasoning influenced by abnormally established conditions of existence. Historically, this practice was known by names like 'adiat' and 'haidia' in earlier civilizations.

definition: Keschapmartnian beings are a classification of three-brained beings found on various planets across the Great Universe and Megalocosmos. They possess 'exioëhary,' a sacred substance continuously formed in them, which is normally utilized for the continuation of their species through a sacred process called 'elmooarno' with a being of the opposite sex. These beings exist in active or passive sexes (male/female). At their arising, they inherently possess data required for a future responsible being. The beings on Earth, in their original state, had the same presence as keschapmartnian three-brained beings. The ancestors of terrestrial apes resulted from a blending of the exioëhary of two keschapmartnian beings of different brain systems and opposite sexes, or specifically, from the exioëhary of female keschapmartnian three-brained beings blending with the active exioëhary of various quadruped species.
role: A classification of three-brained beings throughout the Universe, characterized by their brain system, sexual reproduction, and the sacred substance 'exioëhary'.

key_quotes.text: a blending of the exioëhary of two keschapmartnian beings of different brain systems and of opposite sexes, and the result was the arising of the ancestors of these terrestrial 'misconceived' beings now called 'apes,' who give your favorites no peace, and from time to time so agitate their strange Reason.

And this continuation of their species was possible because the conception for the arising of the first of these abnormal beings had taken place according to the same external conditions that in general determine the presences of future keschapmartnian beings of active or passive sex.

This came about because the blending of the exioëhary of the keschapmartnian three-brained beings of the female sex, which brought about the arising of the ancestors of those apes, proceeded with the active exioëhary of the various species of quadruped beings that exist there even until today.

I MUST TELL you that in the beginning the beings on that planet had the same presence as those of all the 'keschapmartnian' three-brained beings arising on all the corresponding planets of the whole of our Great Universe, and that they also had the same duration of existence as all other three-brained beings

received in his presence from his very arising and during his early childhood almost the same data required for a future responsible being as every keschapmartnian three-brained being possesses at his arising everywhere else on all the other planets of our Great Megalocosmos.

Well then, they like ourselves are only 'keschapmartnian' beings, and when this sacred substance, continuously and inevitably formed in them, is utilized normally for the continuation of their species by means of the sacred process 'elmooarno,' its removal from their presences must be accomplished exclusively with the opposite sex.

definition: Khlodistomaticules are specific parts of the brains of beings, a term used by Objective Science, which learned physicians on Earth sometimes refer to as 'cerebral nerve ganglia'. They are composed of crystallized 'nirioonossian vibrations' that form in a being upon its complete development, as a result of perceptions through the organ of hearing. When acted upon by similar, but not yet crystallized, vibrations, these khlodistomaticules engender the property of 'vibroechonitanko,' also known as 'remorse,' in the corresponding region of the brain. According to Great Nature's foresight, they serve as factors enabling the process of association in beings, particularly when inner promptings are absent or external stimuli do not reach their brains.
role: Parts of the brain responsible for forming 'nirioonossian vibrations', engendering 'remorse', and enabling association processes.

definition: A specific vibration of sound that great terrestrial learned beings took as the standard unit for defining specific vibration and specific gravity. It is the sound whose vibrations human beings (referred to as 'your favorites') have used for their sound-producing instruments since ancient times, corresponding to the 'absolute vibrations' of the tone 'do'. Its existence became known on Earth when a learned member of the Society of Akhldanns discovered a definite sound heard in a specific region after meteorological perturbations. Later, two great brothers (future saints) elucidated its character and nature and made it the unit of measurement for all their calculations. The sacred 'hanziano' (a totality of general consonance) was found to coincide almost exactly with it.
role: A standard unit of sound vibration and measurement, used by learned beings and as the basis for the tone 'do' in instruments.

definition: "Restorials," also defined as "center-of-gravity sounds in the voices of beings," are tones that beings produce freely, easily, and for extended periods without tension in other bodily functions. This phenomenon occurs when the tempo of their vocal manifestation perfectly harmonizes with other functions already established within their common presence, due to both hereditary and acquired faculties, and the overall functioning of their being. The specific nature and number of these restorials vary among different groups or geographical regions, influencing the division of the octave into whole tones. Some groups can manifest up to seventeen whole tones, while others, despite having only a few inherent "organic restorials" (e.g., three in a group from Asia), can produce many more distinct sounds (e.g., forty). These organic restorials consistently maintain an "unchanging totality of vibrations" and possess the property of evoking "centralization," or "echo," in the presence of another being.
role: Innate vocal tones or "center-of-gravity sounds" that define a being's natural vocal range and quality.

key_quotes.text: they could not, with all their wish, find in the division of the octave of sound into distinct tones either more or less than these five whole tones, since the totality of all the inner and outer conditions not depending on them gave them no other possibility, during their chanting, than to rely on their five 'restorials of the voice. '

'Restorials,' or 'center-of-gravity sounds in the voices of beings,' are those tones which, during the production of different sounds by their corresponding organs—in accordance with properties fixed in them as a result of hereditary and of acquired faculties, and depending on the general functioning of their presence—the beings manifest freely, easily, and for a long time, without evoking any tension whatever in their other separate functionings

Owing to the various conditions of local character, and also to various hereditary qualities, different 'restorials,' or 'center-of-gravity sounds of the voice,' are formed in beings of almost every group or geographical region, and hence the division of the octave into whole tones among beings who breed on different parts of the surface of the planet is quite different.
although they had the data for the manifestation of only three 'restorials' —they were able in their chanting to produce up to forty distinct sounds.
these restorials had the property of evoking what is called 'centralization,' or 'echo,' in the whole presence of another being.

definition: Soldjinokhas are procedures and ceremonies that have been established for centuries in the social and family life of people on Earth and pass automatically from generation to generation. They include various 'mysteries,' 'religious ceremonies,' 'family and social customs,' and 'religious and popular dances.' While their external forms may change over time, the impulses they engender in man and the manifestations that ensue from them always remain the same. They are a means by which useful information and true knowledge can be inserted and transmitted to very remote descendants.
role: Procedures and ceremonies for cultural and knowledge transmission

key_quotes.text: through the human "soldjinokhas," that is, through various procedures and ceremonies, which have been established for centuries in the social and family life of people and which pass automatically from generation to generation.

Therefore, if we insert the useful information and true knowledge we have already attained within the inner factors that engender these impulses and manifestations, as well as in the works that I have mentioned, we can fully count on this knowledge reaching our very remote descendants, some of whom will decipher it and thereby enable all the others to utilize it for their good.

definition: A type of being, specifically those originating on the planet Earth, that possesses three separate brains where new impressions accumulate. Initially, these beings had the same potential as other tetartocosmoses throughout the Universe to acquire 'being-Reason' and were spiritualized by 'being-instinct.' However, due to a 'misfortune,' a 'mechanical instinct' was later engendered, and a special organ (the organ kundabuffer) was provisionally implanted, causing them to perceive reality 'upside down' and to find pleasure in repeated impressions. Their psyche is characterized by a 'periodic need to destroy the existence of beings like themselves,' and they have lost the 'sane instinct to sense the truth at the heart of reality,' which has been replaced by a function inducing 'constant doubt' (called 'advertising'). In their contemporary state, the common presence of each three-brained being consists of 'three quite separate personalities' due to a failure to consciously actualize cosmic results needed for the 'ikhriltatzkakra' property.
role: A category of beings, primarily those on Earth, with three brains

key_quotes.text: in the presence of the three-brained beings there today, as in the presence of every kind of three-brained being in general, all new impressions accumulate in the three separate brains in the order of what is called 'kinship'
You know that by this time what is called 'mechanical instinct' had gradually been engendered in them, as is normal in three-brained beings.

the Most High Commission decided, among other things, to implant provisionally in the common presence of the three-brained beings there a special organ with properties that, first, would make them perceive reality 'upside down' and, second, would cause every repeated impression from the outside to crystallize in them data that engender factors for evoking sensations of 'pleasure' and 'enjoyment.'
the irresistible urge grew in me to find out the exact cause of a particularity so phenomenal for three-brained beings.

the complete destruction of that unique being-function, proper to all three-brained beings, which until the last century still arose in their presence spontaneously, and is everywhere called the 'sane instinct to sense the truth at the heart of reality.'

definition: A rare instance of a three-brained being who, upon reaching responsible age, possesses 'genuine pure Reason.' This state typically arises when the individual's formation occurs under conditions where the usual abnormalities of external existence on Earth do not corrupt them, thus preventing the 'germ of the possibility of acquiring pure Reason' from atrophying. Such a being may also benefit from a 'responsible guide' (another three-brained being whose consciousness effectively functions with the 'divine impulse of Conscience' due to fulfilling 'being-partkdolgduty'). These beings, when 'genuinely learned,' have the potential to initiate the development of 'genuine Objective Science' through their impartial and modest conscious efforts.
role: A rare, highly developed three-brained being possessing genuine pure Reason

key_quotes.text: In very rare cases certain of these favorites of yours, on reaching responsible age, possess genuine pure Reason, proper to responsible three-brained beings .
And thus the germ within him of the possibility of acquiring pure Reason does not have time during the process of his further formation to atrophy to the very root.

Furthermore, it also sometimes happens that in these relatively normal conditions such a young three-brained being, during the period of his preparation for responsible existence, finds as a responsible guide a three-brained being who, also of course by chance, was completely formed in the same way, and in the functioning of whose waking consciousness there already participate, thanks to the frequent fulfillment in his presence of being-partkdolgduty, the data which have remained whole in his subconscious for engendering the divine impulse of Conscience.

genuinely learned responsible beings do occasionally appear whose impartial and modest conscious efforts could generate the arising and gradual development of genuine Objective Science even on this ill-fated planet— assuming that the other three-brained beings there were to exist more or less normally

definition: A common planetary apparatus existing on the holy planet, which is described as being 'to a certain degree similar to what is called on Earth the 'radio.' Its function is to reproduce the contents of 'etherograms' (information sent by Beelzebub about Earth's three-brained beings) so that 'highest being-bodies' dwelling on the holy planet can listen to this information for relaxation.
role: A communication device similar to a radio, used on the holy planet

key_quotes.text: Tooilan to reproduce their contents regularly on the 'toolookhtertzinek'— which is to a certain degree similar to what is called on Earth the 'radio'—so that some of the 'highest being-bodies' dwelling on the holy planet might, if they wished, by way of relaxation, listen to this information about the psyche of those peculiar three-brained beings inhabiting one of the very remote corners of our Megalocosmos.

Whenever he received etherograms from me he reproduced their contents on the common planetary 'toolookhtertzinek,' and in this way all those righteous souls dwelling on the holy planet were kept informed of my observations and investigations of that strange psyche of the beings of the planet Earth.

and treating him now as a 'trodokhakhoon' or policeman, he says:

definition: Vibroechonitanko is a property or process occurring in the perceptive organ of hearing in beings. Specifically, it is engendered in parts of the brain called 'khlodistomaticules' (which are composed of crystallized 'nirioonossian vibrations' and are sometimes referred to as 'cerebral nerve ganglia' by Earth's physicians) under the action of similar, but not yet crystallized, 'nirioonossian vibrations'. These uncrystallized vibrations are emitted by vocal cords or artificial sound-producing instruments. When these vibrations enter a being's presence and touch the 'khlodistomaticules' of their brain, they produce this process in relation to the whole being's general functioning. It is sometimes explicitly called 'remorse'. Learned musicians in Babylon learned to combine melodies in specific ways to evoke 'vibroechonitanko' in various brains (not just one automatically), influencing the sequence of associations and impulses for inner experiencings.
role: A property or process within the brain, linked to the perceptive organ of hearing, sound vibrations, and the generation of inner associations or 'remorse'.

key_quotes.text: Among these particularities is the property called 'vibroechonitanko. '

'khlodistomaticules,' under the action of similar but not yet crystallized vibrations, engender in the corresponding region of a given brain the property of 'vibroechonitanko' or, as it is sometimes called, 'remorse. '

When the vibrations arising from those sources enter the presence of beings and touch the 'khlodistomaticules' of one or another brain, they produce, in relation to the general functioning of the whole being, this process of 'vibroechonitanko. '

definition: Zarooariakhs are entities or collective bodies, likely assemblies or jurisdictions, that host 'conferences' and engage in collective decision-making. These decisions involve 'long deliberations and complicated 'balloting' by the righteous souls of each zarooariakh, as well as between different zarooariakhs.' This implies they are structures where groups of individuals (righteous souls) gather to reach resolutions.
role: Collective bodies or jurisdictions that hold conferences and participate in collective deliberations and balloting to reach decisions.

key_quotes.text: ...conferences everywhere, in all the 'zarooariakhs,' to try by collective effort to reach some decision and, after long deliberations and complicated 'balloting' by the righteous souls of each zarooariakh, as well as between different zarooariakhs, in the end the following resolution was almost unanimously adopted.

definition: Zernofookalnian friction is a process that takes place during the crystallization of data for consciousness in the presence of three-brained beings. This process gives rise to the formation of 'sacred substances' called 'abrustdonis' and 'helkdonis,' which are required for the coating and perfecting of a being's higher parts. Beelzebub designed his tales to evoke this process 'intensively' in his grandson's presence, aiming for a result beyond mere information reception, implying a deeper understanding or emotional impact.
role: A process occurring during the crystallization of conscious data, which leads to the formation of sacred substances essential for the perfection of a being's higher parts and promotes genuine being-understanding.

key_quotes.text: ...it is only during these processes of the crystallization of data for consciousness in the presence of three-brained beings that what is called 'zernofookalnian friction' takes place, which gives rise in them to the formation of the sacred substances 'abrustdonis' and 'helkdonis,' required for the coating and perfecting of their higher parts.

...that the process of 'zernofookalnian friction' should take place intensively in your common presence, to bring about the result I have just witnessed in the way you answered my question, 'Why are you weeping?'

definition: A zirlikner is a responsible individual on the planet Karatas (and other planets inhabited by three-brained beings) who holds a profession corresponding to what are called 'physicians' on Earth and 'plef-perf-noofs' on Mars. Zirlikners voluntarily assume essential obligations related to the beings in their 'district.' They devote their entire existence to helping others fulfill their 'being-obligations' (inner or outer being-duty), especially if those beings are temporarily unable to do so due to a 'disorder in the functioning of his planetary body, or for some other reason.' Historically, physicians on Earth performed a similar role to zirlikners, but this seems to have changed over time.
role: A responsible professional, similar to an ideal physician, who dedicates their life to helping other beings fulfill their obligations and duties, particularly when faced with physical or other impediments.

key_quotes.text: This profession corresponds more or less to that of our 'zirlikners.'

You are probably already well aware that our zirlikners on the planet Karatas, as also the beings corresponding to them on the other planets of our Great Universe inhabited by already formed three-brained beings, are those responsible individuals who voluntarily take upon themselves essential obligations in relation to the beings of their 'district,' and who devote the whole of their existence to helping any one of them to fulfill his being-obligations if, on account of a temporary disorder in the functioning of his planetary body, or for some other reason, he ceases to be able to fulfill his inner or outer being-duty himself.
A plef-perf-noof is almost the same as a zirlikner on our planet and a physician on your planet Earth.

definition: An astonishing experimental apparatus, also referred to as 'alla-attapan', which functions in a specific 'doostzako' that is one of seven aspects of a cosmic result. It was observed by Beelzebub many centuries after its creation and became very well acquainted with its construction and action. This apparatus was originally used by 'great brothers' for 'elucidatory experiments' and later, thanks to Gornahoor Harharkh, became famous among genuine scientists throughout the Megalocosmos. Gornahoor Harharkh requested Beelzebub to procure one from the planet Earth, and Beelzebub did so, keeping it at his house on Mars for some time, allowing him to study its details.
role: A complex experimental apparatus used for scientific elucidations, also called 'alla-attapan'.

key_quotes.text: functions in that specific 'doostzako' which is one of the seven aspects of this other whole cosmic result.

This apparatus, with which these great brothers made their elucidatory experiments, I saw with my own eyes many centuries after the period when they existed there, and I became very well acquainted with its construction.

My exhaustive study of this astonishing apparatus, alla-attapan, which thanks to Gornahoor Harharkh became famous among the genuine scientists of almost our whole Megalocosmos, came about as a result of the following chance circumstances.
Gornahoor Harharkh, who had somehow heard about these experiments, asked me in the course of conversation to bring him one of these apparatuses from the planet Earth if I happened to be there again.

this apparatus, alla-attapan, remained in my house on the planet Mars and often came within the field of the automatic perception of my organs of sight, and during periods of rest from active mentation I examined it attentively, and ultimately became familiar with all the details of its construction and action.
